result: 在多个持续学习场景测试中，SYNERgy显著优于对比方法，在保持知识和学习新任务之间取得良好平衡，验证了双机制协同的有效性。
conclusion: 首次将双记忆回放与突触巩固结合用于通用持续学习，证明该框架无需任务信息即可实现有效学习，为类脑学习系统设计提供新思路。
search_text: SYNERgy between SYNaptic consolidation and Experience Replay for general continual learning SYNaptic 巩固和体验重播之间的协同作用，用于一般持续学习 Continual learning (CL) in the brain is facilitated by a complex set of mechanisms. This includes the interplay of multiple memory systems for consolidating information as posited by the complementary learning systems (CLS) theory and synaptic consolidation for protecting the acquired knowledge from erasure. Thus, we propose a general CL method that creates a synergy between SYNaptic consolidation and dual memory Experience Replay (SYNERgy). Our method maintains a semantic memory that accumulates and consolidates information across the tasks and interacts with the episodic memory for effective replay. It further employs synaptic consolidation by tracking the importance of parameters during the training trajectory and anchoring them to the consolidated parameters in the semantic memory. To the best of our knowledge, our study is the first to employ dual memory experience replay in conjunction with synaptic consolidation that is suitable for general CL whereby the network does not utilize task boundaries or task labels during training or inference. Our evaluation on various challenging CL scenarios and characteristics analyses demonstrate the efficacy of incorporating both synaptic consolidation and CLS theory in enabling effective CL in DNNs. 大脑中的持续学习（CL）是由一组复杂的机制促进的。这包括互补学习系统（CLS）理论所提出的用于巩固信息的多个记忆系统的相互作用以及用于保护所获得的知识不被删除的突触巩固。因此，我们提出了一种通用的 CL 方法，该方法在 SYNaptic 整合和双记忆体验重播 (SYNERgy) 之间建立协同作用。我们的方法维护语义记忆，积累和巩固任务中的信息，并与情景记忆交互以进行有效重播。它还通过跟踪训练轨迹期间参数的重要性并将其锚定到语义记忆中的合并参数来进一步采用突触巩固。据我们所知，我们的研究首次将双重记忆体验重放与突触巩固相结合，适用于一般的 CL，其中网络在训练或推理过程中不使用任务边界或任务标签。我们对各种具有挑战性的 CL 场景和特征分析的评估证明了结合突触巩固和 CLS 理论在 DNN 中实现有效 CL 的有效性。 本文提出一种结合突触巩固与双记忆经验回放的通用持续学习方法SYNERgy，旨在解决深度神经网络在连续学习中的知识遗忘问题。 Fahad Sarfraz,Elahe Arani,Bahram Zonooz cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Sagnik Majumder,Changan Chen,Ziad Al-Halah,Kristen Grauman
title: Few-Shot Audio-Visual Learning of Environment Acoustics
title_zh: 环境声学的少样本视听学习
abstract: Room impulse response (RIR) functions capture how the surrounding physical environment transforms the sounds heard by a listener, with implications for various applications in AR, VR, and robotics. Whereas traditional methods to estimate RIRs assume dense geometry and/or sound measurements throughout the environment, we explore how to infer RIRs based on a sparse set of images and echoes observed in the space. Towards that goal, we introduce a transformer-based method that uses self-attention to build a rich acoustic context, then predicts RIRs of arbitrary query source-receiver locations through cross-attention. Additionally, we design a novel training objective that improves the match in the acoustic signature between the RIR predictions and the targets. In experiments using a state-of-the-art audio-visual simulator for 3D environments, we demonstrate that our method successfully generates arbitrary RIRs, outperforming state-of-the-art methods and -- in a major departure from traditional methods -- generalizing to novel environments in a few-shot manner. Project: http://vision.cs.utexas.edu/projects/fs_rir.
summary: Room impulse response (RIR) functions capture how the surrounding physical environment transforms the sounds heard by a listener, with implications for various applications in AR, VR, and robotics. Whereas traditional methods to estimate RIRs assume dense geometry and/or sound measurements throughout the environment, we explore how to infer RIRs based on a sparse set of images and echoes observed in the space. Towards that goal, we introduce a transformer-based method that uses self-attention to build a rich acoustic context, then predicts RIRs of arbitrary query source-receiver locations through cross-attention. Additionally, we design a novel training objective that improves the match in the acoustic signature between the RIR predictions and the targets. In experiments using a state-of-the-art audio-visual simulator for 3D environments, we demonstrate that our method successfully generates arbitrary RIRs, outperforming state-of-the-art methods and -- in a major departure from traditional methods -- generalizing to novel environments in a few-shot manner. Project: http://vision.cs.utexas.edu/projects/fs_rir.
abstract_zh: 房间脉冲响应 (RIR) 函数捕捉周围的物理环境如何改变听众听到的声音，这对 AR、VR 和机器人技术中的各种应用都有影响。虽然估计 RIR 的传统方法假设整个环境中存在密集的几何形状和/或声音测量，但我们探索如何根据在空间中观察到的一组稀疏图像和回声来推断 RIR。为了实现这一目标，我们引入了一种基于 Transformer 的方法，该方法使用自注意力来构建丰富的声学上下文，然后通过交叉注意力来预测任意查询源接收器位置的 RIR。此外，我们设计了一种新颖的训练目标，可以提高 RIR 预测与目标之间声学特征的匹配度。在使用最先进的 3D 环境视听模拟器进行的实验中，我们证明了我们的方法成功生成了任意 RIR，其性能优于最先进的方法，并且与传统方法有很大不同，以几次镜头的方式推广到新环境。项目：http://vision.cs.utexas.edu/projects/fs_rir。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于稀疏视觉和音频数据的房间脉冲响应（RIR）估计方法，用于增强现实、虚拟现实和机器人等场景。
AI.motivation: 传统RIR估计方法依赖密集的几何信息或环境声学测量，难以适应实际场景中数据稀疏的挑战，需开发更高效的稀疏数据学习方法。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的模型，利用自注意力构建声学上下文，通过交叉注意力预测任意声源-接收器位置的RIR，并提出新型训练目标优化预测与真实RIR的匹配度。
AI.result: 在3D音频-视觉模拟器实验中，该方法在稀疏数据下生成RIR的性能优于现有技术，并能泛化到未见过的新环境。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了稀疏视觉-音频数据下的RIR高效估计，为现实场景中的声学建模提供了新的少样本学习解决方案。

authors_text: Wilson Yan,Ryo Okumura,Stephen James,Pieter Abbeel
title: Patch-based Object-centric Transformers for Efficient Video Generation
title_zh: 用于高效视频生成的基于补丁的以对象为中心的变压器
abstract: In this work, we present Patch-based Object-centric Video Transformer (POVT), a novel region-based video generation architecture that leverages object-centric information to efficiently model temporal dynamics in videos. We build upon prior work in video prediction via an autoregressive transformer over the discrete latent space of compressed videos, with an added modification to model object-centric information via bounding boxes. Due to better compressibility of object-centric representations, we can improve training efficiency by allowing the model to only access object information for longer horizon temporal information. When evaluated on various difficult object-centric datasets, our method achieves better or equal performance to other video generation models, while remaining computationally more efficient and scalable. In addition, we show that our method is able to perform object-centric controllability through bounding box manipulation, which may aid downstream tasks such as video editing, or visual planning. Samples are available at https://sites.google.com/view/povt-public
summary: In this work, we present Patch-based Object-centric Video Transformer (POVT), a novel region-based video generation architecture that leverages object-centric information to efficiently model temporal dynamics in videos. We build upon prior work in video prediction via an autoregressive transformer over the discrete latent space of compressed videos, with an added modification to model object-centric information via bounding boxes. Due to better compressibility of object-centric representations, we can improve training efficiency by allowing the model to only access object information for longer horizon temporal information. When evaluated on various difficult object-centric datasets, our method achieves better or equal performance to other video generation models, while remaining computationally more efficient and scalable. In addition, we show that our method is able to perform object-centric controllability through bounding box manipulation, which may aid downstream tasks such as video editing, or visual planning. Samples are available at https://sites.google.com/view/povt-public
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了基于补丁的以对象为中心的视频转换器（POVT），这是一种新颖的基于区域的视频生成架构，它利用以对象为中心的信息来有效地模拟视频中的时间动态。我们通过压缩视频的离散潜在空间上的自回归变换器建立在视频预测的先前工作的基础上，并通过边界框对以对象为中心的信息模型进行了额外的修改。由于以对象为中心的表示具有更好的可压缩性，我们可以通过允许模型仅访问更长水平时间信息的对象信息来提高训练效率。当在各种困难的以对象为中心的数据集上进行评估时，我们的方法实现了比其他视频生成模型更好或相同的性能，同时在计算上保持更高的效率和可扩展性。此外，我们还表明，我们的方法能够通过边界框操作来执行以对象为中心的可控性，这可能有助于视频编辑或视觉规划等下游任务。示例可在 https://sites.google.com/view/povt-public 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于补丁的以物体为中心的视频生成模型POVT，通过结合物体信息和边界框提升视频生成效率。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型在处理复杂场景时效率较低，且难以直接控制生成内容。通过利用物体为中心的表示方法，可提升压缩效率并实现更精细的控制。
AI.method: 基于离散压缩视频的自回归Transformer架构，引入物体边界框信息建模，使模型能长期关注物体动态，同时通过物体表示提升计算效率。
AI.result: 在多个物体中心数据集上达到与现有方法相当或更优的生成效果，计算效率和可扩展性更优，并实现通过边界框操控物体的生成控制。
AI.conclusion: POVT通过物体为中心的表示方法有效提升了视频生成的效率和可控性，为视频编辑等下游任务提供新思路。

authors_text: Anton Bredenbeck,Shubham Vyas,Willem Suter,Martin Zwick,Dorit Borrmann,Miguel Olivares-Mendez,Andreas Nüchter
title: Finding and Following Optimal Trajectories for an Overactuated Floating Robotic Platform
title_zh: 寻找并遵循过驱动浮动机器人平台的最佳轨迹
comment: 16th Symposium on Advanced Space Technologies in Robotics and Automation 2022
comments: 16th Symposium on Advanced Space Technologies in Robotics and Automation 2022
abstract: The recent increase in yearly spacecraft launches and the high number of planned launches have raised questions about maintaining accessibility to space for all interested parties. A key to sustaining the future of space-flight is the ability to service malfunctioning - and actively remove dysfunctional spacecraft from orbit. Robotic platforms that autonomously perform these tasks are a topic of ongoing research and thus must undergo thorough testing before launch. For representative system-level testing, the European Space Agency (ESA) uses, among other things, the Orbital Robotics and GNC Lab (ORGL), a flat-floor facility where air-bearing based platforms exhibit free-floating behavior in three Degrees of Freedom (DoF). This work introduces a representative simulation of a free-floating platform in the testing environment and a software framework for controller development. Finally, this work proposes a controller within that framework for finding and following optimal trajectories between arbitrary states, which is evaluated in simulation and reality.

A key to sustaining the future of space-flight is the ability to service malfunctioning - and actively remove dysfunctional spacecraft from orbit. Robotic platforms that autonomously perform these tasks are a topic of ongoing research and thus must undergo thorough testing before launch. For representative system-level testing, the European Space Agency (ESA) uses, among other things, the Orbital Robotics and GNC Lab (ORGL), a flat-floor facility where air-bearing based platforms exhibit free-floating behavior in three Degrees of Freedom (DoF). This work introduces a representative simulation of a free-floating platform in the testing environment and a software framework for controller development. Finally, this work proposes a controller within that framework for finding and following optimal trajectories between arbitrary states, which is evaluated in simulation and reality.
abstract_zh: 最近每年航天器发射次数的增加和计划发射次数的增加引发了有关维持所有利益相关方进入太空的问题。维持太空飞行未来的关键是能够对故障进行维修，并主动将故障航天器移出轨道。自主执行这些任务的机器人平台是正在进行的研究的一个主题，因此在发布之前必须经过彻底的测试。对于代表性系统级测试，欧洲航天局 (ESA) 使用轨道机器人和 GNC 实验室 (ORGL) 等设备，这是一个平底设施，其中基于空气轴承的平台在三个自由度 (DoF) 上表现出自由浮动行为。这项工作介绍了测试环境中自由浮动平台的代表性模拟和控制器开发的软件框架。最后，这项工作提出了一个在该框架内的控制器，用于寻找和遵循任意状态之间的最佳轨迹，并在模拟和现实中进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于过驱动自由漂浮机器人平台的最优轨迹规划与跟踪控制器，并在模拟和实际测试环境中进行了验证。
AI.motivation: 随着航天发射频率增加，需确保空间可及性并解决轨道上故障航天器的维护与清除问题，亟需对自主机器人平台进行系统级测试。
AI.method: 构建自由漂浮平台的仿真模型及控制软件框架，设计基于该框架的轨迹优化控制器，并通过仿真与实体实验验证其性能。
AI.result: 控制器在仿真和实际测试中均能有效实现任意状态间的最优轨迹规划与跟踪，验证了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该控制器为自由漂浮机器人平台的轨迹优化提供了有效解决方案，支持未来航天器自主服务技术的开发与测试。

authors_text: Tejaswi K. C.,Taeyoung Lee
title: Constrained Imitation Learning for a Flapping Wing Unmanned Aerial Vehicle
title_zh: 扑翼无人机的约束模仿学习
abstract: This paper presents a data-driven optimal control policy for a micro flapping wing unmanned aerial vehicle. First, a set of optimal trajectories are computed off-line based on a geometric formulation of dynamics that captures the nonlinear coupling between the large angle flapping motion and the quasi-steady aerodynamics. Then, it is transformed into a feedback control system according to the framework of imitation learning. In particular, an additional constraint is incorporated through the learning process to enhance the stability properties of the resulting controlled dynamics. Compared with conventional methods, the proposed constrained imitation learning eliminates the need to generate additional optimal trajectories on-line, without sacrificing stability. As such, the computational efficiency is substantially improved. Furthermore, this establishes the first nonlinear control system that stabilizes the coupled longitudinal and lateral dynamics of flapping wing aerial vehicle without relying on averaging or linearization. These are illustrated by numerical examples for a simulated model inspired by Monarch butterflies.
summary: This paper presents a data-driven optimal control policy for a micro flapping wing unmanned aerial vehicle. First, a set of optimal trajectories are computed off-line based on a geometric formulation of dynamics that captures the nonlinear coupling between the large angle flapping motion and the quasi-steady aerodynamics. Then, it is transformed into a feedback control system according to the framework of imitation learning. In particular, an additional constraint is incorporated through the learning process to enhance the stability properties of the resulting controlled dynamics. Compared with conventional methods, the proposed constrained imitation learning eliminates the need to generate additional optimal trajectories on-line, without sacrificing stability. As such, the computational efficiency is substantially improved. Furthermore, this establishes the first nonlinear control system that stabilizes the coupled longitudinal and lateral dynamics of flapping wing aerial vehicle without relying on averaging or linearization. These are illustrated by numerical examples for a simulated model inspired by Monarch butterflies.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的微型扑翼无人机最优控制策略。首先，基于动力学几何公式离线计算一组最佳轨迹，该几何公式捕获大角度扑翼运动与准稳态空气动力学之间的非线性耦合。然后，根据模仿学习的框架将其转化为反馈控制系统。特别是，在学习过程中加入了额外的约束，以增强所得受控动态的稳定性。与传统方法相比，所提出的约束模仿学习无需在线生成额外的最佳轨迹，而不会牺牲稳定性。这样，计算效率就得到了显着提高。此外，这建立了第一个非线性控制系统，无需依赖平均或线性化即可稳定扑翼飞行器的纵向和横向耦合动力学。这些通过受帝王蝶启发的模拟模型的数值示例进行了说明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于约束模仿学习的微扑翼无人机数据驱动最优控制策略，通过离线计算轨迹并结合反馈控制框架实现高效稳定控制。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需在线生成最优轨迹且依赖线性化或平均化假设，难以处理扑翼无人机的强非线性耦合动力学特性，亟需提升计算效率与稳定性。
AI.method: 基于几何动力学公式离线计算最优轨迹，通过模仿学习框架构建反馈控制系统，并引入约束条件增强稳定性，避免在线轨迹生成与线性化假设。
AI.result: 实现无需在线生成轨迹的高效控制，首次建立无需线性化的非线性控制系统，成功稳定扑翼无人机纵向与横向耦合动力学，仿真验证效果接近帝王蝶飞行特性。
AI.conclusion: 约束模仿学习方法有效解决了扑翼无人机控制中的非线性耦合与稳定性问题，为高效自主飞行控制提供了新思路。

authors_text: DiJia Su,Bertrand Douillard,Rami Al-Rfou,Cheolho Park,Benjamin Sapp
title: Narrowing the Coordinate-frame Gap in Behavior Prediction Models: Distillation for Efficient and Accurate Scene-centric Motion Forecasting
title_zh: 缩小行为预测模型中的坐标系差距：高效准确的以场景为中心的运动预测的蒸馏
abstract: Behavior prediction models have proliferated in recent years, especially in the popular real-world robotics application of autonomous driving, where representing the distribution over possible futures of moving agents is essential for safe and comfortable motion planning. In these models, the choice of coordinate frames to represent inputs and outputs has crucial trade offs which broadly fall into one of two categories. Agent-centric models transform inputs and perform inference in agent-centric coordinates. These models are intrinsically invariant to translation and rotation between scene elements, are best-performing on public leaderboards, but scale quadratically with the number of agents and scene elements. Scene-centric models use a fixed coordinate system to process all agents. This gives them the advantage of sharing representations among all agents, offering efficient amortized inference computation which scales linearly with the number of agents. However, these models have to learn invariance to translation and rotation between scene elements, and typically underperform agent-centric models. In this work, we develop knowledge distillation techniques between probabilistic motion forecasting models, and apply these techniques to close the gap in performance between agent-centric and scene-centric models. This improves scene-centric model performance by 13.2% on the public Argoverse benchmark, 7.8% on Waymo Open Dataset and up to 9.4% on a large In-House dataset. These improved scene-centric models rank highly in public leaderboards and are up to 15 times more efficient than their agent-centric teacher counterparts in busy scenes.
summary: Behavior prediction models have proliferated in recent years, especially in the popular real-world robotics application of autonomous driving, where representing the distribution over possible futures of moving agents is essential for safe and comfortable motion planning. In these models, the choice of coordinate frames to represent inputs and outputs has crucial trade offs which broadly fall into one of two categories. Agent-centric models transform inputs and perform inference in agent-centric coordinates. These models are intrinsically invariant to translation and rotation between scene elements, are best-performing on public leaderboards, but scale quadratically with the number of agents and scene elements. Scene-centric models use a fixed coordinate system to process all agents. This gives them the advantage of sharing representations among all agents, offering efficient amortized inference computation which scales linearly with the number of agents. However, these models have to learn invariance to translation and rotation between scene elements, and typically underperform agent-centric models. In this work, we develop knowledge distillation techniques between probabilistic motion forecasting models, and apply these techniques to close the gap in performance between agent-centric and scene-centric models. This improves scene-centric model performance by 13.2% on the public Argoverse benchmark, 7.8% on Waymo Open Dataset and up to 9.4% on a large In-House dataset. These improved scene-centric models rank highly in public leaderboards and are up to 15 times more efficient than their agent-centric teacher counterparts in busy scenes.
abstract_zh: 近年来，行为预测模型激增，尤其是在现实世界中流行的自动驾驶机器人应用中，其中表示移动代理可能的未来分布对于安全和舒适的运动规划至关重要。在这些模型中，表示输入和输出的坐标系的选择具有至关重要的权衡，这些权衡大致分为两类之一。以代理为中心的模型转换输入并在以代理为中心的坐标中执行推理。这些模型对于场景元素之间的平移和旋转本质上是不变的，在公共排行榜上表现最好，但随着代理和场景元素的数量呈二次方扩展。以场景为中心的模型使用固定的坐标系来处理所有代理。这使它们具有在所有代理之间共享表示的优势，提供有效的摊销推理计算，该计算随代理数量线性扩展。然而，这些模型必须学习场景元素之间平移和旋转的不变性，并且通常表现不佳以代理为中心的模型。在这项工作中，我们开发了概率运动预测模型之间的知识蒸馏技术，并应用这些技术来缩小以代理为中心的模型和以场景为中心的模型之间的性能差距。这使得以场景为中心的模型性能在公共 Argoverse 基准上提高了 13.2%，在 Waymo 开放数据集上提高了 7.8%，在大型内部数据集上提高了 9.4%。这些改进的以场景为中心的模型在公共排行榜上排名靠前，并且在繁忙场景中比以代理为中心的教师模型效率高出 15 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文通过知识蒸馏技术缩小代理中心模型与场景中心模型的性能差距，提升场景中心模型的预测准确性和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 代理中心模型虽性能优异但计算复杂度高，场景中心模型虽高效但性能不足，需通过知识蒸馏实现两者优势互补。
AI.method: 在概率运动预测模型间应用知识蒸馏技术，将代理中心模型的知识迁移至场景中心模型以优化其性能。
AI.result: 在Argoverse数据集上提升13.2%，Waymo数据集提升7.8%，内部数据集提升9.4%，效率较代理中心模型提升15倍。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏有效弥合坐标系框架差距，使场景中心模型兼顾高精度与高效率，在公开榜单中表现优异。

search_text: Narrowing the Coordinate-frame Gap in Behavior Prediction Models: Distillation for Efficient and Accurate Scene-centric Motion Forecasting 缩小行为预测模型中的坐标系差距：高效准确的以场景为中心的运动预测的蒸馏 Behavior prediction models have proliferated in recent years, especially in the popular real-world robotics application of autonomous driving, where representing the distribution over possible futures of moving agents is essential for safe and comfortable motion planning. In these models, the choice of coordinate frames to represent inputs and outputs has crucial trade offs which broadly fall into one of two categories. Agent-centric models transform inputs and perform inference in agent-centric coordinates. These models are intrinsically invariant to translation and rotation between scene elements, are best-performing on public leaderboards, but scale quadratically with the number of agents and scene elements. Scene-centric models use a fixed coordinate system to process all agents. This gives them the advantage of sharing representations among all agents, offering efficient amortized inference computation which scales linearly with the number of agents. However, these models have to learn invariance to translation and rotation between scene elements, and typically underperform agent-centric models. In this work, we develop knowledge distillation techniques between probabilistic motion forecasting models, and apply these techniques to close the gap in performance between agent-centric and scene-centric models. This improves scene-centric model performance by 13.2% on the public Argoverse benchmark, 7.8% on Waymo Open Dataset and up to 9.4% on a large In-House dataset. These improved scene-centric models rank highly in public leaderboards and are up to 15 times more efficient than their agent-centric teacher counterparts in busy scenes. 近年来，行为预测模型激增，尤其是在现实世界中流行的自动驾驶机器人应用中，其中表示移动代理可能的未来分布对于安全和舒适的运动规划至关重要。在这些模型中，表示输入和输出的坐标系的选择具有至关重要的权衡，这些权衡大致分为两类之一。以代理为中心的模型转换输入并在以代理为中心的坐标中执行推理。这些模型对于场景元素之间的平移和旋转本质上是不变的，在公共排行榜上表现最好，但随着代理和场景元素的数量呈二次方扩展。以场景为中心的模型使用固定的坐标系来处理所有代理。这使它们具有在所有代理之间共享表示的优势，提供有效的摊销推理计算，该计算随代理数量线性扩展。然而，这些模型必须学习场景元素之间平移和旋转的不变性，并且通常表现不佳以代理为中心的模型。在这项工作中，我们开发了概率运动预测模型之间的知识蒸馏技术，并应用这些技术来缩小以代理为中心的模型和以场景为中心的模型之间的性能差距。这使得以场景为中心的模型性能在公共 Argoverse 基准上提高了 13.2%，在 Waymo 开放数据集上提高了 7.8%，在大型内部数据集上提高了 9.4%。这些改进的以场景为中心的模型在公共排行榜上排名靠前，并且在繁忙场景中比以代理为中心的教师模型效率高出 15 倍。 本文通过知识蒸馏技术缩小代理中心模型与场景中心模型的性能差距，提升场景中心模型的预测准确性和计算效率。 DiJia Su,Bertrand Douillard,Rami Al-Rfou,Cheolho Park,Benjamin Sapp cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Elliot Doe,Mark H. M. Winands,Dennis J. N. J. Soemers,Cameron Browne
title: Combining Monte-Carlo Tree Search with Proof-Number Search
title_zh: 将蒙特卡罗树搜索与证明数搜索相结合
comment: Accepted at IEEE CoG 2022. Copyright of final version held by IEEE
comments: Accepted at IEEE CoG 2022. Copyright of final version held by IEEE
abstract: Proof-Number Search (PNS) and Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) have been successfully applied for decision making in a range of games. This paper proposes a new approach called PN-MCTS that combines these two tree-search methods by incorporating the concept of proof and disproof numbers into the UCT formula of MCTS. Experimental results demonstrate that PN-MCTS outperforms basic MCTS in several games including Lines of Action, MiniShogi, Knightthrough, and Awari, achieving win rates up to 94.0%.
summary: Proof-Number Search (PNS) and Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) have been successfully applied for decision making in a range of games. This paper proposes a new approach called PN-MCTS that combines these two tree-search methods by incorporating the concept of proof and disproof numbers into the UCT formula of MCTS. Experimental results demonstrate that PN-MCTS outperforms basic MCTS in several games including Lines of Action, MiniShogi, Knightthrough, and Awari, achieving win rates up to 94.0%.
abstract_zh: 证明数搜索（PNS）和蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）已成功应用于一系列游戏的决策中。本文提出了一种称为 PN-MCTS 的新方法，通过将证明数和反证明数的概念纳入 MCTS 的 UCT 公式中，将这两种树搜索方法结合起来。实验结果表明，PN-MCTS 在《Lines of Action》、《MiniShogi》、《Knightthrough》和《Awari》等多款游戏中的表现优于基本 MCTS，胜率高达 94.0%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将证明数搜索（PNS）与蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）结合，设计新型算法PN-MCTS以提升游戏决策性能。
AI.motivation: PNS擅长处理确定性游戏的证明搜索，MCTS通过随机模拟有效探索游戏树，二者结合可互补优势以解决复杂游戏决策问题。
AI.method: 将证明数与反证数的概念整合至MCTS的UCT公式中，通过动态调整搜索策略实现两者的有机融合。
AI.result: 在Lines of Action、MiniShogi等游戏中，PN-MCTS胜率达94.0%，显著优于传统MCTS方法。
AI.conclusion: PN-MCTS成功融合两种搜索范式，在多个游戏测试中验证了其有效性，为组合搜索算法提供了新思路。

authors_text: Alvaro Ayuso-Martinez,Daniel Casanueva-Morato,Juan P. Dominguez-Morales,Angel Jimenez-Fernandez,Gabriel Jimenez-Moreno
title: Construction of a spike-based memory using neural-like logic gates based on Spiking Neural Networks on SpiNNaker
title_zh: 使用基于 SpiNNaker 上的尖峰神经网络的类神经逻辑门构建基于尖峰的存储器
comment: 15 pages, 9 figures, 8 tables, journal paper, Neural Networks
comments: 15 pages, 9 figures, 8 tables, journal paper, Neural Networks
abstract: Neuromorphic engineering concentrates the efforts of a large number of researchers due to its great potential as a field of research, in a search for the exploitation of the advantages of the biological nervous system and the brain as a whole for the design of more efficient and real-time capable applications. For the development of applications as close to biology as possible, Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are used, considered biologically-plausible and that form the third generation of Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs). Since some SNN-based applications may need to store data in order to use it later, something that is present both in digital circuits and, in some form, in biology, a spiking memory is needed. This work presents a spiking implementation of a memory, which is one of the most important components in the computer architecture, and which could be essential in the design of a fully spiking computer. In the process of designing this spiking memory, different intermediate components were also implemented and tested. The tests were carried out on the SpiNNaker neuromorphic platform and allow to validate the approach used for the construction of the presented blocks. In addition, this work studies in depth how to build spiking blocks using this approach and includes a comparison between it and those used in other similar works focused on the design of spiking components, which include both spiking logic gates and spiking memory. All implemented blocks and developed tests are available in a public repository.
summary: Neuromorphic engineering concentrates the efforts of a large number of researchers due to its great potential as a field of research, in a search for the exploitation of the advantages of the biological nervous system and the brain as a whole for the design of more efficient and real-time capable applications. abstract_zh: 神经形态工程因其作为一个研究领域的巨大潜力而​​集中了大量研究人员的努力，以寻求利用生物神经系统和整个大脑的优势来设计更高效和实时的应用程序。为了开发尽可能接近生物学的应用程序，使用了脉冲神经网络 (SNN)，它被认为在生物学上是合理的，并形成了第三代人工神经网络 (ANN)。由于一些基于 SNN 的应用程序可能需要存储数据以便以后使用，因此需要在数字电路和生物学中以某种形式存在的东西，因此需要尖峰存储器。这项工作提出了存储器的尖峰实现，它是计算机体系结构中最重要的组件之一，并且对于完全尖峰计算机的设计至关重要。在设计这种脉冲存储器的过程中，还实现并测试了不同的中间组件。这些测试是在 SpiNNaker 神经形态平台上进行的，并允许验证用于构建所提出的块的方法。此外，这项工作深入研究了如何使用这种方法构建尖峰模块，并将其与其他专注于尖峰组件设计的类似作品（包括尖峰逻辑门和尖峰存储器）中使用的方法进行了比较。所有已实现的块和开发的测试都可以在公共存储库中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于脉冲神经网络（SNN）的脉冲记忆实现方法，旨在为神经形态计算中的数据存储提供解决方案。
AI.motivation: 传统数字电路和生物神经系统均需数据存储功能，而现有SNN应用缺乏高效的脉冲存储组件，限制了其在实时计算和生物仿真中的应用。
AI.method: 基于SpiNNaker神经形态平台，设计并实现脉冲逻辑门与脉冲记忆模块，通过实验验证其功能，并与现有类似方法进行对比分析。
AI.result: 成功构建了可验证的脉冲存储组件及中间模块，实验表明方法有效，所有实现代码和测试数据已公开共享。
AI.conclusion: 提出的脉冲记忆架构为全脉冲计算机设计提供了关键组件，且方法具有生物可解释性与实时性优势，可推动神经形态工程发展。

search_text: Construction of a spike-based memory using neural-like logic gates based on Spiking Neural Networks on SpiNNaker 使用基于 SpiNNaker 上的尖峰神经网络的类神经逻辑门构建基于尖峰的存储器 Neuromorphic engineering concentrates the efforts of a large number of researchers due to its great potential as a field of research, in a search for the exploitation of the advantages of the biological nervous system and the brain as a whole for the design of more efficient and real-time capable applications. For the development of applications as close to biology as possible, Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are used, considered biologically-plausible and that form the third generation of Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs). Since some SNN-based applications may need to store data in order to use it later, something that is present both in digital circuits and, in some form, in biology, a spiking memory is needed. This work presents a spiking implementation of a memory, which is one of the most important components in the computer architecture, and which could be essential in the design of a fully spiking computer. In the process of designing this spiking memory, different intermediate components were also implemented and tested. The tests were carried out on the SpiNNaker neuromorphic platform and allow to validate the approach used for the construction of the presented blocks. In addition, this work studies in depth how to build spiking blocks using this approach and includes a comparison between it and those used in other similar works focused on the design of spiking components, which include both spiking logic gates and spiking memory. All implemented blocks and developed tests are available in a public repository. 神经形态工程因其作为一个研究领域的巨大潜力而​​集中了大量研究人员的努力，以寻求利用生物神经系统和整个大脑的优势来设计更高效和实时的应用程序。为了开发尽可能接近生物学的应用程序，使用了脉冲神经网络 (SNN)，它被认为在生物学上是合理的，并形成了第三代人工神经网络 (ANN)。由于一些基于 SNN 的应用程序可能需要存储数据以便以后使用，因此需要在数字电路和生物学中以某种形式存在的东西，因此需要尖峰存储器。这项工作提出了存储器的尖峰实现，它是计算机体系结构中最重要的组件之一，并且对于完全尖峰计算机的设计至关重要。在设计这种脉冲存储器的过程中，还实现并测试了不同的中间组件。这些测试是在 SpiNNaker 神经形态平台上进行的，并允许验证用于构建所提出的块的方法。此外，这项工作深入研究了如何使用这种方法构建尖峰模块，并将其与其他专注于尖峰组件设计的类似作品（包括尖峰逻辑门和尖峰存储器）中使用的方法进行了比较。所有已实现的块和开发的测试都可以在公共存储库中找到。 本文提出了一种基于脉冲神经网络（SNN）的脉冲记忆实现方法，旨在为神经形态计算中的数据存储提供解决方案。 Alvaro Ayuso-Martinez,Daniel Casanueva-Morato,Juan P. Dominguez-Morales,Angel Jimenez-Fernandez,Gabriel Jimenez-Moreno cs.NE

authors_text: Mingtian Zhang,Andi Zhang,Tim Z. Xiao,Yitong Sun,Steven McDonagh
title: Out-of-Distribution Detection with Class Ratio Estimation
title_zh: 使用类比估计进行分布外检测
abstract: Density-based Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection has recently been shown unreliable for the task of detecting OOD images. Various density ratio based approaches achieve good empirical performance, however methods typically lack a principled probabilistic modelling explanation. In this work, we propose to unify density ratio based methods under a novel framework that builds energy-based models and employs differing base distributions. Under our framework, the density ratio can be viewed as the unnormalized density of an implicit semantic distribution. Further, we propose to directly estimate the density ratio of a data sample through class ratio estimation. We report competitive results on OOD image problems in comparison with recent work that alternatively requires training of deep generative models for the task. Our approach enables a simple and yet effective path towards solving the OOD detection problem.
summary: Density-based Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection has recently been shown unreliable for the task of detecting OOD images. Various density ratio based approaches achieve good empirical performance, however methods typically lack a principled probabilistic modelling explanation. In this work, we propose to unify density ratio based methods under a novel framework that builds energy-based models and employs differing base distributions. Under our framework, the density ratio can be viewed as the unnormalized density of an implicit semantic distribution. Further, we propose to directly estimate the density ratio of a data sample through class ratio estimation. We report competitive results on OOD image problems in comparison with recent work that alternatively requires training of deep generative models for the task. Our approach enables a simple and yet effective path towards solving the OOD detection problem.
abstract_zh: 最近证明，基于密度的分布外 (OOD) 检测对于检测 OOD 图像的任务来说并不可靠。各种基于密度比的方法取得了良好的经验性能，但方法通常缺乏原则性的概率建模解释。在这项工作中，我们建议在一个新颖的框架下统一基于密度比的方法，该框架构建基于能量的模型并采用不同的基础分布。在我们的框架下，密度比可以被视为隐式语义分布的非标准化密度。此外，我们建议通过类比估计直接估计数据样本的密度比。与最近的工作相比，我们报告了 OOD 图像问题的竞争结果，或者需要为该任务训练深度生成模型。我们的方法为解决 OOD 检测问题提供了一条简单而有效的途径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于类别比率估计的分布外检测框架，通过能量模型和不同基础分布统一密度比方法。
AI.motivation: 现有密度比方法在分布外检测中表现不稳定，且缺乏理论支撑的建模解释。
AI.method: 构建能量模型框架，将密度比视为隐式语义分布的非规范化密度，并通过类别比率估计直接计算密度比。
AI.result: 在分布外图像检测任务中取得与深度生成模型相当的竞争力，且方法更简洁有效。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为分布外检测提供了理论严谨且实践高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Youzhi Qu,Xinyao Jian,Wenxin Che,Penghui Du,Kai Fu,Quanying Liu
title: Transfer learning to decode brain states reflecting the relationship between cognitive tasks
title_zh: 迁移学习解码反映认知任务之间关系的大脑状态
abstract: Transfer learning improves the performance of the target task by leveraging the data of a specific source task: the closer the relationship between the source and the target tasks, the greater the performance improvement by transfer learning. In neuroscience, the relationship between cognitive tasks is usually represented by similarity of activated brain regions or neural representation. However, no study has linked transfer learning and neuroscience to reveal the relationship between cognitive tasks. In this study, we propose a transfer learning framework to reflect the relationship between cognitive tasks, and compare the task relations reflected by transfer learning and by the overlaps of brain regions (e.g., neurosynth). Our results of transfer learning create cognitive taskonomy to reflect the relationship between cognitive tasks which is well in line with the task relations derived from neurosynth. Transfer learning performs better in task decoding with fMRI data if the source and target cognitive tasks activate similar brain regions. Our study uncovers the relationship of multiple cognitive tasks and provides guidance for source task selection in transfer learning for neural decoding based on small-sample data.
summary: Transfer learning improves the performance of the target task by leveraging the data of a specific source task: the closer the relationship between the source and the target tasks, the greater the performance improvement by transfer learning. In neuroscience, the relationship between cognitive tasks is usually represented by similarity of activated brain regions or neural representation. However, no study has linked transfer learning and neuroscience to reveal the relationship between cognitive tasks. In this study, we propose a transfer learning framework to reflect the relationship between cognitive tasks, and compare the task relations reflected by transfer learning and by the overlaps of brain regions (e.g., neurosynth). Our results of transfer learning create cognitive taskonomy to reflect the relationship between cognitive tasks which is well in line with the task relations derived from neurosynth. Transfer learning performs better in task decoding with fMRI data if the source and target cognitive tasks activate similar brain regions. Our study uncovers the relationship of multiple cognitive tasks and provides guidance for source task selection in transfer learning for neural decoding based on small-sample data.
abstract_zh: 迁移学习通过利用特定源任务的数据来提高目标任务的性能：源任务和目标任务之间的关系越紧密，迁移学习的性能提升就越大。在神经科学中，认知任务之间的关系通常用激活的大脑区域或神经表征的相似性来表示。然而，还没有研究将迁移学习和神经科学联系起来以揭示认知任务之间的关系。在本研究中，我们提出了一个迁移学习框架来反映认知任务之间的关系，并比较了迁移学习和大脑区域重叠（例如神经合成器）所反映的任务关系。我们的迁移学习结果创建了认知任务法来反映认知任务之间的关系，这与神经合成器派生的任务关系非常一致。如果源认知任务和目标认知任务激活相似的大脑区域，迁移学习在使用功能磁共振成像数据进行任务解码时表现更好。我们的研究揭示了多个认知任务之间的关系，并为基于小样本数据的神经解码迁移学习中的源任务选择提供了指导。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种迁移学习框架，通过解码脑状态揭示认知任务之间的关系。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通过脑区重叠度（如Neurosynth）表示任务关系，但未将迁移学习与神经科学结合以揭示认知任务关联。
AI.method: 构建迁移学习框架，比较迁移学习反映的任务关系与脑区重叠度（如Neurosynth）的差异。
AI.result: 迁移学习生成的认知任务分类体系与Neurosynth结果一致，且当源任务与目标任务激活相似脑区时，fMRI任务解码性能更优。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习能揭示多认知任务关系，并为小样本神经解码中的源任务选择提供指导。

authors_text: Anna L. Trella,Kelly W. Zhang,Inbal Nahum-Shani,Vivek Shetty,Finale Doshi-Velez,Susan A. Murphy
title: Designing Reinforcement Learning Algorithms for Digital Interventions: Pre-implementation Guidelines
title_zh: 设计数字干预的强化学习算法：实施前指南
abstract: Online reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms are increasingly used to personalize digital interventions in the fields of mobile health and online education. Common challenges in designing and testing an RL algorithm in these settings include ensuring the RL algorithm can learn and run stably under real-time constraints, and accounting for the complexity of the environment, e.g., a lack of accurate mechanistic models for the user dynamics. To guide how one can tackle these challenges, we extend the PCS (Predictability, Computability, Stability) framework, a data science framework that incorporates best practices from machine learning and statistics in supervised learning (Yu and Kumbier, 2020), to the design of RL algorithms for the digital interventions setting. Further, we provide guidelines on how to design simulation environments, a crucial tool for evaluating RL candidate algorithms using the PCS framework. We illustrate the use of the PCS framework for designing an RL algorithm for Oralytics, a mobile health study aiming to improve users' tooth-brushing behaviors through the personalized delivery of intervention messages. Oralytics will go into the field in late 2022.
summary: Online reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms are increasingly used to personalize digital interventions in the fields of mobile health and online education. Common challenges in designing and testing an RL algorithm in these settings include ensuring the RL algorithm can learn and run stably under real-time constraints, and accounting for the complexity of the environment, e.g., a lack of accurate mechanistic models for the user dynamics. To guide how one can tackle these challenges, we extend the PCS (Predictability, Computability, Stability) framework, a data science framework that incorporates best practices from machine learning and statistics in supervised learning (Yu and Kumbier, 2020), to the design of RL algorithms for the digital interventions setting. Further, we provide guidelines on how to design simulation environments, a crucial tool for evaluating RL candidate algorithms using the PCS framework. We illustrate the use of the PCS framework for designing an RL algorithm for Oralytics, a mobile health study aiming to improve users' tooth-brushing behaviors through the personalized delivery of intervention messages. Oralytics will go into the field in late 2022.
abstract_zh: 在线强化学习（RL）算法越来越多地用于移动健康和在线教育领域的个性化数字干预。在这些环境中设计和测试 RL 算法的常见挑战包括确保 RL 算法能够在实时约束下稳定学习和运行，以及考虑环境的复杂性，例如缺乏针对用户动态的准确机械模型。为了指导如何应对这些挑战，我们扩展了 PCS（可预测性、可计算性、稳定性）框架，这是一种数据科学框架，融合了监督学习中机器学习和统计的最佳实践（Yu 和 Kumbier，2020），以设计用于数字干预设置的 RL 算法。此外，我们还提供了如何设计模拟环境的指南，这是使用 PCS 框架评估 RL 候选算法的重要工具。我们展示了如何使用 PCS 框架为 Oralytics 设计 RL 算法，Oralytics 是一项移动健康研究，旨在通过个性化的干预消息传递来改善用户的刷牙行为。 Oralytics 将于 2022 年底进入该领域。

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了PCS框架以指导数字干预中强化学习算法的设计，并提供模拟环境构建指南，通过Oralytics案例展示其应用。
AI.motivation: 数字干预场景下RL算法面临实时约束、环境复杂性及用户动态模型缺失等挑战，需系统性设计方法确保算法稳定性和有效性。
AI.method: 将监督学习中的PCS框架（可预测性、可计算性、稳定性）扩展至RL领域，提出环境模拟设计准则，并应用于移动健康案例Oralytics。
AI.result: 构建了基于PCS框架的RL算法设计流程，验证了模拟环境对算法评估的关键作用，为Oralytics项目提供实施方案。
AI.conclusion: 扩展的PCS框架为数字干预中的RL算法开发提供了可操作的预实施指南，强调环境模拟与稳定性评估的重要性。

search_text: Designing Reinforcement Learning Algorithms for Digital Interventions: Pre-implementation Guidelines 设计数字干预的强化学习算法：实施前指南 Online reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms are increasingly used to personalize digital interventions in the fields of mobile health and online education. Common challenges in designing and testing an RL algorithm in these settings include ensuring the RL algorithm can learn and run stably under real-time constraints, and accounting for the complexity of the environment, e.g., a lack of accurate mechanistic models for the user dynamics. To guide how one can tackle these challenges, we extend the PCS (Predictability, Computability, Stability) framework, a data science framework that incorporates best practices from machine learning and statistics in supervised learning (Yu and Kumbier, 2020), to the design of RL algorithms for the digital interventions setting. Further, we provide guidelines on how to design simulation environments, a crucial tool for evaluating RL candidate algorithms using the PCS framework. We illustrate the use of the PCS framework for designing an RL algorithm for Oralytics, a mobile health study aiming to improve users' tooth-brushing behaviors through the personalized delivery of intervention messages. Oralytics will go into the field in late 2022. 在线强化学习（RL）算法越来越多地用于移动健康和在线教育领域的个性化数字干预。在这些环境中设计和测试 RL 算法的常见挑战包括确保 RL 算法能够在实时约束下稳定学习和运行，以及考虑环境的复杂性，例如缺乏针对用户动态的准确机械模型。为了指导如何应对这些挑战，我们扩展了 PCS（可预测性、可计算性、稳定性）框架，这是一种数据科学框架，融合了监督学习中机器学习和统计的最佳实践（Yu 和 Kumbier，2020），以设计用于数字干预设置的 RL 算法。此外，我们还提供了如何设计模拟环境的指南，这是使用 PCS 框架评估 RL 候选算法的重要工具。我们展示了如何使用 PCS 框架为 Oralytics 设计 RL 算法，Oralytics 是一项移动健康研究，旨在通过个性化的干预消息传递来改善用户的刷牙行为。 Oralytics 将于 2022 年底进入该领域。 本文扩展了PCS框架以指导数字干预中强化学习算法的设计，并提供模拟环境构建指南，通过Oralytics案例展示其应用。 Anna L. Trella,Kelly W. Zhang,Inbal Nahum-Shani,Vivek Shetty,Finale Doshi-Velez,Susan A. Murphy cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Mohsen Vadidar,Ali Kariminezhad,Christian Mayr,Laurent Kloeker,Lutz Eckstein
title: Robust Environment Perception for Automated Driving: A Unified Learning Pipeline for Visual-Infrared Object Detection
title_zh: 自动驾驶的鲁棒环境感知：视觉-红外物体检测的统一学习管道
abstract: The RGB complementary metal-oxidesemiconductor (CMOS) sensor works within the visible light spectrum. Therefore it is very sensitive to environmental light conditions. On the contrary, a long-wave infrared (LWIR) sensor operating in 8-14 micro meter spectral band, functions independent of visible light. In this paper, we exploit both visual and thermal perception units for robust object detection purposes. After delicate synchronization and (cross-) labeling of the FLIR [1] dataset, this multi-modal perception data passes through a convolutional neural network (CNN) to detect three critical objects on the road, namely pedestrians, bicycles, and cars. After evaluation of RGB and infrared (thermal and infrared are often used interchangeably) sensors separately, various network structures are compared to fuse the data at the feature level effectively. Our RGB-thermal (RGBT) fusion network, which takes advantage of a novel entropy-block attention module (EBAM), outperforms the state-of-the-art network [2] by 10% with 82.9% mAP.
summary: The RGB complementary metal-oxidesemiconductor (CMOS) sensor works within the visible light spectrum. Therefore it is very sensitive to environmental light conditions. On the contrary, a long-wave infrared (LWIR) sensor operating in 8-14 micro meter spectral band, functions independent of visible light. In this paper, we exploit both visual and thermal perception units for robust object detection purposes. After delicate synchronization and (cross-) labeling of the FLIR [1] dataset, this multi-modal perception data passes through a convolutional neural network (CNN) to detect three critical objects on the road, namely pedestrians, bicycles, and cars. After evaluation of RGB and infrared (thermal and infrared are often used interchangeably) sensors separately, various network structures are compared to fuse the data at the feature level effectively. Our RGB-thermal (RGBT) fusion network, which takes advantage of a novel entropy-block attention module (EBAM), outperforms the state-of-the-art network [2] by 10% with 82.9% mAP.
abstract_zh: RGB 互补金属氧化物半导体 (CMOS) 传感器在可见光谱范围内工作。因此它对环境光条件非常敏感。相反，工作在 8-14 微米光谱带的长波红外 (LWIR) 传感器的功能与可见光无关。在本文中，我们利用视觉和热感知单元来实现稳健的物体检测目的。在对 FLIR [1] 数据集进行精细同步和（交叉）标记后，这种多模态感知数据通过卷积神经网络 (CNN) 来检测道路上的三个关键物体，即行人、自行车和汽车。在分别评估RGB和红外（热和红外通常互换使用）传感器后，比较各种网络结构以有效地融合特征级别的数据。我们的 RGB-热 (RGBT) 融合网络利用了新型熵块注意力模块 (EBAM)，其性能比最先进的网络 [2] 提高了 10%，mAP 为 82.9%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种融合可见光与红外图像的统一学习框架，用于自动驾驶中的鲁棒环境感知和目标检测。
AI.motivation: 传统RGB传感器易受光照条件影响，而长波红外传感器可独立于可见光工作，融合多模态数据可提升复杂环境下的目标检测鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过精确同步和交叉标注FLIR数据集，设计包含熵块注意力模块（EBAM）的卷积神经网络，在特征层级融合RGB与红外模态数据。
AI.result: 所提RGB-热融合网络在mAP指标上达到82.9%，较现有最优方法提升10%。
AI.conclusion: 多模态特征融合结合EBAM模块显著提升了自动驾驶场景下对行人、自行车和车辆的检测性能，尤其在光照复杂环境下表现优异。

authors_text: Zongwei Wu,Guillaume Allibert,Christophe Stolz,Chao Ma,Cédric Demonceaux
title: Depth-Adapted CNNs for RGB-D Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于 RGB-D 语义分割的深度自适应 CNN
abstract: Recent RGB-D semantic segmentation has motivated research interest thanks to the accessibility of complementary modalities from the input side. Existing works often adopt a two-stream architecture that processes photometric and geometric information in parallel, with few methods explicitly leveraging the contribution of depth cues to adjust the sampling position on RGB images. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to incorporate the depth information in the RGB convolutional neural network (CNN), termed Z-ACN (Depth-Adapted CNN). Specifically, our Z-ACN generates a 2D depth-adapted offset which is fully constrained by low-level features to guide the feature extraction on RGB images. With the generated offset, we introduce two intuitive and effective operations to replace basic CNN operators: depth-adapted convolution and depth-adapted average pooling. Extensive experiments on both indoor and outdoor semantic segmentation tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: Recent RGB-D semantic segmentation has motivated research interest thanks to the accessibility of complementary modalities from the input side. Existing works often adopt a two-stream architecture that processes photometric and geometric information in parallel, with few methods explicitly leveraging the contribution of depth cues to adjust the sampling position on RGB images. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to incorporate the depth information in the RGB convolutional neural network (CNN), termed Z-ACN (Depth-Adapted CNN). Specifically, our Z-ACN generates a 2D depth-adapted offset which is fully constrained by low-level features to guide the feature extraction on RGB images. With the generated offset, we introduce two intuitive and effective operations to replace basic CNN operators: depth-adapted convolution and depth-adapted average pooling. Extensive experiments on both indoor and outdoor semantic segmentation tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 由于输入端可以访问互补模态，最近的 RGB-D 语义分割引起了研究兴趣。现有的工作通常采用并行处理光度和几何信息的双流架构，很少有方法明确利用深度线索的贡献来调整 RGB 图像上的采样位置。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，将深度信息纳入 RGB 卷积神经网络 (CNN)，称为 Z-ACN（深度自适应 CNN）。具体来说，我们的 Z-ACN 生成一个 2D 深度自适应偏移，该偏移完全受低级特征约束，以指导 RGB 图像上的特征提取。利用生成的偏移量，我们引入了两种直观有效的操作来替代基本的 CNN 算子：深度自适应卷积和深度自适应平均池化。对室内和室外语义分割任务的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Z-ACN的深度自适应卷积神经网络框架，用于改进RGB-D语义分割任务中的深度信息利用。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理RGB-D语义分割时，通常采用双流架构并行处理光度和几何信息，但鲜有方法显式利用深度线索调整RGB图像的采样位置。
AI.method: Z-ACN通过低层特征生成2D深度自适应偏移量，指导RGB图像的特征提取，并引入深度自适应卷积和平均池化操作替代传统CNN算子。
AI.result: 在室内外语义分割任务的大量实验表明，该方法在性能上优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过深度信息调整采样位置，有效提升了RGB-D语义分割的精度和鲁棒性。

Specifically, our Z-ACN generates a 2D depth-adapted offset which is fully constrained by low-level features to guide the feature extraction on RGB images. With the generated offset, we introduce two intuitive and effective operations to replace basic CNN operators: depth-adapted convolution and depth-adapted average pooling. Extensive experiments on both indoor and outdoor semantic segmentation tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. 由于输入端可以访问互补模态，最近的 RGB-D 语义分割引起了研究兴趣。现有的工作通常采用并行处理光度和几何信息的双流架构，很少有方法明确利用深度线索的贡献来调整 RGB 图像上的采样位置。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，将深度信息纳入 RGB 卷积神经网络 (CNN)，称为 Z-ACN（深度自适应 CNN）。具体来说，我们的 Z-ACN 生成一个 2D 深度自适应偏移，该偏移完全受低级特征约束，以指导 RGB 图像上的特征提取。利用生成的偏移量，我们引入了两种直观有效的操作来替代基本的 CNN 算子：深度自适应卷积和深度自适应平均池化。对室内和室外语义分割任务的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种名为Z-ACN的深度自适应卷积神经网络框架，用于改进RGB-D语义分割任务中的深度信息利用。 Zongwei Wu,Guillaume Allibert,Christophe Stolz,Chao Ma,Cédric Demonceaux cs.CV

authors_text: Yu Cai,Hao Chen,Xin Yang,Yu Zhou,Kwang-Ting Cheng
title: Dual-Distribution Discrepancy for Anomaly Detection in Chest X-Rays
title_zh: 胸部 X 射线异常检测的双分布差异
abstract: Chest X-ray (CXR) is the most typical radiological exam for diagnosis of various diseases. Due to the expensive and time-consuming annotations, detecting anomalies in CXRs in an unsupervised fashion is very promising. However, almost all of the existing methods consider anomaly detection as a one-class classification (OCC) problem. They model the distribution of only known normal images during training and identify the samples not conforming to normal profile as anomalies in the testing phase. A large number of unlabeled images containing anomalies are thus ignored in the training phase, although they are easy to obtain in clinical practice. In this paper, we propose a novel strategy, Dual-distribution Discrepancy for Anomaly Detection (DDAD), utilizing both known normal images and unlabeled images. The proposed method consists of two modules. During training, one module takes both known normal and unlabeled images as inputs, capturing anomalous features from unlabeled images in some way, while the other one models the distribution of only known normal images. Subsequently, inter-discrepancy between the two modules, and intra-discrepancy inside the module that is trained on only normal images are designed as anomaly scores to indicate anomalies. Experiments on three CXR datasets demonstrate that the proposed DDAD achieves consistent, significant gains and outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at https://github.com/caiyu6666/DDAD.
summary: Chest X-ray (CXR) is the most typical radiological exam for diagnosis of various diseases. Due to the expensive and time-consuming annotations, detecting anomalies in CXRs in an unsupervised fashion is very promising. However, almost all of the existing methods consider anomaly detection as a one-class classification (OCC) problem. They model the distribution of only known normal images during training and identify the samples not conforming to normal profile as anomalies in the testing phase. A large number of unlabeled images containing anomalies are thus ignored in the training phase, although they are easy to obtain in clinical practice. In this paper, we propose a novel strategy, Dual-distribution Discrepancy for Anomaly Detection (DDAD), utilizing both known normal images and unlabeled images. The proposed method consists of two modules. During training, one module takes both known normal and unlabeled images as inputs, capturing anomalous features from unlabeled images in some way, while the other one models the distribution of only known normal images. Subsequently, inter-discrepancy between the two modules, and intra-discrepancy inside the module that is trained on only normal images are designed as anomaly scores to indicate anomalies. Experiments on three CXR datasets demonstrate that the proposed DDAD achieves consistent, significant gains and outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at https://github.com/caiyu6666/DDAD.
abstract_zh: 胸部X光检查（CXR）是诊断各种疾病的最典型的放射学检查。由于注释昂贵且耗时，以无人监督的方式检测 CXR 中的异常非常有前途。然而，几乎所有现有方法都将异常检测视为一类分类（OCC）问题。他们在训练期间仅对已知正常图像的分布进行建模，并在测试阶段将不符合正常分布的样本识别为异常。因此，大量包含异常的未标记图像在训练阶段被忽略，尽管它们在临床实践中很容易获得。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的策略，即双分布差异异常检测（DDAD），利用已知的正常图像和未标记的图像。所提出的方法由两个模块组成。在训练过程中，一个模块将已知的正常图像和未标记的图像作为输入，以某种方式从未标记的图像中捕获异常特征，而另一个模块仅对已知的正常图像的分布进行建模。随后，两个模块之间的相互差异以及仅在正常图像上训练的模块内部的差异被设计为异常分数以指示异常。对三个 CXR 数据集的实验表明，所提出的 DDAD 实现了一致、显着的收益，并且优于最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/caiyu6666/DDAD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于双分布差异的无监督异常检测方法DDAD，用于胸部X光片中的异常检测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅利用已知正常图像进行训练，忽略了临床中大量存在的未标记异常图像，导致检测效果受限。
AI.method: 设计包含两个模块的框架：一模块联合处理正常图像与未标记图像以捕捉异常特征，另一模块单独建模正常图像分布，通过模块间与模块内的分布差异计算异常分数。
AI.result: 在三个胸部X光数据集上实验表明，DDAD显著优于现有最先进方法，取得稳定性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合利用正常图像与未标记图像信息，双分布差异策略有效提升了胸部X光异常检测的准确性。

search_text: Dual-Distribution Discrepancy for Anomaly Detection in Chest X-Rays 胸部 X 射线异常检测的双分布差异 Chest X-ray (CXR) is the most typical radiological exam for diagnosis of various diseases. Due to the expensive and time-consuming annotations, detecting anomalies in CXRs in an unsupervised fashion is very promising. However, almost all of the existing methods consider anomaly detection as a one-class classification (OCC) problem. They model the distribution of only known normal images during training and identify the samples not conforming to normal profile as anomalies in the testing phase. A large number of unlabeled images containing anomalies are thus ignored in the training phase, although they are easy to obtain in clinical practice. In this paper, we propose a novel strategy, Dual-distribution Discrepancy for Anomaly Detection (DDAD), utilizing both known normal images and unlabeled images. The proposed method consists of two modules. During training, one module takes both known normal and unlabeled images as inputs, capturing anomalous features from unlabeled images in some way, while the other one models the distribution of only known normal images. Subsequently, inter-discrepancy between the two modules, and intra-discrepancy inside the module that is trained on only normal images are designed as anomaly scores to indicate anomalies. Experiments on three CXR datasets demonstrate that the proposed DDAD achieves consistent, significant gains and outperforms state-of-the-art methods. authors_text: El Moatez Billah Nagoudi,AbdelRahim Elmadany,Muhammad Abdul-Mageed
title: TURJUMAN: A Public Toolkit for Neural Arabic Machine Translation
title_zh: TURJUMAN：神经阿拉伯语机器翻译公共工具包
abstract: We present TURJUMAN, a neural toolkit for translating from 20 languages into Modern Standard Arabic (MSA). TURJUMAN exploits the recently-introduced text-to-text Transformer AraT5 model, endowing it with a powerful ability to decode into Arabic. The toolkit offers the possibility of employing a number of diverse decoding methods, making it suited for acquiring paraphrases for the MSA translations as an added value. To train TURJUMAN, we sample from publicly available parallel data employing a simple semantic similarity method to ensure data quality. This allows us to prepare and release AraOPUS-20, a new machine translation benchmark. We publicly release our translation toolkit (TURJUMAN) as well as our benchmark dataset (AraOPUS-20).
summary: We present TURJUMAN, a neural toolkit for translating from 20 languages into Modern Standard Arabic (MSA). TURJUMAN exploits the recently-introduced text-to-text Transformer AraT5 model, endowing it with a powerful ability to decode into Arabic. The toolkit offers the possibility of employing a number of diverse decoding methods, making it suited for acquiring paraphrases for the MSA translations as an added value. To train TURJUMAN, we sample from publicly available parallel data employing a simple semantic similarity method to ensure data quality. This allows us to prepare and release AraOPUS-20, a new machine translation benchmark. We publicly release our translation toolkit (TURJUMAN) as well as our benchmark dataset (AraOPUS-20).
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 TURJUMAN，这是一个神经工具包，用于将 20 种语言翻译成现代标准阿拉伯语 (MSA)。 TURJUMAN 利用最近推出的文本到文本 Transformer AraT5 模型，赋予其强大的阿拉伯语解码能力。该工具包提供了采用多种不同解码方法的可能性，使其适合获取 MSA 翻译的释义作为附加值。为了训练 TURJUMAN，我们采用简单的语义相似性方法从公开可用的并行数据中进行采样，以确保数据质量。这使我们能够准备并发布新的机器翻译基准 AraOPUS-20。我们公开发布我们的翻译工具包 (TURJUMAN) 以及我们的基准数据集 (AraOPUS-20)。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了TURJUMAN，一个基于神经网络的阿拉伯语机器翻译工具包，支持从20种语言翻译到现代标准阿拉伯语（MSA）。
AI.motivation: 现有阿拉伯语翻译工具在多语言支持和数据质量方面存在不足，需开发高效且数据可靠的翻译工具及基准数据集。
AI.method: 利用AraT5文本到文本Transformer模型，并结合多种解码方法生成翻译结果；通过语义相似性方法筛选公开平行语料，构建AraOPUS-20基准数据集。
AI.result: 公开发布TURJUMAN工具包及AraOPUS-20数据集，支持多语言到MSA的翻译，并提供翻译多样性（如同义表达）的生成能力。
AI.conclusion: TURJUMAN和AraOPUS-20为阿拉伯语机器翻译研究提供了实用工具和基准，有助于推动相关领域技术发展与应用。

authors_text: Hsuan Su,Pohan Chi,Shih-Cheng Huang,Chung Ho Lam,Saurav Sahay,Shang-Tse Chen,Hung-yi Lee
title: Learning to Generate Prompts for Dialogue Generation through Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 学习通过强化学习生成对话生成提示
abstract: Much literature has shown that prompt-based learning is an efficient method to make use of the large pre-trained language model. Recent works also exhibit the possibility of steering a chatbot's output by plugging in an appropriate prompt. Gradient-based methods are often used to perturb the prompts. However, some language models are not even available to the public. In this work, we first explored the combination of prompting and reinforcement learning (RL) to steer models' generation without accessing any of the models' parameters. Second, to reduce the training effort and enhance the generalizability to the unseen task, we apply multi-task learning to make the model learn to generalize to new tasks better. The experiment results show that our proposed method can successfully control several state-of-the-art (SOTA) dialogue models without accessing their parameters. Furthermore, the model demonstrates the strong ability to quickly adapt to an unseen task in fewer steps than the baseline model.
summary: Much literature has shown that prompt-based learning is an efficient method to make use of the large pre-trained language model. Recent works also exhibit the possibility of steering a chatbot's output by plugging in an appropriate prompt. Gradient-based methods are often used to perturb the prompts. However, some language models are not even available to the public. In this work, we first explored the combination of prompting and reinforcement learning (RL) to steer models' generation without accessing any of the models' parameters. Second, to reduce the training effort and enhance the generalizability to the unseen task, we apply multi-task learning to make the model learn to generalize to new tasks better. The experiment results show that our proposed method can successfully control several state-of-the-art (SOTA) dialogue models without accessing their parameters. Furthermore, the model demonstrates the strong ability to quickly adapt to an unseen task in fewer steps than the baseline model.
abstract_zh: 许多文献表明，基于提示的学习是利用大型预训练语言模型的有效方法。最近的工作还展示了通过插入适当的提示来控制聊天机器人输出的可能性。基于梯度的方法通常用于扰乱提示。然而，有些语言模型甚至不向公众开放。在这项工作中，我们首先探索了提示和强化学习 (RL) 的结合，以在不访问任何模型参数的情况下引导模型的生成。其次，为了减少训练工作量并增强对未见过的任务的泛化能力，我们应用多任务学习来使模型学习更好地泛化到新任务。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法可以成功控制几种最先进的（SOTA）对话模型，而无需访问其参数。此外，该模型展示了比基线模型以更少的步骤快速适应看不见的任务的强大能力。

AI.tldr: 通过强化学习生成提示以控制对话模型的输出，无需访问模型参数。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖梯度调整提示但需模型参数，且泛化能力不足，需更高效、通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合提示与强化学习（RL），利用多任务学习提升模型泛化能力，无需访问模型参数。
AI.result: 成功控制多个SOTA对话模型，且在新任务上适应速度优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法无需模型参数即可有效控制对话生成，且具备强泛化能力，为提示学习提供新方向。

search_text: Learning to Generate Prompts for Dialogue Generation through Reinforcement Learning 学习通过强化学习生成对话生成提示 Much literature has shown that prompt-based learning is an efficient method to make use of the large pre-trained language model. Recent works also exhibit the possibility of steering a chatbot's output by plugging in an appropriate prompt. Gradient-based methods are often used to perturb the prompts. However, some language models are not even available to the public. In this work, we first explored the combination of prompting and reinforcement learning (RL) to steer models' generation without accessing any of the models' parameters. Second, to reduce the training effort and enhance the generalizability to the unseen task, we apply multi-task learning to make the model learn to generalize to new tasks better. The experiment results show that our proposed method can successfully control several state-of-the-art (SOTA) dialogue models without accessing their parameters. Furthermore, the model demonstrates the strong ability to quickly adapt to an unseen task in fewer steps than the baseline model. 许多文献表明，基于提示的学习是利用大型预训练语言模型的有效方法。最近的工作还展示了通过插入适当的提示来控制聊天机器人输出的可能性。基于梯度的方法通常用于扰乱提示。然而，有些语言模型甚至不向公众开放。在这项工作中，我们首先探索了提示和强化学习 (RL) 的结合，以在不访问任何模型参数的情况下引导模型的生成。其次，为了减少训练工作量并增强对未见过的任务的泛化能力，我们应用多任务学习来使模型学习更好地泛化到新任务。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法可以成功控制几种最先进的（SOTA）对话模型，而无需访问其参数。此外，该模型展示了比基线模型以更少的步骤快速适应看不见的任务的强大能力。 通过强化学习生成提示以控制对话模型的输出，无需访问模型参数。 Hsuan Su,Pohan Chi,Shih-Cheng Huang,Chung Ho Lam,Saurav Sahay,Shang-Tse Chen,Hung-yi Lee cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Sarah Turner,Nandita Pattnaik,Jason R. C. Nurse,Shujun Li
title: "You Just Assume It Is In There, I Guess": UK Families' Application And Knowledge Of Smart Home Cyber Security
title_zh: “我猜你只要假设它就在那里”：英国家庭对智能家居网络安全的应用和了解
abstract: The Internet of Things (IoT) is increasingly present in many family homes, yet it is unclear precisely how well families understand the cyber security threats and risks of using such devices, and how possible it is for them to educate themselves on these topics. Using a survey of 553 parents and interviews with 25 families in the UK, we find that families do not consider home IoT devices to be significantly different in terms of threats than more traditional home computers, and believe the major risks to be largely mitigated through consumer protection regulation. As a result, parents focus on teaching being careful with devices to prolong device life use, exposing their families to additional security risks and modeling incorrect security behaviors to their children. This is a risk for the present and also one for the future, as children are not taught about the IoT, and appropriate cyber security management of such devices, at school. We go on to suggest that steps must be taken by manufacturers and governments or appropriate trusted institutions to improve the cyber security knowledge and behaviors of both adults and children in relation to the use of home IoT devices.
summary: The Internet of Things (IoT) is increasingly present in many family homes, yet it is unclear precisely how well families understand the cyber security threats and risks of using such devices, and how possible it is for them to educate themselves on these topics. Using a survey of 553 parents and interviews with 25 families in the UK, we find that families do not consider home IoT devices to be significantly different in terms of threats than more traditional home computers, and believe the major risks to be largely mitigated through consumer protection regulation. As a result, parents focus on teaching being careful with devices to prolong device life use, exposing their families to additional security risks and modeling incorrect security behaviors to their children. This is a risk for the present and also one for the future, as children are not taught about the IoT, and appropriate cyber security management of such devices, at school. We go on to suggest that steps must be taken by manufacturers and governments or appropriate trusted institutions to improve the cyber security knowledge and behaviors of both adults and children in relation to the use of home IoT devices.
abstract_zh: 物联网 (IoT) 越来越多地出现在许多家庭中，但目前尚不清楚家庭对使用此类设备的网络安全威胁和风险的了解程度，以及他们对这些主题进行自我教育的可能性有多大。通过对 553 名家长的调查以及对英国 25 个家庭的采访，我们发现家庭并不认为家庭物联网设备在威胁方面与传统家用计算机有显着差异，并且认为通过消费者保护监管可以在很大程度上减轻主要风险。因此，家长重点教导要小心使用设备，以延长设备的使用寿命，让家人面临额外的安全风险，并向孩子树立不正确的安全行为。这是当前的风险，也是未来的风险，因为学校没有向孩子们教授物联网以及此类设备的适当网络安全管理知识。我们继续建议制造商和政府或适当的可信机构必须采取措施，提高成人和儿童与家庭物联网设备使用相关的网络安全知识和行为。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究英国家庭对智能家居网络安全的认知与应用情况，分析其安全意识及行为模式。
AI.motivation: 随着物联网设备在家庭中的普及，家庭对相关网络安全威胁的理解和应对措施尚不明确，存在潜在风险。
AI.method: 通过调查553名家长和对25个家庭的访谈，结合定量与定性方法分析家庭对智能家居安全的认知与行为。
AI.result: 家庭普遍认为物联网设备与传统电脑的安全风险无显著差异，依赖法规保护，忽视主动防护措施，导致安全行为不足。
AI.conclusion: 需由制造商、政府或可信机构采取行动，提升成人及儿童对智能家居网络安全的知识与正确行为规范。

authors_text: Ciarán Eising
title: Direct Triangulation with Spherical Projection for Omnidirectional Cameras
title_zh: 用于全向相机的球面投影直接三角测量
abstract: In this paper, it is proposed to solve the problem of triangulation for calibrated omnidirectional cameras through the optimisation of ray-pairs on the projective sphere. The proposed solution boils down to finding the roots of a quadratic function, and as such is closed form, completely non-iterative and computationally inexpensive when compared to previous methods. In addition, even thought the motivation is clearly to solve the triangulation problem for omnidirectional cameras, it is demonstrated that the proposed methods can be applied to non-omnidirectional, narrow field-of-view cameras.
summary: In this paper, it is proposed to solve the problem of triangulation for calibrated omnidirectional cameras through the optimisation of ray-pairs on the projective sphere. The proposed solution boils down to finding the roots of a quadratic function, and as such is closed form, completely non-iterative and computationally inexpensive when compared to previous methods. In addition, even thought the motivation is clearly to solve the triangulation problem for omnidirectional cameras, it is demonstrated that the proposed methods can be applied to non-omnidirectional, narrow field-of-view cameras.
abstract_zh: 本文提出通过投影球面上光线对的优化来解决校准全向相机的三角测量问题。所提出的解决方案归结为寻找二次函数的根，因此与以前的方法相比，它是封闭形式、完全非迭代且计算成本低廉。此外，尽管动机显然是为了解决全向相机的三角测量问题，但事实证明所提出的方法可以应用于非全向、窄视场相机。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对校准全向相机的三角化方法，通过在投影球上优化光线对，实现闭式、非迭代且计算成本低的解算。
AI.motivation: 现有全向相机三角化方法存在计算复杂或依赖迭代的问题，需提供高效且通用的解决方案，并验证其在非全向相机中的适用性。
AI.method: 基于球面投影模型，将三角化问题转化为求解二次函数根的闭式优化，无需迭代计算。
AI.result: 方法在全向相机三角化任务中表现高效，且可扩展至窄视场相机，计算成本显著低于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为全向及常规相机提供了高效、非迭代的三角化方案，具有广泛的适用性和计算优势。

authors_text: Tianyu Li,Bogdan Mazoure,Guillaume Rabusseau
title: Sequential Density Estimation via Nonlinear Continuous Weighted Finite Automata
title_zh: 通过非线性连续加权有限自动机进行序贯密度估计
abstract: Weighted finite automata (WFAs) have been widely applied in many fields. One of the classic problems for WFAs is probability distribution estimation over sequences of discrete symbols. Although WFAs have been extended to deal with continuous input data, namely continuous WFAs (CWFAs), it is still unclear how to approximate density functions over sequences of continuous random variables using WFA-based models, due to the limitation on the expressiveness of the model as well as the tractability of approximating density functions via CWFAs. In this paper, we propose a nonlinear extension to the CWFA model to first improve its expressiveness, we refer to it as the nonlinear continuous WFAs (NCWFAs). Then we leverage the so-called RNADE method, which is a well-known density estimator based on neural networks, and propose the RNADE-NCWFA model. The RNADE-NCWFA model computes a density function by design. We show that this model is strictly more expressive than the Gaussian HMM model, which CWFA cannot approximate. Empirically, we conduct a synthetic experiment using Gaussian HMM generated data. We focus on evaluating the model's ability to estimate densities for sequences of varying lengths (longer length than the training data). We observe that our model performs the best among the compared baseline methods.
summary: Weighted finite automata (WFAs) have been widely applied in many fields. One of the classic problems for WFAs is probability distribution estimation over sequences of discrete symbols. Although WFAs have been extended to deal with continuous input data, namely continuous WFAs (CWFAs), it is still unclear how to approximate density functions over sequences of continuous random variables using WFA-based models, due to the limitation on the expressiveness of the model as well as the tractability of approximating density functions via CWFAs. In this paper, we propose a nonlinear extension to the CWFA model to first improve its expressiveness, we refer to it as the nonlinear continuous WFAs (NCWFAs). Then we leverage the so-called RNADE method, which is a well-known density estimator based on neural networks, and propose the RNADE-NCWFA model. The RNADE-NCWFA model computes a density function by design. We show that this model is strictly more expressive than the Gaussian HMM model, which CWFA cannot approximate. Empirically, we conduct a synthetic experiment using Gaussian HMM generated data. We focus on evaluating the model's ability to estimate densities for sequences of varying lengths (longer length than the training data). We observe that our model performs the best among the compared baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 加权有限自动机（WFA）已广泛应用于许多领域。 WFA 的经典问题之一是离散符号序列的概率分布估计。尽管 WFA 已扩展到处理连续输入数据，即连续 WFA (CWFA)，但由于模型表达能力的限制以及通过 CWFA 逼近密度函数的易处理性，如何使用基于 WFA 的模型逼近连续随机变量序列上的密度函数仍不清楚。在本文中，我们提出了 CWFA 模型的非线性扩展，首先提高其表达能力，我们将其称为非线性连续 WFA（NCWFA）。然后我们利用所谓的 RNADE 方法（一种著名的基于神经网络的密度估计器），提出 RNADE-NCWFA 模型。 RNADE-NCWFA 模型根据设计计算密度函数。我们证明该模型比 CWFA 无法近似的高斯 HMM 模型更具有严格的表达能力。根据经验，我们使用高斯 HMM 生成的数据进行综合实验。我们专注于评估模型估计不同长度序列（比训练数据长度更长）的密度的能力。我们观察到我们的模型在比较的基线方法中表现最好。

AI.tldr: 提出非线性连续加权有限自动机模型以估计连续随机变量序列的密度函数
AI.motivation: 现有连续加权有限自动机在表达能力和密度近似可计算性存在局限，需提升模型能力以处理连续序列密度估计
AI.method: 提出非线性连续加权有限自动机（NCWFA）并结合RNADE方法，构建RNADE-NCWFA模型，通过设计密度函数进行估计
AI.result: 在合成实验中，模型在估计不同长度序列密度时优于其他基线方法
AI.conclusion: RNADE-NCWFA模型在表达能力上优于高斯HMM，且实验证明其在连续序列密度估计中的有效性

search_text: Sequential Density Estimation via Nonlinear Continuous Weighted Finite Automata 通过非线性连续加权有限自动机进行序贯密度估计 Weighted finite automata (WFAs) have been widely applied in many fields. One of the classic problems for WFAs is probability distribution estimation over sequences of discrete symbols. Although WFAs have been extended to deal with continuous input data, namely continuous WFAs (CWFAs), it is still unclear how to approximate density functions over sequences of continuous random variables using WFA-based models, due to the limitation on the expressiveness of the model as well as the tractability of approximating density functions via CWFAs. In this paper, we propose a nonlinear extension to the CWFA model to first improve its expressiveness, we refer to it as the nonlinear continuous WFAs (NCWFAs). Then we leverage the so-called RNADE method, which is a well-known density estimator based on neural networks, and propose the RNADE-NCWFA model. The RNADE-NCWFA model computes a density function by design. We show that this model is strictly more expressive than the Gaussian HMM model, which CWFA cannot approximate. Empirically, we conduct a synthetic experiment using Gaussian HMM generated data. We focus on evaluating the model's ability to estimate densities for sequences of varying lengths (longer length than the training data). We observe that our model performs the best among the compared baseline methods. 加权有限自动机（WFA）已广泛应用于许多领域。 WFA 的经典问题之一是离散符号序列的概率分布估计。尽管 WFA 已扩展到处理连续输入数据，即连续 WFA (CWFA)，但由于模型表达能力的限制以及通过 CWFA 逼近密度函数的易处理性，如何使用基于 WFA 的模型逼近连续随机变量序列上的密度函数仍不清楚。在本文中，我们提出了 CWFA 模型的非线性扩展，首先提高其表达能力，我们将其称为非线性连续 WFA（NCWFA）。然后我们利用所谓的 RNADE 方法（一种著名的基于神经网络的密度估计器），提出 RNADE-NCWFA 模型。 RNADE-NCWFA 模型根据设计计算密度函数。我们证明该模型比 CWFA 无法近似的高斯 HMM 模型更具有严格的表达能力。根据经验，我们使用高斯 HMM 生成的数据进行综合实验。我们专注于评估模型估计不同长度序列（比训练数据长度更长）的密度的能力。我们观察到我们的模型在比较的基线方法中表现最好。 提出非线性连续加权有限自动机模型以估计连续随机变量序列的密度函数 Tianyu Li,Bogdan Mazoure,Guillaume Rabusseau cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Tony C. W. Mok,Albert C. S. Chung
title: Unsupervised Deformable Image Registration with Absent Correspondences in Pre-operative and Post-Recurrence Brain Tumor MRI Scans
title_zh: 术前和术后复发脑肿瘤 MRI 扫描中无监督的变形图像配准与缺乏对应关系
abstract: Registration of pre-operative and post-recurrence brain images is often needed to evaluate the effectiveness of brain gliomas treatment. While recent deep learning-based deformable registration methods have achieved remarkable success with healthy brain images, most of them would be unable to accurately align images with pathologies due to the absent correspondences in the reference image. In this paper, we propose a deep learning-based deformable registration method that jointly estimates regions with absent correspondence and bidirectional deformation fields. A forward-backward consistency constraint is used to aid in the localization of the resection and recurrence region from voxels with absence correspondences in the two images. Results on 3D clinical data from the BraTS-Reg challenge demonstrate our method can improve image alignment compared to traditional and deep learning-based registration approaches with or without cost function masking strategy. The source code is available at https://github.com/cwmok/DIRAC.
summary: Registration of pre-operative and post-recurrence brain images is often needed to evaluate the effectiveness of brain gliomas treatment. While recent deep learning-based deformable registration methods have achieved remarkable success with healthy brain images, most of them would be unable to accurately align images with pathologies due to the absent correspondences in the reference image. In this paper, we propose a deep learning-based deformable registration method that jointly estimates regions with absent correspondence and bidirectional deformation fields. A forward-backward consistency constraint is used to aid in the localization of the resection and recurrence region from voxels with absence correspondences in the two images. Results on 3D clinical data from the BraTS-Reg challenge demonstrate our method can improve image alignment compared to traditional and deep learning-based registration approaches with or without cost function masking strategy. The source code is available at https://github.com/cwmok/DIRAC.
abstract_zh: 通常需要注册术前和复发后脑部图像来评估脑胶质瘤治疗的有效性。虽然最近基于深度学习的变形配准方法在健康大脑图像上取得了显着的成功，但由于参考图像中缺乏对应关系，大多数方法无法准确地将图像与病理对齐。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的变形配准方法，该方法联合估计缺乏对应和双向变形场的区域。使用前向-后向一致性约束来帮助定位两个图像中没有对应关系的体素的切除和复发区域。 BraTS-Reg 挑战赛的 3D 临床数据结果表明，与传统的和基于深度学习的配准方法（无论有或没有成本函数掩蔽策略）相比，我们的方法可以改善图像对齐。源代码可在 https://github.com/cwmok/DIRAC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的可变形图像配准方法，用于解决术前和复发后脑肿瘤MRI图像中因缺失对应关系而导致的配准问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的深度学习方法在处理健康脑图像时效果显著，但在存在病理变化（如脑胶质瘤）的图像中，由于参考图像中缺失对应关系，配准效果不佳。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种联合估计缺失对应区域和双向变形场的深度学习方法，并利用前向-后向一致性约束来定位切除和复发区域。
AI.result: 在BraTS-Reg挑战赛的3D临床数据上，该方法在图像配准方面优于传统方法和带或不带成本函数掩码策略的深度学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了病理图像中缺失对应关系的问题，提高了术前和复发后脑肿瘤MRI图像的配准精度。

authors_text: Carlos Hinojosa,Miguel Marquez,Henry Arguello,Ehsan Adeli,Li Fei-Fei,Juan Carlos Niebles
title: PrivHAR: Recognizing Human Actions From Privacy-preserving Lens
title_zh: PrivHAR：从隐私保护的角度识别人类行为
comment: Oral paper presented at European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022, in Tel Aviv, Israel
comments: Oral paper presented at European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022, in Tel Aviv, Israel
abstract: The accelerated use of digital cameras prompts an increasing concern about privacy and security, particularly in applications such as action recognition. In this paper, we propose an optimizing framework to provide robust visual privacy protection along the human action recognition pipeline. Our framework parameterizes the camera lens to successfully degrade the quality of the videos to inhibit privacy attributes and protect against adversarial attacks while maintaining relevant features for activity recognition. We validate our approach with extensive simulations and hardware experiments.
summary: The accelerated use of digital cameras prompts an increasing concern about privacy and security, particularly in applications such as action recognition. In this paper, we propose an optimizing framework to provide robust visual privacy protection along the human action recognition pipeline. Our framework parameterizes the camera lens to successfully degrade the quality of the videos to inhibit privacy attributes and protect against adversarial attacks while maintaining relevant features for activity recognition. We validate our approach with extensive simulations and hardware experiments.
abstract_zh: 数码相机的加速使用引发了人们对隐私和安全的日益关注，特别是在动作识别等应用中。在本文中，我们提出了一个优化框架，以在人类动作识别管道中提供强大的视觉隐私保护。我们的框架对相机镜头进行参数化，以成功降低视频质量，从而抑制隐私属性并防止对抗性攻击，同时保持活动识别的相关功能。我们通过广泛的模拟和硬件实验验证了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种在保护隐私的同时进行人类动作识别的优化框架
AI.motivation: 数码相机普及引发隐私安全担忧，需在动作识别中平衡隐私保护与识别性能
AI.method: 参数化调整相机镜头参数降级视频质量，破坏隐私属性同时保留动作特征
AI.result: 通过模拟和硬件实验验证了隐私保护效果与动作识别准确率的兼顾
AI.conclusion: 该框架为隐私敏感场景下的动作识别提供了有效技术方案

authors_text: Mingxuan Gu,Sulaiman Vesal,Mareike Thies,Zhaoya Pan,Fabian Wagner,Mirabela Rusu,Andreas Maier,Ronak Kosti
title: ConFUDA: Contrastive Fewshot Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: ConFUDA：用于医学图像分割的对比少样本无监督域适应
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) aims to transfer knowledge learned from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain. Contrastive learning (CL) in the context of UDA can help to better separate classes in feature space. However, in image segmentation, the large memory footprint due to the computation of the pixel-wise contrastive loss makes it prohibitive to use. Furthermore, labeled target data is not easily available in medical imaging, and obtaining new samples is not economical. As a result, in this work, we tackle a more challenging UDA task when there are only a few (fewshot) or a single (oneshot) image available from the target domain. We apply a style transfer module to mitigate the scarcity of target samples. Then, to align the source and target features and tackle the memory issue of the traditional contrastive loss, we propose the centroid-based contrastive learning (CCL) and a centroid norm regularizer (CNR) to optimize the contrastive pairs in both direction and magnitude. In addition, we propose multi-partition centroid contrastive learning (MPCCL) to further reduce the variance in the target features. Fewshot evaluation on MS-CMRSeg dataset demonstrates that ConFUDA improves the segmentation performance by 0.34 of the Dice score on the target domain compared with the baseline, and 0.31 Dice score improvement in a more rigorous oneshot setting.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) aims to transfer knowledge learned from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain. Contrastive learning (CL) in the context of UDA can help to better separate classes in feature space. However, in image segmentation, the large memory footprint due to the computation of the pixel-wise contrastive loss makes it prohibitive to use. Furthermore, labeled target data is not easily available in medical imaging, and obtaining new samples is not economical. As a result, in this work, we tackle a more challenging UDA task when there are only a few (fewshot) or a single (oneshot) image available from the target domain. We apply a style transfer module to mitigate the scarcity of target samples. Then, to align the source and target features and tackle the memory issue of the traditional contrastive loss, we propose the centroid-based contrastive learning (CCL) and a centroid norm regularizer (CNR) to optimize the contrastive pairs in both direction and magnitude. In addition, we propose multi-partition centroid contrastive learning (MPCCL) to further reduce the variance in the target features. Fewshot evaluation on MS-CMRSeg dataset demonstrates that ConFUDA improves the segmentation performance by 0.34 of the Dice score on the target domain compared with the baseline, and 0.31 Dice score improvement in a more rigorous oneshot setting.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）旨在将从标记源域学到的知识转移到未标记目标域。 UDA 背景下的对比学习 (CL) 有助于更好地分离特征空间中的类别。然而，在图像分割中，由于计算像素对比损失而导致的大量内存占用使其无法使用。此外，在医学成像中不容易获得标记的目标数据，并且获取新样本并不经济。因此，在这项工作中，当目标域中只有少数（少数）或单个（单一）图像可用时，我们将解决更具挑战性的 UDA 任务。我们应用风格转移模块来缓解目标样本的稀缺性。然后，为了对齐源特征和目标特征并解决传统对比损失的记忆问题，我们提出了基于质心的对比学习（CCL）和质心范数正则化器（CNR）来在方向和幅度上优化对比对。此外，我们提出多分区质心对比学习（MPCCL）以进一步减少目标特征的方差。对 MS-CMRSeg 数据集的 Fewshot 评估表明，与基线相比，ConFUDA 在目标域上的 Dice 分数提高了 0.34 的分割性能，并且在更严格的 oneshot 设置中提高了 0.31 Dice 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ConFUDA方法，解决医疗图像分割中目标域样本稀缺时的无监督域适应问题。
AI.motivation: 传统对比学习在图像分割中因像素级损失计算导致内存消耗过大，且医疗图像标注数据获取成本高。
AI.method: 结合风格迁移模块、基于中心点的对比学习（CCL）、中心点范数正则化（CNR）及多分区对比学习（MPCCL）优化特征对齐。
AI.result: 在MS-CMRSeg数据集上，fewshot设置Dice分数提升0.34，oneshot设置提升0.31。
AI.conclusion: ConFUDA通过降低内存消耗和特征方差，有效提升了医疗图像分割在少量目标样本下的域适应性能。
