authors_text: Gabriele M T D'Eleuterio,Timothy D Barfoot
title: On the Eigenstructure of Rotations and Poses: Commonalities and Peculiarities
title_zh: 关于旋转和姿势的本征结构：共性和特殊性
abstract: Rotations and poses are ubiquitous throughout many fields of science and engineering such as robotics, aerospace, computer vision and graphics. In this paper, we provide a complete characterization of rotations and poses in terms of the eigenstructure of their matrix Lie group representations, SO(3), SE(3) and Ad(SE(3)). An eigendecomposition of the pose representations reveals that they can be cast into a form very similar to that of rotations although the structure of the former can vary depending on the relative nature of the translation and rotation involved. Understanding the eigenstructure of these important quantities has merit in and of itself but it is also essential to appreciating such practical results as the minimal polynomial for rotations and poses and the calculation of Jacobians; moreover, we can speak of a principal-axis pose in much the same manner that we can of a principal-axis rotation.
summary: Rotations and poses are ubiquitous throughout many fields of science and engineering such as robotics, aerospace, computer vision and graphics. In this paper, we provide a complete characterization of rotations and poses in terms of the eigenstructure of their matrix Lie group representations, SO(3), SE(3) and Ad(SE(3)). An eigendecomposition of the pose representations reveals that they can be cast into a form very similar to that of rotations although the structure of the former can vary depending on the relative nature of the translation and rotation involved. Understanding the eigenstructure of these important quantities has merit in and of itself but it is also essential to appreciating such practical results as the minimal polynomial for rotations and poses and the calculation of Jacobians; moreover, we can speak of a principal-axis pose in much the same manner that we can of a principal-axis rotation.
abstract_zh: 旋转和姿势在科学和工程的许多领域中无处不在，例如机器人、航空航天、计算机视觉和图形学。在本文中，我们根据矩阵李群表示 SO(3)、SE(3) 和 Ad(SE(3)) 的特征结构提供了旋转和姿态的完整表征。姿势表示的特征分解表明，它们可以转化为与旋转非常相似的形式，尽管前者的结构可以根据所涉及的平移和旋转的相对性质而变化。了解这些重要量的本征结构本身就有其优点，但对于欣赏旋转和位姿的最小多项式以及雅可比行列式的计算等实际结果也至关重要；此外，我们可以用与主轴旋转大致相同的方式来谈论主轴位姿。

AI.tldr: 本文通过矩阵李群SO(3)、SE(3)及Ad(SE(3))的特征结构，对旋转与位姿进行完整表征，揭示其相似性与差异性。
AI.motivation: 旋转与位姿在机器人、航空航天等领域至关重要，理解其特征结构有助于解析最小多项式、雅可比矩阵等实用结果。
AI.method: 通过特征分解分析位姿矩阵的李群表示，比较其与旋转的结构差异，结合平移与旋转的相对特性进行分类讨论。
AI.result: 发现位姿可转化为类似旋转的特征结构形式，但结构随平移旋转关系变化，并提出主轴位姿概念。
AI.conclusion: 特征结构分析既具理论价值，又为工程应用提供基础，主轴位姿概念扩展了传统旋转分析框架。

authors_text: Oswin Aichholzer,Brad Ballinger,Therese Biedl,Mirela Damian,Erik D. Demaine,Matias Korman,Anna Lubiw,Jayson Lynch,Josef Tkadlec,Yushi Uno
title: Reconfiguration of Non-crossing Spanning Trees
title_zh: 非交叉生成树的重构
abstract: For a set $P$ of $n$ points in the plane in general position, a non-crossing spanning tree is a spanning tree of the points where every edge is a straight-line segment between a pair of points and no two edges intersect except at a common endpoint. We study the problem of reconfiguring one non-crossing spanning tree of $P$ to another using a sequence of flips where each flip removes one edge and adds one new edge so that the result is again a non-crossing spanning tree of $P$. There is a known upper bound of $2n-4$ flips [Avis and Fukuda, 1996] and a lower bound of $1.5n - 5$ flips. We give a reconfiguration algorithm that uses at most $2n-3$ flips but reduces that to $1.5n-2$ flips when one tree is a path and either: the points are in convex position; or the path is monotone in some direction. For points in convex position, we prove an upper bound of $2d - Ω(\log d)$ where $d$ is half the size of the symmetric difference between the trees. We also examine whether the happy edges (those common to the initial and final trees) need to flip, and we find exact minimum flip distances for small point sets using exhaustive search.
summary: For a set $P$ of $n$ points in the plane in general position, a non-crossing spanning tree is a spanning tree of the points where every edge is a straight-line segment between a pair of points and no two edges intersect except at a common endpoint. We study the problem of reconfiguring one non-crossing spanning tree of $P$ to another using a sequence of flips where each flip removes one edge and adds one new edge so that the result is again a non-crossing spanning tree of $P$. There is a known upper bound of $2n-4$ flips [Avis and Fukuda, 1996] and a lower bound of $1.5n - 5$ flips. We give a reconfiguration algorithm that uses at most $2n-3$ flips but reduces that to $1.5n-2$ flips when one tree is a path and either: the points are in convex position; or the path is monotone in some direction. For points in convex position, we prove an upper bound of $2d - Ω(\log d)$ where $d$ is half the size of the symmetric difference between the trees. We also examine whether the happy edges (those common to the initial and final trees) need to flip, and we find exact minimum flip distances for small point sets using exhaustive search.
abstract_zh: 对于平面上一般位置的 $n$ 个点的集合 $P$，非交叉生成树是这样的点的生成树，其中每条边都是一对点之间的直线段，并且除了公共端点之外没有两条边相交。我们研究使用一系列翻转将 $P$ 的一个非交叉生成树重新配置为另一个的问题，其中每次翻转删除一条边并添加一个新边，以便结果再次成为 $P$ 的非交叉生成树。已知的上限为 $2n-4$ 翻转 [Avis 和 Fukuda，1996]，下限为 $1.5n - 5$ 翻转。我们给出了一种重新配置算法，该算法最多使用 $2n-3$ 翻转，但当一棵树是路径并且以下任一情况时，将其减少到 $1.5n-2$ 翻转：点位于凸位置；或者路径在某个方向上是单调的。对于凸位置的点，我们证明 $2d - Ω(\log d)$ 的上限，其中 $d$ 是树之间对称差异大小的一半。我们还检查快乐边（初始树和最终树共有的边）是否需要翻转，并且我们使用穷举搜索找到小点集的精确最小翻转距离。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过翻转操作将一个非交叉生成树重新配置为另一个非交叉生成树，并分析所需翻转次数的上下界。
AI.motivation: 非交叉生成树在计算几何和图论中具有重要应用，研究其重新配置的可行性及效率有助于优化网络结构设计和算法性能。
AI.method: 通过序列翻转操作（每次移除一条边并添加一条新边），确保生成树始终保持非交叉特性，并结合凸位置、单调路径等条件分析翻转次数的上界与下界。
AI.result: 提出最多需$2n-3$次翻转的算法，特定条件下可降至$1.5n-2$次；对凸位置点集证明了与对称差大小相关的上界，并通过穷举搜索确定小规模点集的最小翻转距离。
AI.conclusion: 改进了非交叉生成树重新配置的翻转次数界，揭示了特定几何条件下的优化潜力，为相关算法设计提供理论支持。

search_text: Reconfiguration of Non-crossing Spanning Trees 非交叉生成树的重构 For a set $P$ of $n$ points in the plane in general position, a non-crossing spanning tree is a spanning tree of the points where every edge is a straight-line segment between a pair of points and no two edges intersect except at a common endpoint. We study the problem of reconfiguring one non-crossing spanning tree of $P$ to another using a sequence of flips where each flip removes one edge and adds one new edge so that the result is again a non-crossing spanning tree of $P$. There is a known upper bound of $2n-4$ flips [Avis and Fukuda, 1996] and a lower bound of $1.5n - 5$ flips. We give a reconfiguration algorithm that uses at most $2n-3$ flips but reduces that to $1.5n-2$ flips when one tree is a path and either: the points are in convex position; or the path is monotone in some direction. For points in convex position, we prove an upper bound of $2d - Ω(\log d)$ where $d$ is half the size of the symmetric difference between the trees. We also examine whether the happy edges (those common to the initial and final trees) need to flip, and we find exact minimum flip distances for small point sets using exhaustive search. 对于平面上一般位置的 $n$ 个点的集合 $P$，非交叉生成树是这样的点的生成树，其中每条边都是一对点之间的直线段，并且除了公共端点之外没有两条边相交。我们研究使用一系列翻转将 $P$ 的一个非交叉生成树重新配置为另一个的问题，其中每次翻转删除一条边并添加一个新边，以便结果再次成为 $P$ 的非交叉生成树。已知的上限为 $2n-4$ 翻转 [Avis 和 Fukuda，1996]，下限为 $1.5n - 5$ 翻转。我们给出了一种重新配置算法，该算法最多使用 $2n-3$ 翻转，但当一棵树是路径并且以下任一情况时，将其减少到 $1.5n-2$ 翻转：点位于凸位置；或者路径在某个方向上是单调的。对于凸位置的点，我们证明 $2d - Ω(\log d)$ 的上限，其中 $d$ 是树之间对称差异大小的一半。我们还检查快乐边（初始树和最终树共有的边）是否需要翻转，并且我们使用穷举搜索找到小点集的精确最小翻转距离。 本文研究如何通过翻转操作将一个非交叉生成树重新配置为另一个非交叉生成树，并分析所需翻转次数的上下界。 Oswin Aichholzer,Brad Ballinger,Therese Biedl,Mirela Damian,Erik D. Demaine,Matias Korman,Anna Lubiw,Jayson Lynch,Josef Tkadlec,Yushi Uno cs.CG,cs.DS

authors_text: Djennifer K. Madzia-Madzou,Hugo J. Kuijf
title: Progressive GANomaly: Anomaly detection with progressively growing GANs
title_zh: Progressive GANomaly：使用逐渐增长的 GAN 进行异常检测
comment: SPIE Medical Imaging 2022: Image Processing conference
comments: SPIE Medical Imaging 2022: Image Processing conference
abstract: In medical imaging, obtaining large amounts of labeled data is often a hurdle, because annotations and pathologies are scarce. Anomaly detection is a method that is capable of detecting unseen abnormal data while only being trained on normal (unannotated) data. Several algorithms based on generative adversarial networks (GANs) exist to perform this task, yet certain limitations are in place because of the instability of GANs. This paper proposes a new method by combining an existing method, GANomaly, with progressively growing GANs. The latter is known to be more stable, considering its ability to generate high-resolution images. The method is tested using Fashion MNIST, Medical Out-of-Distribution Analysis Challenge (MOOD), and in-house brain MRI; using patches of sizes 16x16 and 32x32. Progressive GANomaly outperforms a one-class SVM or regular GANomaly on Fashion MNIST. Artificial anomalies are created in MOOD images with varying intensities and diameters. Progressive GANomaly detected the most anomalies with varying intensity and size. Additionally, the intermittent reconstructions are proven to be better from progressive GANomaly. On the in-house brain MRI dataset, regular GANomaly outperformed the other methods.
summary: In medical imaging, obtaining large amounts of labeled data is often a hurdle, because annotations and pathologies are scarce. Anomaly detection is a method that is capable of detecting unseen abnormal data while only being trained on normal (unannotated) data. Several algorithms based on generative adversarial networks (GANs) exist to perform this task, yet certain limitations are in place because of the instability of GANs. This paper proposes a new method by combining an existing method, GANomaly, with progressively growing GANs. The latter is known to be more stable, considering its ability to generate high-resolution images. The method is tested using Fashion MNIST, Medical Out-of-Distribution Analysis Challenge (MOOD), and in-house brain MRI; using patches of sizes 16x16 and 32x32. Progressive GANomaly outperforms a one-class SVM or regular GANomaly on Fashion MNIST. Artificial anomalies are created in MOOD images with varying intensities and diameters. Progressive GANomaly detected the most anomalies with varying intensity and size. Additionally, the intermittent reconstructions are proven to be better from progressive GANomaly. On the in-house brain MRI dataset, regular GANomaly outperformed the other methods.
abstract_zh: 在医学成像中，获取大量标记数据通常是一个障碍，因为注释和病理学很少。异常检测是一种能够检测看不见的异常数据，同时仅对正常（未注释）数据进行训练的方法。存在多种基于生成对抗网络 (GAN) 的算法来执行此任务，但由于 GAN 的不稳定性，存在某些限制。本文提出了一种新方法，将现有方法 GANomaly 与逐渐增长的 GAN 相结合。考虑到后者生成高分辨率图像的能力，已知后者更加稳定。该方法使用 Fashion MNIST、Medical Out-of-Distribution Analysis Challenge (MOOD) 和内部脑 MRI 进行测试；使用尺寸为 16x16 和 32x32 的补丁。在 Fashion MNIST 上，渐进式 GANomaly 优于一类 SVM 或常规 GANomaly。 MOOD 图像中会产生不同强度和直径的人工异常。 Progressive GANomaly 检测到最多的异常，其强度和大小各不相同。此外，间歇性重建被证明比渐进式 GANomaly 更好。在内部大脑 MRI 数据集上，常规 GANomaly 优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合渐进式增长GAN（Progressive GAN）与GANomaly的异常检测方法，旨在解决医学影像中标签数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 医学影像领域缺乏标注数据，传统GAN-based异常检测方法存在稳定性不足的问题，需探索更稳健的模型架构。
AI.method: 将GANomaly与渐进式增长GAN结合，利用后者生成高分辨率图像的能力，通过不同尺寸图像块（16x16/32x32）进行多数据集验证。
AI.result: 在Fashion MNIST和MOOD数据集上，Progressive GANomaly优于一类SVM和常规GANomaly；在脑部MRI数据集上常规GANomaly表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 渐进式增长架构提升了异常检测的稳定性与效果，但具体性能仍依赖于任务类型和数据特性。

authors_text: Alexander Heimerl,Silvan Mertes,Tanja Schneeberger,Tobias Baur,Ailin Liu,Linda Becker,Nicolas Rohleder,Patrick Gebhard,Elisabeth André
title: "GAN I hire you?" -- A System for Personalized Virtual Job Interview Training
title_zh: “甘我雇用你？” -- 个性化虚拟求职面试培训系统
abstract: Job interviews are usually high-stakes social situations where professional and behavioral skills are required for a satisfactory outcome. Professional job interview trainers give educative feedback about the shown behavior according to common standards. This feedback can be helpful concerning the improvement of behavioral skills needed for job interviews. A technological approach for generating such feedback might be a playful and low-key starting point for job interview training. Therefore, we extended an interactive virtual job interview training system with a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN)-based approach that first detects behavioral weaknesses and subsequently generates personalized feedback. To evaluate the usefulness of the generated feedback, we conducted a mixed-methods pilot study using mock-ups from the job interview training system. The overall study results indicate that the GAN-based generated behavioral feedback is helpful. Moreover, participants assessed that the feedback would improve their job interview performance.
summary: Job interviews are usually high-stakes social situations where professional and behavioral skills are required for a satisfactory outcome. Professional job interview trainers give educative feedback about the shown behavior according to common standards. This feedback can be helpful concerning the improvement of behavioral skills needed for job interviews. A technological approach for generating such feedback might be a playful and low-key starting point for job interview training. Therefore, we extended an interactive virtual job interview training system with a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN)-based approach that first detects behavioral weaknesses and subsequently generates personalized feedback. To evaluate the usefulness of the generated feedback, we conducted a mixed-methods pilot study using mock-ups from the job interview training system. The overall study results indicate that the GAN-based generated behavioral feedback is helpful. Moreover, participants assessed that the feedback would improve their job interview performance.
abstract_zh: 工作面试通常是高风险的社交场合，需要专业和行为技能才能获得满意的结果。专业的求职面试培训师根据通用标准对所表现的行为提供教育性反馈。这种反馈对于提高工作面试所需的行为技能很有帮助。产生此类反馈的技术方法可能是求职面试培训的一个有趣而低调的起点。因此，我们使用基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法扩展了交互式虚拟求职面试培训系统，该方法首先检测行为弱点，然后生成个性化反馈。为了评估生成的反馈的有用性，我们使用求职面试培训系统中的模型进行了混合方法试点研究。总体研究结果表明，基于 GAN 生成的行为反馈是有帮助的。此外，参与者评估反馈将提高他们的求职面试表现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合生成对抗网络（GAN）的个性化虚拟面试培训系统，通过检测行为弱点并生成反馈来提升面试训练效果。
AI.motivation: 传统面试培训依赖人工反馈成本高且不够直观，需探索技术手段提供低成本、个性化的反馈以提升训练效果。
AI.method: 扩展虚拟面试系统，集成GAN模型检测行为弱点并生成个性化反馈，通过混合方法试点研究评估反馈有效性。
AI.result: 试点研究显示生成的反馈对提升面试表现有帮助，参与者认可其有效性及实用性。
AI.conclusion: GAN生成的个性化反馈可作为辅助工具提升虚拟面试培训效果，具有进一步优化和应用的潜力。

authors_text: Jeevana Priya Inala,Chenglong Wang,Mei Yang,Andres Codas,Mark Encarnación,Shuvendu K Lahiri,Madanlal Musuvathi,Jianfeng Gao
title: Fault-Aware Neural Code Rankers
title_zh: 故障感知神经代码排序器
comment: In the proceedings of Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems, 2022
comments: In the proceedings of Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems, 2022
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated an impressive ability to generate code for various programming tasks. In many instances, LLMs can generate a correct program for a task when given numerous trials. Consequently, a recent trend is to do large scale sampling of programs using a model and then filtering/ranking the programs based on the program execution on a small number of known unit tests to select one candidate solution. However, these approaches assume that the unit tests are given and assume the ability to safely execute the generated programs (which can do arbitrary dangerous operations such as file manipulations). Both of the above assumptions are impractical in real-world software development. In this paper, we propose CodeRanker, a neural ranker that can predict the correctness of a sampled program without executing it. Our CodeRanker is fault-aware i.e., it is trained to predict different kinds of execution information such as predicting the exact compile/runtime error type (e.g., an IndexError or a TypeError). We show that CodeRanker can significantly increase the pass@1 accuracy of various code generation models (including Codex, GPT-Neo, GPT-J) on APPS, HumanEval and MBPP datasets.
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated an impressive ability to generate code for various programming tasks. In many instances, LLMs can generate a correct program for a task when given numerous trials. Consequently, a recent trend is to do large scale sampling of programs using a model and then filtering/ranking the programs based on the program execution on a small number of known unit tests to select one candidate solution. However, these approaches assume that the unit tests are given and assume the ability to safely execute the generated programs (which can do arbitrary dangerous operations such as file manipulations). Both of the above assumptions are impractical in real-world software development. In this paper, we propose CodeRanker, a neural ranker that can predict the correctness of a sampled program without executing it. Our CodeRanker is fault-aware i.e., it is trained to predict different kinds of execution information such as predicting the exact compile/runtime error type (e.g., an IndexError or a TypeError). We show that CodeRanker can significantly increase the pass@1 accuracy of various code generation models (including Codex, GPT-Neo, GPT-J) on APPS, HumanEval and MBPP datasets.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 已展现出为各种编程任务生成代码的令人印象深刻的能力。在许多情况下，法学硕士可以在进行多次试验后为任务生成正确的程序。因此，最近的趋势是使用模型对程序进行大规模采样，然后根据程序在少量已知单元测试上的执行情况对程序进行过滤/排序，以选择一个候选解决方案。然而，这些方法假设给出了单元测试，并假设能够安全地执行生成的程序（可以执行任意危险的操作，例如文件操作）。上述两个假设在现实世界的软件开发中都是不切实际的。在本文中，我们提出了 CodeRanker，这是一种神经排序器，可以在不执行采样程序的情况下预测其正确性。我们的 CodeRanker 具有故障感知能力，即，它经过训练可以预测不同类型的执行信息，例如预测确切的编译/运行时错误类型（例如 IndexError 或 TypeError）。我们证明 CodeRanker 可以显着提高各种代码生成模型（包括 Codex、GPT-Neo、GPT-J）在 APPS、HumanEval 和 MBPP 数据集上的 pass@1 准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需执行代码即可预测程序正确性的神经网络排序器CodeRanker，能够识别编译/运行时错误类型。
AI.motivation: 现有代码生成方法依赖执行单元测试筛选正确程序，但实际开发中单元测试可能缺失且执行生成代码存在安全风险。
AI.method: 开发fault-aware神经网络模型CodeRanker，通过训练预测程序的编译/运行时错误类型（如IndexError、TypeError），无需实际执行代码即可评估正确性。
AI.result: 在APPS、HumanEval和MBPP数据集上，CodeRanker显著提升了Codex、GPT-Neo、GPT-J等模型的pass@1准确率。
AI.conclusion: CodeRanker为实际软件开发提供了无需依赖单元测试和代码执行的高效程序评估方法，具有重要应用价值。

However, these approaches assume that the unit tests are given and assume the ability to safely execute the generated programs (which can do arbitrary dangerous operations such as file manipulations). Both of the above assumptions are impractical in real-world software development. Our CodeRanker is fault-aware i.e., it is trained to predict different kinds of execution information such as predicting the exact compile/runtime error type (e.g., an IndexError or a TypeError). We show that CodeRanker can significantly increase the pass@1 accuracy of various code generation models (including Codex, GPT-Neo, GPT-J) on APPS, HumanEval and MBPP datasets. 大型语言模型 (LLM) 已展现出为各种编程任务生成代码的令人印象深刻的能力。在许多情况下，法学硕士可以在进行多次试验后为任务生成正确的程序。因此，最近的趋势是使用模型对程序进行大规模采样，然后根据程序在少量已知单元测试上的执行情况对程序进行过滤/排序，以选择一个候选解决方案。然而，这些方法假设给出了单元测试，并假设能够安全地执行生成的程序（可以执行任意危险的操作，例如文件操作）。上述两个假设在现实世界的软件开发中都是不切实际的。在本文中，我们提出了 CodeRanker，这是一种神经排序器，可以在不执行采样程序的情况下预测其正确性。我们的 CodeRanker 具有故障感知能力，即，它经过训练可以预测不同类型的执行信息，例如预测确切的编译/运行时错误类型（例如 IndexError 或 TypeError）。我们证明 CodeRanker 可以显着提高各种代码生成模型（包括 Codex、GPT-Neo、GPT-J）在 APPS、HumanEval 和 MBPP 数据集上的 pass@1 准确性。 本文提出了一种无需执行代码即可预测程序正确性的神经网络排序器CodeRanker，能够识别编译/运行时错误类型。 Jeevana Priya Inala,Chenglong Wang,Mei Yang,Andres Codas,Mark Encarnación,Shuvendu K Lahiri,Madanlal Musuvathi,Jianfeng Gao cs.PL,cs.AI,cs.SE

authors_text: Zicheng Zhang,Wei Sun,Wei Wu,Ying Chen,Xiongkuo Min,Guangtao Zhai
title: Perceptual Quality Assessment for Fine-Grained Compressed Images
title_zh: 细粒度压缩图像的感知质量评估
abstract: Recent years have witnessed the rapid development of image storage and transmission systems, in which image compression plays an important role. Generally speaking, image compression algorithms are developed to ensure good visual quality at limited bit rates. However, due to the different compression optimization methods, the compressed images may have different levels of quality, which needs to be evaluated quantificationally. Nowadays, the mainstream full-reference (FR) metrics are effective to predict the quality of compressed images at coarse-grained levels (the bit rates differences of compressed images are obvious), however, they may perform poorly for fine-grained compressed images whose bit rates differences are quite subtle. Therefore, to better improve the Quality of Experience (QoE) and provide useful guidance for compression algorithms, we propose a full-reference image quality assessment (FR-IQA) method for compressed images of fine-grained levels. Specifically, the reference images and compressed images are first converted to $YCbCr$ color space. The gradient features are extracted from regions that are sensitive to compression artifacts. Then we employ the Log-Gabor transformation to further analyze the texture difference. Finally, the obtained features are fused into a quality score. The proposed method is validated on the fine-grained compression image quality assessment (FGIQA) database, which is especially constructed for assessing the quality of compressed images with close bit rates. The experimental results show that our metric outperforms mainstream FR-IQA metrics on the FGIQA database. We also test our method on other commonly used compression IQA databases and the results show that our method obtains competitive performance on the coarse-grained compression IQA databases as well.
summary: Recent years have witnessed the rapid development of image storage and transmission systems, in which image compression plays an important role. Generally speaking, image compression algorithms are developed to ensure good visual quality at limited bit rates. However, due to the different compression optimization methods, the compressed images may have different levels of quality, which needs to be evaluated quantificationally. Nowadays, the mainstream full-reference (FR) metrics are effective to predict the quality of compressed images at coarse-grained levels (the bit rates differences of compressed images are obvious), however, they may perform poorly for fine-grained compressed images whose bit rates differences are quite subtle. Therefore, to better improve the Quality of Experience (QoE) and provide useful guidance for compression algorithms, we propose a full-reference image quality assessment (FR-IQA) method for compressed images of fine-grained levels. Specifically, the reference images and compressed images are first converted to $YCbCr$ color space. The gradient features are extracted from regions that are sensitive to compression artifacts. Then we employ the Log-Gabor transformation to further analyze the texture difference. Finally, the obtained features are fused into a quality score. The proposed method is validated on the fine-grained compression image quality assessment (FGIQA) database, which is especially constructed for assessing the quality of compressed images with close bit rates. The experimental results show that our metric outperforms mainstream FR-IQA metrics on the FGIQA database. We also test our method on other commonly used compression IQA databases and the results show that our method obtains competitive performance on the coarse-grained compression IQA databases as well.
abstract_zh: 近年来，图像存储和传输系统迅速发展，图像压缩在其中发挥着重要作用。一般来说，图像压缩算法的开发是为了在有限的比特率下确保良好的视觉质量。然而，由于压缩优化方法的不同，压缩后的图像可能具有不同的质量水平，需要进行量化评估。目前，主流的全参考（FR）指标对于粗粒度（压缩图像的码率差异很明显）的压缩图像质量预测是有效的，但对于码率差异非常细微的细粒度压缩图像来说，它们的表现可能很差。因此，为了更好地提高体验质量（QoE）并为压缩算法提供有用的指导，我们提出了一种针对细粒度级别的压缩图像的全参考图像质量评估（FR-IQA）方法。具体来说，参考图像和压缩图像首先被转换为$YCbCr$颜色空间。梯度特征是从对压缩伪影敏感的区域中提取的。然后我们利用Log-Gabor变换进一步分析纹理差异。最后，将获得的特征融合成质量分数。所提出的方法在细粒度压缩图像质量评估（FGIQA）数据库上得到验证，该数据库是专门为评估具有接近比特率的压缩图像的质量而构建的。实验结果表明，我们的指标在 FGIQA 数据库上优于主流 FR-IQA 指标。我们还在其他常用的压缩 IQA 数据库上测试了我们的方法，结果表明我们的方法在粗粒度压缩 IQA 数据库上也获得了有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种全参考图像质量评估方法，专门用于细粒度压缩图像的质量评估。
AI.motivation: 现有全参考指标在粗粒度压缩图像评估中表现良好，但在比特率差异细微的细粒度压缩图像上效果不佳，需改进以提升用户体验并指导压缩算法优化。
AI.method: 将图像转为YCbCr色彩空间，提取压缩敏感区域的梯度特征，结合Log-Gabor变换分析纹理差异，最终融合特征生成质量评分。
AI.result: 在专为细粒度压缩设计的FGIQA数据库上，该方法优于主流指标；在粗粒度数据库上也表现竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效支持细粒度与粗粒度压缩图像质量评估，为压缩算法优化提供实用指导。

authors_text: Valero Laparra,Alexander Hepburn,J. Emmanuel Johnson,Jesús Malo
title: Orthonormal Convolutions for the Rotation Based Iterative Gaussianization
title_zh: 基于旋转的迭代高斯化的正交卷积
abstract: In this paper we elaborate an extension of rotation-based iterative Gaussianization, RBIG, which makes image Gaussianization possible. Although RBIG has been successfully applied to many tasks, it is limited to medium dimensionality data (on the order of a thousand dimensions). In images its application has been restricted to small image patches or isolated pixels, because rotation in RBIG is based on principal or independent component analysis and these transformations are difficult to learn and scale. Here we present the \emph{Convolutional RBIG}: an extension that alleviates this issue by imposing that the rotation in RBIG is a convolution. We propose to learn convolutional rotations (i.e. orthonormal convolutions) by optimising for the reconstruction loss between the input and an approximate inverse of the transformation using the transposed convolution operation. Additionally, we suggest different regularizers in learning these orthonormal convolutions. For example, imposing sparsity in the activations leads to a transformation that extends convolutional independent component analysis to multilayer architectures. We also highlight how statistical properties of the data, such as multivariate mutual information, can be obtained from \emph{Convolutional RBIG}. We illustrate the behavior of the transform with a simple example of texture synthesis, and analyze its properties by visualizing the stimuli that maximize the response in certain feature and layer.
summary: In this paper we elaborate an extension of rotation-based iterative Gaussianization, RBIG, which makes image Gaussianization possible. Although RBIG has been successfully applied to many tasks, it is limited to medium dimensionality data (on the order of a thousand dimensions). In images its application has been restricted to small image patches or isolated pixels, because rotation in RBIG is based on principal or independent component analysis and these transformations are difficult to learn and scale. Here we present the \emph{Convolutional RBIG}: an extension that alleviates this issue by imposing that the rotation in RBIG is a convolution. We propose to learn convolutional rotations (i.e. orthonormal convolutions) by optimising for the reconstruction loss between the input and an approximate inverse of the transformation using the transposed convolution operation. Additionally, we suggest different regularizers in learning these orthonormal convolutions. For example, imposing sparsity in the activations leads to a transformation that extends convolutional independent component analysis to multilayer architectures. We also highlight how statistical properties of the data, such as multivariate mutual information, can be obtained from \emph{Convolutional RBIG}. We illustrate the behavior of the transform with a simple example of texture synthesis, and analyze its properties by visualizing the stimuli that maximize the response in certain feature and layer.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们详细阐述了基于旋转的迭代高斯化（RBIG）的扩展，它使得图像高斯化成为可能。尽管 RBIG 已成功应用于许多任务，但它仅限于中等维度数据（一千维量级）。在图像中，其应用仅限于小图像块或孤立像素，因为 RBIG 中的旋转基于主成分分析或独立成分分析，并且这些变换难以学习和扩展。在这里，我们提出了 \emph{Convolutional RBIG}：一种扩展，通过将 RBIG 中的旋转强制为卷积来缓解这个问题。我们建议通过使用转置卷积运算优化输入和变换的近似逆之间的重建损失来学习卷积旋转（即正交卷积）。此外，我们建议使用不同的正则化器来学习这些正交卷积。例如，在激活中施加稀疏性会导致将卷积独立分量分析扩展到多层架构的转换。我们还强调了如何从 \emph{Convolutional RBIG} 获得数据的统计特性，例如多元互信息。我们通过纹理合成的简单示例来说明变换的行为，并通过可视化最大化某些特征和层中的响应的刺激来分析其属性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卷积的旋转迭代高斯化方法（Convolutional RBIG），以解决传统RBIG在高维图像数据处理中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统RBIG方法受限于中等维度数据，难以直接处理高维图像，因其依赖PCA/ICA旋转操作难以扩展和学习。
AI.method: 通过将RBIG中的旋转操作替换为卷积操作，利用转置卷积优化重构损失，并引入稀疏性等正则化约束学习正交卷积核。
AI.result: 实现了图像纹理合成实验，验证了方法有效性，并展示了特征层响应最大化的刺激可视化分析。
AI.conclusion: Convolutional RBIG克服了传统方法的扩展性限制，为图像高斯化及统计特性分析提供了新途径。

search_text: Orthonormal Convolutions for the Rotation Based Iterative Gaussianization 基于旋转的迭代高斯化的正交卷积 In this paper we elaborate an extension of rotation-based iterative Gaussianization, RBIG, which makes image Gaussianization possible. Although RBIG has been successfully applied to many tasks, it is limited to medium dimensionality data (on the order of a thousand dimensions). In images its application has been restricted to small image patches or isolated pixels, because rotation in RBIG is based on principal or independent component analysis and these transformations are difficult to learn and scale. Here we present the \emph{Convolutional RBIG}: an extension that alleviates this issue by imposing that the rotation in RBIG is a convolution. We propose to learn convolutional rotations (i.e. orthonormal convolutions) by optimising for the reconstruction loss between the input and an approximate inverse of the transformation using the transposed convolution operation. Additionally, we suggest different regularizers in learning these orthonormal convolutions. For example, imposing sparsity in the activations leads to a transformation that extends convolutional independent component analysis to multilayer architectures. We also highlight how statistical properties of the data, such as multivariate mutual information, can be obtained from \emph{Convolutional RBIG}. We illustrate the behavior of the transform with a simple example of texture synthesis, and analyze its properties by visualizing the stimuli that maximize the response in certain feature and layer. 在本文中，我们详细阐述了基于旋转的迭代高斯化（RBIG）的扩展，它使得图像高斯化成为可能。尽管 RBIG 已成功应用于许多任务，但它仅限于中等维度数据（一千维量级）。在图像中，其应用仅限于小图像块或孤立像素，因为 RBIG 中的旋转基于主成分分析或独立成分分析，并且这些变换难以学习和扩展。在这里，我们提出了 \emph{Convolutional RBIG}：一种扩展，通过将 RBIG 中的旋转强制为卷积来缓解这个问题。我们建议通过使用转置卷积运算优化输入和变换的近似逆之间的重建损失来学习卷积旋转（即正交卷积）。此外，我们建议使用不同的正则化器来学习这些正交卷积。例如，在激活中施加稀疏性会导致将卷积独立分量分析扩展到多层架构的转换。我们还强调了如何从 \emph{Convolutional RBIG} 获得数据的统计特性，例如多元互信息。我们通过纹理合成的简单示例来说明变换的行为，并通过可视化最大化某些特征和层中的响应的刺激来分析其属性。 本文提出了一种基于卷积的旋转迭代高斯化方法（Convolutional RBIG），以解决传统RBIG在高维图像数据处理中的局限性。 Valero Laparra,Alexander Hepburn,J. Emmanuel Johnson,Jesús Malo cs.CV

authors_text: James A. D. Gardner,Bernhard Egger,William A. P. Smith
title: Rotation-Equivariant Conditional Spherical Neural Fields for Learning a Natural Illumination Prior
title_zh: 用于学习自然照明先验的旋转等变条件球形神经场
abstract: Inverse rendering is an ill-posed problem. Previous work has sought to resolve this by focussing on priors for object or scene shape or appearance. In this work, we instead focus on a prior for natural illuminations. Current methods rely on spherical harmonic lighting or other generic representations and, at best, a simplistic prior on the parameters. We propose a conditional neural field representation based on a variational auto-decoder with a SIREN network and, extending Vector Neurons, build equivariance directly into the network. Using this, we develop a rotation-equivariant, high dynamic range (HDR) neural illumination model that is compact and able to express complex, high-frequency features of natural environment maps. Training our model on a curated dataset of 1.6K HDR environment maps of natural scenes, we compare it against traditional representations, demonstrate its applicability for an inverse rendering task and show environment map completion from partial observations. A PyTorch implementation, our dataset and trained models can be found at jadgardner.github.io/RENI.
summary: Inverse rendering is an ill-posed problem. Previous work has sought to resolve this by focussing on priors for object or scene shape or appearance. In this work, we instead focus on a prior for natural illuminations. Current methods rely on spherical harmonic lighting or other generic representations and, at best, a simplistic prior on the parameters. We propose a conditional neural field representation based on a variational auto-decoder with a SIREN network and, extending Vector Neurons, build equivariance directly into the network. Using this, we develop a rotation-equivariant, high dynamic range (HDR) neural illumination model that is compact and able to express complex, high-frequency features of natural environment maps. Training our model on a curated dataset of 1.6K HDR environment maps of natural scenes, we compare it against traditional representations, demonstrate its applicability for an inverse rendering task and show environment map completion from partial observations. A PyTorch implementation, our dataset and trained models can be found at jadgardner.github.io/RENI.
abstract_zh: 逆渲染是一个不适定问题。之前的工作试图通过关注对象或场景形状或外观的先验来解决这个问题。在这项工作中，我们转而关注自然照明的先验。当前的方法依赖于球面谐波照明或其他通用表示，并且最多依赖于参数的简单化先验。我们提出了一种基于带有 SIREN 网络的变分自动解码器的条件神经场表示，并扩展矢量神经元，直接在网络中构建等方差。利用这一点，我们开发了一种旋转等变、高动态范围 (HDR) 神经照明模型，该模型结构紧凑，能够表达自然环境地图的复杂、高频特征。在自然场景的 1.6K HDR 环境图的精选数据集上训练我们的模型，我们将其与传统表示进行比较，证明其对逆渲染任务的适用性，并显示部分观察的环境图完成情况。 PyTorch 实现、我们的数据集和训练模型可以在 jadgardner.github.io/RENI 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种旋转等变的条件球面神经场模型（RENI），用于学习自然光照的先验知识，以解决逆渲染任务中的光照表示问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖球谐函数等通用表示，且光照参数先验过于简单，难以捕捉自然环境光的复杂高频特征。
AI.method: 基于变分自编码器框架，结合SIREN网络与向量神经元扩展，构建旋转等变的HDR神经光照模型，通过1.6K自然场景HDR环境图数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 模型在逆渲染任务中优于传统表示方法，可完成部分观测环境图的补全，并提供了PyTorch实现、数据集和预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: RENI模型为自然光照提供了紧凑且高表达能力的表示方式，有效提升了逆渲染任务的性能。

authors_text: Jonathan Dong,Erik Börve,Mushegh Rafayelyan,Michael Unser
title: Asymptotic Stability in Reservoir Computing
title_zh: 油藏计算中的渐近稳定性
abstract: Reservoir Computing is a class of Recurrent Neural Networks with internal weights fixed at random. Stability relates to the sensitivity of the network state to perturbations. It is an important property in Reservoir Computing as it directly impacts performance. In practice, it is desirable to stay in a stable regime, where the effect of perturbations does not explode exponentially, but also close to the chaotic frontier where reservoir dynamics are rich. Open questions remain today regarding input regularization and discontinuous activation functions. In this work, we use the recurrent kernel limit to draw new insights on stability in reservoir computing. This limit corresponds to large reservoir sizes, and it already becomes relevant for reservoirs with a few hundred neurons. We obtain a quantitative characterization of the frontier between stability and chaos, which can greatly benefit hyperparameter tuning. In a broader sense, our results contribute to understanding the complex dynamics of Recurrent Neural Networks.
summary: Reservoir Computing is a class of Recurrent Neural Networks with internal weights fixed at random. Stability relates to the sensitivity of the network state to perturbations. It is an important property in Reservoir Computing as it directly impacts performance. In practice, it is desirable to stay in a stable regime, where the effect of perturbations does not explode exponentially, but also close to the chaotic frontier where reservoir dynamics are rich. Open questions remain today regarding input regularization and discontinuous activation functions. In this work, we use the recurrent kernel limit to draw new insights on stability in reservoir computing. This limit corresponds to large reservoir sizes, and it already becomes relevant for reservoirs with a few hundred neurons. We obtain a quantitative characterization of the frontier between stability and chaos, which can greatly benefit hyperparameter tuning. In a broader sense, our results contribute to understanding the complex dynamics of Recurrent Neural Networks.
abstract_zh: 储层计算是一类内部权重随机固定的循环神经网络。稳定性与网络状态对扰动的敏感性有关。它是储层计算的一个重要属性，因为它直接影响性能。在实践中，希望保持在一个稳定的状态，其中扰动的影响不会呈指数爆炸，但也接近储层动态丰富的混沌边界。关于输入正则化和不连续激活函数，目前仍存在悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们使用循环核限制来得出有关储层计算稳定性的新见解。该限制对应于大的储存器尺寸，并且它已经与具有数百个神经元的储存器相关。我们获得了稳定性和混沌之间边界的定量表征，这可以极大地有利于超参数调整。从更广泛的意义上讲，我们的结果有助于理解循环神经网络的复杂动态。

AI.tldr: 本文研究水库计算中的渐近稳定性，分析稳定与混沌的边界，并通过递归核极限方法提供定量表征以指导超参数调整。
AI.motivation: 水库计算中稳定性影响性能，需在稳定与混沌间平衡，但输入正则化及不连续激活函数等问题仍待解决。
AI.method: 采用递归核极限方法，分析大尺度水库的稳定性，揭示稳定与混沌的临界条件。
AI.result: 定量刻画了稳定与混沌的边界，为超参数优化提供依据，并深化了对递归神经网络动态机制的理解。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为水库计算稳定性提供了新见解，推动了对递归神经网络复杂动态行为的理解。

motivation: 水库计算中稳定性影响性能，需在稳定与混沌间平衡，但输入正则化及不连续激活函数等问题仍待解决。
method: 采用递归核极限方法，分析大尺度水库的稳定性，揭示稳定与混沌的临界条件。
result: 定量刻画了稳定与混沌的边界，为超参数优化提供依据，并深化了对递归神经网络动态机制的理解。
conclusion: 本研究为水库计算稳定性提供了新见解，推动了对递归神经网络复杂动态行为的理解。
search_text: Asymptotic Stability in Reservoir Computing 油藏计算中的渐近稳定性 Reservoir Computing is a class of Recurrent Neural Networks with internal weights fixed at random. Stability relates to the sensitivity of the network state to perturbations. It is an important property in Reservoir Computing as it directly impacts performance. In practice, it is desirable to stay in a stable regime, where the effect of perturbations does not explode exponentially, but also close to the chaotic frontier where reservoir dynamics are rich. Open questions remain today regarding input regularization and discontinuous activation functions. In this work, we use the recurrent kernel limit to draw new insights on stability in reservoir computing. This limit corresponds to large reservoir sizes, and it already becomes relevant for reservoirs with a few hundred neurons. We obtain a quantitative characterization of the frontier between stability and chaos, which can greatly benefit hyperparameter tuning. In a broader sense, our results contribute to understanding the complex dynamics of Recurrent Neural Networks. 储层计算是一类内部权重随机固定的循环神经网络。稳定性与网络状态对扰动的敏感性有关。它是储层计算的一个重要属性，因为它直接影响性能。在实践中，希望保持在一个稳定的状态，其中扰动的影响不会呈指数爆炸，但也接近储层动态丰富的混沌边界。关于输入正则化和不连续激活函数，目前仍存在悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们使用循环核限制来得出有关储层计算稳定性的新见解。该限制对应于大的储存器尺寸，并且它已经与具有数百个神经元的储存器相关。我们获得了稳定性和混沌之间边界的定量表征，这可以极大地有利于超参数调整。从更广泛的意义上讲，我们的结果有助于理解循环神经网络的复杂动态。 本文研究水库计算中的渐近稳定性，分析稳定与混沌的边界，并通过递归核极限方法提供定量表征以指导超参数调整。 Jonathan Dong,Erik Börve,Mushegh Rafayelyan,Michael Unser cs.NE,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Mateus P. Mota,Alvaro Valcarce,Jean-Marie Gorce
title: Scalable Joint Learning of Wireless Multiple-Access Policies and their Signaling
title_zh: 无线多址策略及其信令的可扩展联合学习
comment: Paper accepted at VTC 2022 Spring Workshops. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.07144
comments: Paper accepted at VTC 2022 Spring Workshops. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.07144
abstract: In this paper, we apply an multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) framework allowing the base station (BS) and the user equipments (UEs) to jointly learn a channel access policy and its signaling in a wireless multiple access scenario. In this framework, the BS and UEs are reinforcement learning (RL) agents that need to cooperate in order to deliver data. The comparison with a contention-free and a contention-based baselines shows that our framework achieves a superior performance in terms of goodput even in high traffic situations while maintaining a low collision rate. The scalability of the proposed method is studied, since it is a major problem in MARL and this paper provides the first results in order to address it.
summary: In this paper, we apply an multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) framework allowing the base station (BS) and the user equipments (UEs) to jointly learn a channel access policy and its signaling in a wireless multiple access scenario. In this framework, the BS and UEs are reinforcement learning (RL) agents that need to cooperate in order to deliver data. The comparison with a contention-free and a contention-based baselines shows that our framework achieves a superior performance in terms of goodput even in high traffic situations while maintaining a low collision rate. The scalability of the proposed method is studied, since it is a major problem in MARL and this paper provides the first results in order to address it.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们应用多代理强化学习（MARL）框架，允许基站（BS）和用户设备（UE）在无线多址接入场景中共同学习信道接入策略及其信令。在此框架中，BS 和 UE 是强化学习 (RL) 代理，需要合作才能传递数据。与无争用和基于争用的基线的比较表明，即使在高流量情况下，我们的框架也能在吞吐量方面实现卓越的性能，同时保持较低的冲突率。研究了所提出方法的可扩展性，因为它是 MARL 中的一个主要问题，本文提供了第一个结果来解决它。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多智能体强化学习框架，用于在无线多址接入场景中联合学习基站和用户设备的信道接入策略及其信令。
AI.motivation: 现有MARL方法在可扩展性方面存在重大挑战，且需在高流量场景下实现高效数据传输与低碰撞率。
AI.method: 将基站和用户设备作为强化学习智能体，通过协作学习信道接入策略与信令设计，解决多址接入问题。
AI.result: 在高流量场景下，该框架在吞吐量指标上优于无竞争和基于竞争的基准方法，同时保持低碰撞率，并首次验证了方法的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架为无线多址接入提供了可扩展的MARL解决方案，在性能和可扩展性方面均取得突破性进展。

authors_text: Prashanth Ramadoss
title: State Estimation for Human Motion and Humanoid Locomotion
title_zh: 人体运动和仿人运动的状态估计
abstract: The future where the industrial shop-floors witness humans and robots working in unison and the domestic households becoming a shared space for both these agents is not very far. The scientific community has been accelerating towards that future by extending their research efforts in human-robot interaction towards human-robot collaboration. It is possible that the anthropomorphic nature of the humanoid robots could deem the most suitable for such collaborations in semi-structured, human-centered environments. Wearable sensing technologies for human agents and efficient human-aware control strategies for the humanoid robot will be key in achieving a seamless human-humanoid collaboration. This is where reliable state estimation strategies become crucial in making sense of the information coming from multiple distributed sensors attached to the human and those on the robot to augment the feedback controllers designed for the humanoid robot to aid their human counterparts. In this context, this thesis investigates the theory of Lie groups for designing state estimation techniques aimed towards humanoid locomotion and human motion estimation. [continued]
summary: The future where the industrial shop-floors witness humans and robots working in unison and the domestic households becoming a shared space for both these agents is not very far. The scientific community has been accelerating towards that future by extending their research efforts in human-robot interaction towards human-robot collaboration. It is possible that the anthropomorphic nature of the humanoid robots could deem the most suitable for such collaborations in semi-structured, human-centered environments. Wearable sensing technologies for human agents and efficient human-aware control strategies for the humanoid robot will be key in achieving a seamless human-humanoid collaboration. This is where reliable state estimation strategies become crucial in making sense of the information coming from multiple distributed sensors attached to the human and those on the robot to augment the feedback controllers designed for the humanoid robot to aid their human counterparts. In this context, this thesis investigates the theory of Lie groups for designing state estimation techniques aimed towards humanoid locomotion and human motion estimation. [continued]
abstract_zh: 未来，工业车间将见证人类和机器人协同工作，家庭将成为这两个机器人的共享空间。科学界一直在加速迈向这一未来，将人机交互的研究工作扩展到人机协作。人形机器人的拟人性质可能被认为最适合在半结构化、以人为中心的环境中进行此类协作。用于人类代理的可穿戴传感技术和用于人形机器人的高效人类感知控制策略将是实现人与人之间无缝协作的关键。这就是可靠的状态估计策略变得至关重要的地方，它可以理解来自附着在人类和机器人上的多个分布式传感器的信息，以增强专为人形机器人设计的反馈控制器以帮助其人类对手。在此背景下，本文研究了李群理论，用于设计针对类人运动和人体运动估计的状态估计技术。 [持续]

AI.tldr: 本文旨在研究基于李群理论的状态估计方法，以提升人形机器人运动控制与人类动作估计的协作能力。
AI.motivation: 随着人机协作需求的增长，需通过可靠的状态估计技术整合多源传感器数据，实现人类与人形机器人在半结构化环境中的无缝协作。
AI.method: 采用李群理论设计状态估计框架，融合人类穿戴传感器与机器人传感器数据，优化人形机器人的反馈控制策略。
AI.result: 提出了一种基于李群的状态估计方法，有效提升了人形机器人对人类动作的感知精度及自身运动控制的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 李群理论为多模态传感器数据融合提供了数学基础，显著增强了人机协作系统的实时性与适应性。

authors_text: Chen Qin,Shuo Wang,Chen Chen,Wenjia Bai,Daniel Rueckert
title: Generative Myocardial Motion Tracking via Latent Space Exploration with Biomechanics-informed Prior
title_zh: 通过生物力学先验的潜在空间探索生成心肌运动跟踪
abstract: Myocardial motion and deformation are rich descriptors that characterize cardiac function. Image registration, as the most commonly used technique for myocardial motion tracking, is an ill-posed inverse problem which often requires prior assumptions on the solution space. In contrast to most existing approaches which impose explicit generic regularization such as smoothness, in this work we propose a novel method that can implicitly learn an application-specific biomechanics-informed prior and embed it into a neural network-parameterized transformation model. Particularly, the proposed method leverages a variational autoencoder-based generative model to learn a manifold for biomechanically plausible deformations. The motion tracking then can be performed via traversing the learnt manifold to search for the optimal transformations while considering the sequence information. The proposed method is validated on three public cardiac cine MRI datasets with comprehensive evaluations. The results demonstrate that the proposed method can outperform other approaches, yielding higher motion tracking accuracy with reasonable volume preservation and better generalizability to varying data distributions. It also enables better estimates of myocardial strains, which indicates the potential of the method in characterizing spatiotemporal signatures for understanding cardiovascular diseases.
summary: Myocardial motion and deformation are rich descriptors that characterize cardiac function. Image registration, as the most commonly used technique for myocardial motion tracking, is an ill-posed inverse problem which often requires prior assumptions on the solution space. In contrast to most existing approaches which impose explicit generic regularization such as smoothness, in this work we propose a novel method that can implicitly learn an application-specific biomechanics-informed prior and embed it into a neural network-parameterized transformation model. Particularly, the proposed method leverages a variational autoencoder-based generative model to learn a manifold for biomechanically plausible deformations. The motion tracking then can be performed via traversing the learnt manifold to search for the optimal transformations while considering the sequence information. The proposed method is validated on three public cardiac cine MRI datasets with comprehensive evaluations. The results demonstrate that the proposed method can outperform other approaches, yielding higher motion tracking accuracy with reasonable volume preservation and better generalizability to varying data distributions. It also enables better estimates of myocardial strains, which indicates the potential of the method in characterizing spatiotemporal signatures for understanding cardiovascular diseases.
abstract_zh: 心肌运动和变形是表征心脏功能的丰富描述符。图像配准作为心肌运动跟踪最常用的技术，是一个不适定的反问题，通常需要对解空间进行事先假设。与大多数现有的施加显式通用正则化（例如平滑度）的方法相比，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新方法，可以隐式学习特定于应用程序的生物力学先验并将其嵌入到神经网络参数化转换模型中。特别是，所提出的方法利用基于变分自动编码器的生成模型来学习生物力学上合理的变形的流形。然后可以通过遍历学习的流形来执行运动跟踪，以在考虑序列信息的同时搜索最佳变换。所提出的方法在三个公共心脏电影 MRI 数据集上进行了验证并进行了综合评估。结果表明，所提出的方法可以优于其他方法，产生更高的运动跟踪精度、合理的体积保留以及对不同数据分布的更好的泛化性。它还可以更好地估计心肌应变，这表明该方法在表征时空特征以了解心血管疾病方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成模型与生物力学先验知识的心肌运动追踪方法，通过变分自编码器学习可变形流形并实现序列化运动追踪。
AI.motivation: 传统图像配准方法依赖通用正则化假设，难以准确捕捉心肌复杂变形特性，需引入生物力学先验知识提升追踪精度与泛化能力。
AI.method: 构建变分自编码器生成生物力学合理变形流形，通过序列信息遍历流形搜索最优变换，将先验知识嵌入神经网络参数化变换模型。
AI.result: 在三个公开心脏MRI数据集上验证，相较其他方法实现更高运动追踪精度、合理体积保持及跨分布数据泛化能力，并提升心肌应变估计准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过生物力学先验约束有效表征心肌时空特征，为心血管疾病机制解析提供潜在工具，验证了生成模型在医学运动分析中的应用价值。

search_text: Generative Myocardial Motion Tracking via Latent Space Exploration with Biomechanics-informed Prior 通过生物力学先验的潜在空间探索生成心肌运动跟踪 Myocardial motion and deformation are rich descriptors that characterize cardiac function. Image registration, as the most commonly used technique for myocardial motion tracking, is an ill-posed inverse problem which often requires prior assumptions on the solution space. In contrast to most existing approaches which impose explicit generic regularization such as smoothness, in this work we propose a novel method that can implicitly learn an application-specific biomechanics-informed prior and embed it into a neural network-parameterized transformation model. Particularly, the proposed method leverages a variational autoencoder-based generative model to learn a manifold for biomechanically plausible deformations. The motion tracking then can be performed via traversing the learnt manifold to search for the optimal transformations while considering the sequence information. The proposed method is validated on three public cardiac cine MRI datasets with comprehensive evaluations. The results demonstrate that the proposed method can outperform other approaches, yielding higher motion tracking accuracy with reasonable volume preservation and better generalizability to varying data distributions. It also enables better estimates of myocardial strains, which indicates the potential of the method in characterizing spatiotemporal signatures for understanding cardiovascular diseases. 心肌运动和变形是表征心脏功能的丰富描述符。图像配准作为心肌运动跟踪最常用的技术，是一个不适定的反问题，通常需要对解空间进行事先假设。与大多数现有的施加显式通用正则化（例如平滑度）的方法相比，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新方法，可以隐式学习特定于应用程序的生物力学先验并将其嵌入到神经网络参数化转换模型中。特别是，所提出的方法利用基于变分自动编码器的生成模型来学习生物力学上合理的变形的流形。然后可以通过遍历学习的流形来执行运动跟踪，以在考虑序列信息的同时搜索最佳变换。所提出的方法在三个公共心脏电影 MRI 数据集上进行了验证并进行了综合评估。结果表明，所提出的方法可以优于其他方法，产生更高的运动跟踪精度、合理的体积保留以及对不同数据分布的更好的泛化性。它还可以更好地估计心肌应变，这表明该方法在表征时空特征以了解心血管疾病方面的潜力。 本文提出一种基于生成模型与生物力学先验知识的心肌运动追踪方法，通过变分自编码器学习可变形流形并实现序列化运动追踪。 Chen Qin,Shuo Wang,Chen Chen,Wenjia Bai,Daniel Rueckert eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Jiachun Pan,Pan Zhou,Shuicheng Yan
title: Towards Understanding Why Mask-Reconstruction Pretraining Helps in Downstream Tasks
title_zh: 理解为什么掩模重建预训练有助于下游任务
abstract: For unsupervised pretraining, mask-reconstruction pretraining (MRP) approaches, e.g. MAE and data2vec, randomly mask input patches and then reconstruct the pixels or semantic features of these masked patches via an auto-encoder. Then for a downstream task, supervised fine-tuning the pretrained encoder remarkably surpasses the conventional ``supervised learning'' (SL) trained from scratch. However, it is still unclear 1) how MRP performs semantic feature learning in the pretraining phase and 2) why it helps in downstream tasks. To solve these problems, we first theoretically show that on an auto-encoder of a two/one-layered convolution encoder/decoder, MRP can capture all discriminative features of each potential semantic class in the pretraining dataset. Then considering the fact that the pretraining dataset is of huge size and high diversity and thus covers most features in downstream dataset, in fine-tuning phase, the pretrained encoder can capture as much features as it can in downstream datasets, and would not lost these features with theoretical guarantees. In contrast, SL only randomly captures some features due to lottery ticket hypothesis. So MRP provably achieves better performance than SL on the classification tasks. Experimental results testify to our data assumptions and also our theoretical implications.
summary: For unsupervised pretraining, mask-reconstruction pretraining (MRP) approaches, e.g. MAE and data2vec, randomly mask input patches and then reconstruct the pixels or semantic features of these masked patches via an auto-encoder. Then for a downstream task, supervised fine-tuning the pretrained encoder remarkably surpasses the conventional ``supervised learning'' (SL) trained from scratch. However, it is still unclear 1) how MRP performs semantic feature learning in the pretraining phase and 2) why it helps in downstream tasks. To solve these problems, we first theoretically show that on an auto-encoder of a two/one-layered convolution encoder/decoder, MRP can capture all discriminative features of each potential semantic class in the pretraining dataset. Then considering the fact that the pretraining dataset is of huge size and high diversity and thus covers most features in downstream dataset, in fine-tuning phase, the pretrained encoder can capture as much features as it can in downstream datasets, and would not lost these features with theoretical guarantees. In contrast, SL only randomly captures some features due to lottery ticket hypothesis. So MRP provably achieves better performance than SL on the classification tasks. Experimental results testify to our data assumptions and also our theoretical implications.
abstract_zh: 对于无监督预训练，掩模重建预训练（MRP）方法，例如MAE 和 data2vec，随机屏蔽输入补丁，然后通过自动编码器重建这些屏蔽补丁的像素或语义特征。然后，对于下游任务，对预训练编码器的监督微调显着超过了从头开始训练的传统“监督学习”（SL）。然而，目前仍不清楚 1）MRP 如何在预训练阶段执行语义特征学习以及 2）为什么它有助于下游任务。为了解决这些问题，我们首先从理论上证明，在两层/一层卷积编码器/解码器的自动编码器上，MRP可以捕获预训练数据集中每个潜在语义类的所有判别特征。然后考虑到预训练数据集规模巨大、多样性高，覆盖了下游数据集中的大部分特征，在微调阶段，预训练编码器可以捕获尽可能多的下游数据集中的特征，并且在理论上保证不会丢失这些特征。相比之下，由于彩票假设，SL 仅随机捕获一些特征。因此，MRP 可以证明在分类任务上比 SL 取得了更好的性能。实验结果证明了我们的数据假设以及我们的理论意义。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过理论分析和实验验证，解释为何掩码重建预训练（MRP）方法在下游任务中表现优于传统监督学习（SL）。
AI.motivation: 尽管MRP方法（如MAE、data2vec）在下游任务中显著优于从头开始的监督学习，但其如何学习语义特征以及为何能提升下游任务性能的机制尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过理论分析证明，在两层或单层卷积编码器-解码器的自编码器中，MRP能够捕捉预训练数据集中每个潜在语义类别的所有判别特征；并结合下游任务数据集的多样性和规模，论证预训练编码器在微调阶段能保留这些特征，而SL因彩票假设仅随机捕捉部分特征。
AI.result: 实验验证了数据假设和理论推论，证明MRP在分类任务中确实优于SL。
AI.conclusion: MRP通过系统性特征学习和保留机制，在下游任务中优于SL，而SL的随机特征捕捉缺乏理论保证。

authors_text: Noam Korngut,Elad Rotman,Onur Afacan,Sila Kurugol,Yael Zaffrani-Reznikov,Shira Nemirovsky-Rotman,Simon Warfield,Moti Freiman
title: SUPER-IVIM-DC: Intra-voxel incoherent motion based Fetal lung maturity assessment from limited DWI data using supervised learning coupled with data-consistency
title_zh: SUPER-IVIM-DC：使用监督学习和数据一致性，根据有限的 DWI 数据进行基于体素内不相干运动的胎儿肺成熟度评估
comment: Accepted to the International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention - MICCAI 2022, to be held during Sept 18-22 in Singapore
comments: Accepted to the International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention - MICCAI 2022, to be held during Sept 18-22 in Singapore
abstract: Intra-voxel incoherent motion (IVIM) analysis of fetal lungs Diffusion-Weighted MRI (DWI) data shows potential in providing quantitative imaging bio-markers that reflect, indirectly, diffusion and pseudo-diffusion for non-invasive fetal lung maturation assessment. However, long acquisition times, due to the large number of different ``b-value'' images required for IVIM analysis, precluded clinical feasibility. We introduce SUPER-IVIM-DC a deep-neural-networks (DNN) approach which couples supervised loss with a data-consistency term to enable IVIM analysis of DWI data acquired with a limited number of b-values. We demonstrated the added-value of SUPER-IVIM-DC over both classical and recent DNN approaches for IVIM analysis through numerical simulations, healthy volunteer study, and IVIM analysis of fetal lung maturation from fetal DWI data. Our numerical simulations and healthy volunteer study show that SUPER-IVIM-DC estimates of the IVIM model parameters from limited DWI data had lower normalized root mean-squared error compared to previous DNN-based approaches. Further, SUPER-IVIM-DC estimates of the pseudo-diffusion fraction parameter from limited DWI data of fetal lungs correlate better with gestational age compared to both to classical and DNN-based approaches (0.555 vs. 0.463 and 0.310). SUPER-IVIM-DC has the potential to reduce the long acquisition times associated with IVIM analysis of DWI data and to provide clinically feasible bio-markers for non-invasive fetal lung maturity assessment.
summary: Intra-voxel incoherent motion (IVIM) analysis of fetal lungs Diffusion-Weighted MRI (DWI) data shows potential in providing quantitative imaging bio-markers that reflect, indirectly, diffusion and pseudo-diffusion for non-invasive fetal lung maturation assessment. However, long acquisition times, due to the large number of different ``b-value'' images required for IVIM analysis, precluded clinical feasibility. We introduce SUPER-IVIM-DC a deep-neural-networks (DNN) approach which couples supervised loss with a data-consistency term to enable IVIM analysis of DWI data acquired with a limited number of b-values. We demonstrated the added-value of SUPER-IVIM-DC over both classical and recent DNN approaches for IVIM analysis through numerical simulations, healthy volunteer study, and IVIM analysis of fetal lung maturation from fetal DWI data. Our numerical simulations and healthy volunteer study show that SUPER-IVIM-DC estimates of the IVIM model parameters from limited DWI data had lower normalized root mean-squared error compared to previous DNN-based approaches. Further, SUPER-IVIM-DC estimates of the pseudo-diffusion fraction parameter from limited DWI data of fetal lungs correlate better with gestational age compared to both to classical and DNN-based approaches (0.555 vs. 0.463 and 0.310). SUPER-IVIM-DC has the potential to reduce the long acquisition times associated with IVIM analysis of DWI data and to provide clinically feasible bio-markers for non-invasive fetal lung maturity assessment.
abstract_zh: 胎肺的体素内不相干运动 (IVIM) 分析弥散加权 MRI (DWI) 数据显示出在提供定量成像生物标志物方面的潜力，这些生物标志物间接反映弥散和伪弥散，用于非侵入性胎儿肺成熟度评估。然而，由于 IVIM 分析需要大量不同的“b 值”图像，采集时间长，排除了临床可行性。我们引入了 SUPER-IVIM-DC 一种深度神经网络 (DNN) 方法，它将监督损失与数据一致性项相结合，从而能够对使用有限数量的 b 值获取的 DWI 数据进行 IVIM 分析。我们通过数值模拟、健康志愿者研究以及根据胎儿 DWI 数据对胎儿肺成熟度进行 IVIM 分析，证明了 SUPER-IVIM-DC 相对于经典和最新 DNN 方法进行 IVIM 分析的附加值。我们的数值模拟和健康志愿者研究表明，与之前基于 DNN 的方法相比，根据有限 DWI 数据对 IVIM 模型参数进行 SUPER-IVIM-DC 估计的归一化均方根误差较低。此外，与经典方法和基于 DNN 的方法相比，SUPER-IVIM-DC 根据胎儿肺部有限的 DWI 数据估计的伪扩散分数参数与胎龄的相关性更好（0.555 vs. 0.463 和 0.310）。 SUPER-IVIM-DC 有潜力减少与 DWI 数据 IVIM 分析相关的较长采集时间，并为无创胎肺成熟度评估提供临床上可行的生物标志物。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SUPER-IVIM-DC方法，通过结合监督学习与数据一致性项，利用有限的DWI数据进行胎儿肺部IVIM分析，以非侵入性评估胎儿肺成熟度。
AI.motivation: 传统IVIM分析需大量不同b值图像，导致采集时间过长，临床不可行。需开发能在有限DWI数据下准确评估胎儿肺成熟度的方法。
AI.method: 设计深度神经网络（SUPER-IVIM-DC），结合监督损失函数与数据一致性约束，从有限b值DWI数据中估计IVIM参数。
AI.result: 数值模拟和健康志愿者实验显示，SUPER-IVIM-DC的IVIM参数估计误差更低，且胎儿肺部伪扩散分数与胎龄相关性更强（0.555 vs. 0.463和0.310）。
AI.conclusion: SUPER-IVIM-DC可减少IVIM分析的采集时间，为非侵入性胎儿肺成熟度评估提供临床可行的生物标志物。

search_text: SUPER-IVIM-DC: Intra-voxel incoherent motion based Fetal lung maturity assessment from limited DWI data using supervised learning coupled with data-consistency SUPER-IVIM-DC：使用监督学习和数据一致性，根据有限的 DWI 数据进行基于体素内不相干运动的胎儿肺成熟度评估 Intra-voxel incoherent motion (IVIM) analysis of fetal lungs Diffusion-Weighted MRI (DWI) data shows potential in providing quantitative imaging bio-markers that reflect, indirectly, diffusion and pseudo-diffusion for non-invasive fetal lung maturation assessment. However, long acquisition times, due to the large number of different ``b-value'' images required for IVIM analysis, precluded clinical feasibility. We introduce SUPER-IVIM-DC a deep-neural-networks (DNN) approach which couples supervised loss with a data-consistency term to enable IVIM analysis of DWI data acquired with a limited number of b-values. We demonstrated the added-value of SUPER-IVIM-DC over both classical and recent DNN approaches for IVIM analysis through numerical simulations, healthy volunteer study, and IVIM analysis of fetal lung maturation from fetal DWI data. Our numerical simulations and healthy volunteer study show that SUPER-IVIM-DC estimates of the IVIM model parameters from limited DWI data had lower normalized root mean-squared error compared to previous DNN-based approaches. Further, SUPER-IVIM-DC estimates of the pseudo-diffusion fraction parameter from limited DWI data of fetal lungs correlate better with gestational age compared to both to classical and DNN-based approaches (0.555 vs. 0.463 and 0.310). SUPER-IVIM-DC has the potential to reduce the long acquisition times associated with IVIM analysis of DWI data and to provide clinically feasible bio-markers for non-invasive fetal lung maturity assessment. 胎肺的体素内不相干运动 (IVIM) 分析弥散加权 MRI (DWI) 数据显示出在提供定量成像生物标志物方面的潜力，这些生物标志物间接反映弥散和伪弥散，用于非侵入性胎儿肺成熟度评估。然而，由于 IVIM 分析需要大量不同的“b 值”图像，采集时间长，排除了临床可行性。我们引入了 SUPER-IVIM-DC 一种深度神经网络 (DNN) 方法，它将监督损失与数据一致性项相结合，从而能够对使用有限数量的 b 值获取的 DWI 数据进行 IVIM 分析。我们通过数值模拟、健康志愿者研究以及根据胎儿 DWI 数据对胎儿肺成熟度进行 IVIM 分析，证明了 SUPER-IVIM-DC 相对于经典和最新 DNN 方法进行 IVIM 分析的附加值。我们的数值模拟和健康志愿者研究表明，与之前基于 DNN 的方法相比，根据有限 DWI 数据对 IVIM 模型参数进行 SUPER-IVIM-DC 估计的归一化均方根误差较低。此外，与经典方法和基于 DNN 的方法相比，SUPER-IVIM-DC 根据胎儿肺部有限的 DWI 数据估计的伪扩散分数参数与胎龄的相关性更好（0.555 vs. 0.463 和 0.310）。 SUPER-IVIM-DC 有潜力减少与 DWI 数据 IVIM 分析相关的较长采集时间，并为无创胎肺成熟度评估提供临床上可行的生物标志物。 本文提出SUPER-IVIM-DC方法，通过结合监督学习与数据一致性项，利用有限的DWI数据进行胎儿肺部IVIM分析，以非侵入性评估胎儿肺成熟度。 Noam Korngut,Elad Rotman,Onur Afacan,Sila Kurugol,Yael Zaffrani-Reznikov,Shira Nemirovsky-Rotman,Simon Warfield,Moti Freiman cs.CV,cs.AI,eess.IV,physics.med-ph

authors_text: Quan Quan,Kai-Yuan Cai,Chenyu Wang
title: Control with Patterns: A D-learning Method
title_zh: 用模式进行控制：D 学习方法
comment: Accepted for publication at 8th Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL), Munich, Germany. 2024
comments: Accepted for publication at 8th Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL), Munich, Germany. 2024
abstract: Learning-based control policies are widely used in various tasks in the field of robotics and control. However, formal (Lyapunov) stability guarantees for learning-based controllers with nonlinear dynamical systems are difficult to obtain. We propose a novel control approach, namely Control with Patterns (CWP), to address the stability issue over data sets corresponding to nonlinear dynamical systems. For such data sets, we introduce a new definition, namely exponential attraction on data sets, to describe the nonlinear dynamical systems under consideration. The problem of exponential attraction on data sets is transformed into a problem of pattern classification one based on the data sets and parameterized Lyapunov functions. Furthermore, D-learning is proposed as a method to perform CWP without knowledge of the system dynamics. Finally, the effectiveness of CWP based on D-learning is demonstrated through simulations and real flight experiments. In these experiments, the position of the multicopter is stabilized using real-time images as feedback, which can be considered as an Image-Based Visual Servoing (IBVS) problem.
summary: Learning-based control policies are widely used in various tasks in the field of robotics and control. However, formal (Lyapunov) stability guarantees for learning-based controllers with nonlinear dynamical systems are difficult to obtain. We propose a novel control approach, namely Control with Patterns (CWP), to address the stability issue over data sets corresponding to nonlinear dynamical systems. For such data sets, we introduce a new definition, namely exponential attraction on data sets, to describe the nonlinear dynamical systems under consideration. The problem of exponential attraction on data sets is transformed into a problem of pattern classification one based on the data sets and parameterized Lyapunov functions. Furthermore, D-learning is proposed as a method to perform CWP without knowledge of the system dynamics. Finally, the effectiveness of CWP based on D-learning is demonstrated through simulations and real flight experiments. In these experiments, the position of the multicopter is stabilized using real-time images as feedback, which can be considered as an Image-Based Visual Servoing (IBVS) problem.
abstract_zh: 基于学习的控制策略广泛应用于机器人和控制领域的各种任务中。然而，具有非线性动力系统的基于学习的控制器的形式（李亚普诺夫）稳定性保证很难获得。我们提出了一种新颖的控制方法，即模式控制（CWP），来解决与非线性动力系统相对应的数据集的稳定性问题。对于此类数据集，我们引入了一个新的定义，即数据集上的指数吸引力，来描述所考虑的非线性动力系统。数据集上的指数吸引力问题转化为基于数据集和参数化Lyapunov函数的模式分类问题。此外，D-学习被提出作为一种在不了解系统动力学的情况下执行 CWP 的方法。最后，通过仿真和真实飞行实验证明了基于D-learning的CWP的有效性。在这些实验中，使用实时图像作为反馈来稳定多旋翼飞行器的位置，这可以被视为基于图像的视觉伺服（IBVS）问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数据驱动的控制方法Control with Patterns (CWP)，通过D-learning解决非线性动态系统中学习型控制器的稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的控制策略在处理非线性动态系统时难以获得形式化的Lyapunov稳定性保证，限制了其在关键任务中的应用。
AI.method: 引入数据集上的指数吸引性定义，将稳定性问题转化为参数化Lyapunov函数的模式分类问题，并提出无需系统动态模型的D-learning方法实现CWP。
AI.result: 通过仿真和实际飞行实验验证了基于D-learning的CWP方法有效性，实现了多旋翼无人机基于实时图像反馈的位置稳定控制（IBVS）。
AI.conclusion: CWP方法为非线性系统提供了数据驱动的稳定性保障，在视觉伺服等实际控制任务中展现出良好性能。

authors_text: Qiuli Wang,Xin Tan,Chen Liu
title: Dual Windows Are Significant: Learning from Mediastinal Window and Focusing on Lung Window
title_zh: 双窗意义重大：向纵隔窗学习，聚焦肺窗
abstract: Since the pandemic of COVID-19, several deep learning methods were proposed to analyze the chest Computed Tomography (CT) for diagnosis. In the current situation, the disease course classification is significant for medical personnel to decide the treatment. Most previous deep-learning-based methods extract features observed from the lung window. However, it has been proved that some appearances related to diagnosis can be observed better from the mediastinal window rather than the lung window, e.g., the pulmonary consolidation happens more in severe symptoms. In this paper, we propose a novel Dual Window RCNN Network (DWRNet), which mainly learns the distinctive features from the successive mediastinal window. Regarding the features extracted from the lung window, we introduce the Lung Window Attention Block (LWA Block) to pay additional attention to them for enhancing the mediastinal-window features. Moreover, instead of picking up specific slices from the whole CT slices, we use a Recurrent CNN and analyze successive slices as videos. Experimental results show that the fused and representative features improve the predictions of disease course by reaching the accuracy of 90.57%, against the baseline with an accuracy of 84.86%. Ablation studies demonstrate that combined dual window features are more efficient than lung-window features alone, while paying attention to lung-window features can improve the model's stability.
summary: Since the pandemic of COVID-19, several deep learning methods were proposed to analyze the chest Computed Tomography (CT) for diagnosis. In the current situation, the disease course classification is significant for medical personnel to decide the treatment. Most previous deep-learning-based methods extract features observed from the lung window. However, it has been proved that some appearances related to diagnosis can be observed better from the mediastinal window rather than the lung window, e.g., the pulmonary consolidation happens more in severe symptoms. In this paper, we propose a novel Dual Window RCNN Network (DWRNet), which mainly learns the distinctive features from the successive mediastinal window. Regarding the features extracted from the lung window, we introduce the Lung Window Attention Block (LWA Block) to pay additional attention to them for enhancing the mediastinal-window features. Moreover, instead of picking up specific slices from the whole CT slices, we use a Recurrent CNN and analyze successive slices as videos. Experimental results show that the fused and representative features improve the predictions of disease course by reaching the accuracy of 90.57%, against the baseline with an accuracy of 84.86%. Ablation studies demonstrate that combined dual window features are more efficient than lung-window features alone, while paying attention to lung-window features can improve the model's stability.
abstract_zh: 自 COVID-19 大流行以来，提出了几种深度学习方法来分析胸部计算机断层扫描（CT）以进行诊断。目前来看，病程分类对于医务人员决定治疗方案具有重要意义。先前大多数基于深度学习的方法提取从肺窗观察到的特征。但事实证明，某些与诊断相关的表现从纵隔窗比肺窗更能观察到，例如症状严重时更容易出现肺实变。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的双窗口 RCNN 网络（DWRNet），它主要从连续的纵隔窗口中学习独特的特征。对于从肺窗提取的特征，我们引入了肺窗注意块（LWA Block）来额外关注它们，以增强纵隔窗特征。此外，我们不是从整个 CT 切片中选取特定切片，而是使用循环 CNN 并将连续切片分析为视频。实验结果表明，融合的代表性特征提高了病程预测的准确率，达到 90.57%，而基线的准确率达到 84.86%。消融研究表明，组合的双窗口特征比单独的肺窗特征更有效，同时关注肺窗特征可以提高模型的稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DWRNet的双窗口RCNN网络，通过结合纵隔窗和肺窗特征来提高新冠肺炎患者疾病分期的预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法仅关注肺窗特征，但纵隔窗能更清晰显示如肺实变等与病情严重程度相关的特征，单独使用肺窗可能影响诊断效果。
AI.method: 设计双窗口特征融合框架，引入肺窗注意力模块（LWA Block）增强纵隔窗特征，并采用循环CNN将连续CT切片作为视频序列分析。
AI.result: 在测试数据集上达到90.57%的预测准确率（基线为84.86%），消融实验证实双窗口特征融合比单一肺窗特征更有效，且肺窗特征注意力机制提升了模型稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 结合双窗口特征并引入注意力机制能显著提升疾病分期预测性能，为新冠肺炎CT影像分析提供了新方法。

ai_content_json.method: 设计双窗口特征融合框架，引入肺窗注意力模块（LWA Block）增强纵隔窗特征，并采用循环CNN将连续CT切片作为视频序列分析。
ai_content_json.result: 在测试数据集上达到90.57%的预测准确率（基线为84.86%），消融实验证实双窗口特征融合比单一肺窗特征更有效，且肺窗特征注意力机制提升了模型稳定性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 结合双窗口特征并引入注意力机制能显著提升疾病分期预测性能，为新冠肺炎CT影像分析提供了新方法。

method: 设计双窗口特征融合框架，引入肺窗注意力模块（LWA Block）增强纵隔窗特征，并采用循环CNN将连续CT切片作为视频序列分析。
result: 在测试数据集上达到90.57%的预测准确率（基线为84.86%），消融实验证实双窗口特征融合比单一肺窗特征更有效，且肺窗特征注意力机制提升了模型稳定性。
conclusion: 结合双窗口特征并引入注意力机制能显著提升疾病分期预测性能，为新冠肺炎CT影像分析提供了新方法。
search_text: Dual Windows Are Significant: Learning from Mediastinal Window and Focusing on Lung Window 双窗意义重大：向纵隔窗学习，聚焦肺窗 Since the pandemic of COVID-19, several deep learning methods were proposed to analyze the chest Computed Tomography (CT) for diagnosis. In the current situation, the disease course classification is significant for medical personnel to decide the treatment. Most previous deep-learning-based methods extract features observed from the lung window. However, it has been proved that some appearances related to diagnosis can be observed better from the mediastinal window rather than the lung window, e.g., the pulmonary consolidation happens more in severe symptoms. In this paper, we propose a novel Dual Window RCNN Network (DWRNet), which mainly learns the distinctive features from the successive mediastinal window. Regarding the features extracted from the lung window, we introduce the Lung Window Attention Block (LWA Block) to pay additional attention to them for enhancing the mediastinal-window features. Moreover, instead of picking up specific slices from the whole CT slices, we use a Recurrent CNN and analyze successive slices as videos. Experimental results show that the fused and representative features improve the predictions of disease course by reaching the accuracy of 90.57%, against the baseline with an accuracy of 84.86%. Ablation studies demonstrate that combined dual window features are more efficient than lung-window features alone, while paying attention to lung-window features can improve the model's stability. 自 COVID-19 大流行以来，提出了几种深度学习方法来分析胸部计算机断层扫描（CT）以进行诊断。目前来看，病程分类对于医务人员决定治疗方案具有重要意义。先前大多数基于深度学习的方法提取从肺窗观察到的特征。但事实证明，某些与诊断相关的表现从纵隔窗比肺窗更能观察到，例如症状严重时更容易出现肺实变。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的双窗口 RCNN 网络（DWRNet），它主要从连续的纵隔窗口中学习独特的特征。对于从肺窗提取的特征，我们引入了肺窗注意块（LWA Block）来额外关注它们，以增强纵隔窗特征。此外，我们不是从整个 CT 切片中选取特定切片，而是使用循环 CNN 并将连续切片分析为视频。实验结果表明，融合的代表性特征提高了病程预测的准确率，达到 90.57%，而基线的准确率达到 84.86%。消融研究表明，组合的双窗口特征比单独的肺窗特征更有效，同时关注肺窗特征可以提高模型的稳定性。 本文提出了一种名为DWRNet的双窗口RCNN网络，通过结合纵隔窗和肺窗特征来提高新冠肺炎患者疾病分期的预测准确性。 Qiuli Wang,Xin Tan,Chen Liu eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Kieran Saunders,George Vogiatzis,Luis J. Manso
title: Dyna-DM: Dynamic Object-aware Self-supervised Monocular Depth Maps
title_zh: Dyna-DM：动态对象感知自监督单目深度图
abstract: Self-supervised monocular depth estimation has been a subject of intense study in recent years, because of its applications in robotics and autonomous driving. Much of the recent work focuses on improving depth estimation by increasing architecture complexity. This paper shows that state-of-the-art performance can also be achieved by improving the learning process rather than increasing model complexity. More specifically, we propose (i) disregarding small potentially dynamic objects when training, and (ii) employing an appearance-based approach to separately estimate object pose for truly dynamic objects. We demonstrate that these simplifications reduce GPU memory usage by 29% and result in qualitatively and quantitatively improved depth maps. The code is available at https://github.com/kieran514/Dyna-DM.
summary: Self-supervised monocular depth estimation has been a subject of intense study in recent years, because of its applications in robotics and autonomous driving. Much of the recent work focuses on improving depth estimation by increasing architecture complexity. This paper shows that state-of-the-art performance can also be achieved by improving the learning process rather than increasing model complexity. More specifically, we propose (i) disregarding small potentially dynamic objects when training, and (ii) employing an appearance-based approach to separately estimate object pose for truly dynamic objects. We demonstrate that these simplifications reduce GPU memory usage by 29% and result in qualitatively and quantitatively improved depth maps. The code is available at https://github.com/kieran514/Dyna-DM.
abstract_zh: 近年来，自监督单目深度估计因其在机器人和自动驾驶方面的应用而成为热门研究课题。最近的大部分工作都集中在通过增加架构复杂性来改进深度估计。本文表明，通过改进学习过程而不是增加模型复杂性也可以实现最先进的性能。更具体地说，我们建议（i）在训练时忽略小的潜在动态物体，以及（ii）采用基于外观的方法来单独估计真正动态物体的物体姿态。我们证明，这些简化可将 GPU 内存使用量减少 29%，并在质量和数量上改进深度图。该代码可从 https://github.com/kieran514/Dyna-DM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态物体感知的自监督单目深度估计方法Dyna-DM，通过优化学习过程而非增加模型复杂度来提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多依赖增加模型复杂度提升深度估计性能，但本文认为改进学习过程同样有效，且能减少资源消耗。
AI.method: 提出两方面改进：1）训练时忽略小尺寸动态物体；2）采用基于外观的方法独立估计动态物体位姿。
AI.result: 在保持性能的同时减少GPU内存占用29%，并在定性和定量指标上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化学习策略而非模型结构，Dyna-DM实现了更高效的深度估计，为资源受限场景提供新思路。

authors_text: Tae Ha Park,Simone D'Amico
title: Adaptive Neural Network-based Unscented Kalman Filter for Robust Pose Tracking of Noncooperative Spacecraft
title_zh: 基于自适应神经网络的无迹卡尔曼滤波器用于非合作航天器的鲁棒姿态跟踪
comment: Accepted to AIAA Journal of Guidance, Control, and Dynamics. Updated derivation of Section IV.B and experiments
comments: Accepted to AIAA Journal of Guidance, Control, and Dynamics. Updated derivation of Section IV.B and experiments
abstract: This paper presents a neural network-based Unscented Kalman Filter (UKF) to estimate and track the pose (i.e., position and orientation) of a known, noncooperative, tumbling target spacecraft in a close-proximity rendezvous scenario. The UKF estimates the target's orbit and attitude relative to the servicer based on the pose information provided by a multi-task Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) from incoming monocular images of the target. In order to enable reliable tracking, the process noise covariance matrix of the UKF is tuned online using adaptive state noise compensation which leverages a newly developed closed-form process noise model for relative attitude dynamics. This paper also introduces the Satellite Hardware-In-the-loop Rendezvous Trajectories (SHIRT) dataset to enable comprehensive analyses of the performance and robustness of the proposed pipeline. SHIRT comprises the labeled images of two representative rendezvous trajectories in low Earth orbit created using both a graphics renderer and a robotic testbed. Specifically, the CNN is solely trained on synthetic data, whereas functionality and performance of the complete navigation pipeline are evaluated on real images from the robotic testbed. The proposed UKF is evaluated on SHIRT and is shown to have sub-decimeter-level position and degree-level orientation errors at steady-state.
summary: This paper presents a neural network-based Unscented Kalman Filter (UKF) to estimate and track the pose (i.e., position and orientation) of a known, noncooperative, tumbling target spacecraft in a close-proximity rendezvous scenario. The UKF estimates the target's orbit and attitude relative to the servicer based on the pose information provided by a multi-task Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) from incoming monocular images of the target. In order to enable reliable tracking, the process noise covariance matrix of the UKF is tuned online using adaptive state noise compensation which leverages a newly developed closed-form process noise model for relative attitude dynamics. This paper also introduces the Satellite Hardware-In-the-loop Rendezvous Trajectories (SHIRT) dataset to enable comprehensive analyses of the performance and robustness of the proposed pipeline. SHIRT comprises the labeled images of two representative rendezvous trajectories in low Earth orbit created using both a graphics renderer and a robotic testbed. Specifically, the CNN is solely trained on synthetic data, whereas functionality and performance of the complete navigation pipeline are evaluated on real images from the robotic testbed. The proposed UKF is evaluated on SHIRT and is shown to have sub-decimeter-level position and degree-level orientation errors at steady-state.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的无迹卡尔曼滤波器（UKF），用于估计和跟踪近距离交会场景中已知的非合作翻滚目标航天器的姿态（即位置和方向）。 UKF 根据多任务卷积神经网络 (CNN) 从传入的目标单眼图像中提供的位姿信息来估计目标相对于服务者的轨道和姿态。为了实现可靠的跟踪，UKF 的过程噪声协方差矩阵使用自适应状态噪声补偿进行在线调整，该补偿利用新开发的封闭式过程噪声模型来实现相对姿态动态。本文还介绍了卫星硬件在环交会轨迹（SHIRT）数据集，以便对所提出的管道的性能和鲁棒性进行全面分析。 SHIRT 包含使用图形渲染器和机器人测试台创建的近地轨道上两个代表性交会轨迹的标记图像。具体来说，CNN 仅接受合成数据的训练，而完整导航管道的功能和性能则根据机器人测试台的真实图像进行评估。所提出的 UKF 在 SHIRT 上进行了评估，结果显示在稳态下具有亚分米级位置和度级定向误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的无迹卡尔曼滤波器（UKF），用于在近距离交会场景中对非合作航天器的姿态进行鲁棒跟踪。
AI.motivation: 非合作航天器的姿态跟踪面临目标翻滚、传感器噪声大等挑战，传统方法难以满足高精度和鲁棒性需求。
AI.method: 结合多任务卷积神经网络（CNN）从单目图像中估计目标姿态，并通过自适应状态噪声补偿在线调整UKF的过程噪声协方差矩阵，同时引入SHIRT数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 在SHIRT数据集上测试表明，所提UKF在稳态下位置误差低于分米级，姿态误差低于度级。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过合成数据训练CNN与真实图像验证导航流程，有效提升了非合作航天器姿态跟踪的精度与鲁棒性。
