The proposed UKF is evaluated on SHIRT and is shown to have sub-decimeter-level position and degree-level orientation errors at steady-state. 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的无迹卡尔曼滤波器（UKF），用于估计和跟踪近距离交会场景中已知的非合作翻滚目标航天器的姿态（即位置和方向）。 UKF 根据多任务卷积神经网络 (CNN) 从传入的目标单眼图像中提供的位姿信息来估计目标相对于服务者的轨道和姿态。为了实现可靠的跟踪，UKF 的过程噪声协方差矩阵使用自适应状态噪声补偿进行在线调整，该补偿利用新开发的封闭式过程噪声模型来实现相对姿态动态。本文还介绍了卫星硬件在环交会轨迹（SHIRT）数据集，以便对所提出的管道的性能和鲁棒性进行全面分析。 SHIRT 包含使用图形渲染器和机器人测试台创建的近地轨道上两个代表性交会轨迹的标记图像。具体来说，CNN 仅接受合成数据的训练，而完整导航管道的功能和性能则根据机器人测试台的真实图像进行评估。所提出的 UKF 在 SHIRT 上进行了评估，结果显示在稳态下具有亚分米级位置和度级定向误差。 本文提出一种基于神经网络的无迹卡尔曼滤波器（UKF），用于在近距离交会场景中对非合作航天器的姿态进行鲁棒跟踪。 Tae Ha Park,Simone D'Amico cs.RO,eess.SP

authors_text: Zihan Ding,Tianrui Hui,Junshi Huang,Xiaoming Wei,Jizhong Han,Si Liu
title: Language-Bridged Spatial-Temporal Interaction for Referring Video Object Segmentation
title_zh: 用于参考视频对象分割的语言桥时空交互
abstract: Referring video object segmentation aims to predict foreground labels for objects referred by natural language expressions in videos. Previous methods either depend on 3D ConvNets or incorporate additional 2D ConvNets as encoders to extract mixed spatial-temporal features. However, these methods suffer from spatial misalignment or false distractors due to delayed and implicit spatial-temporal interaction occurring in the decoding phase. To tackle these limitations, we propose a Language-Bridged Duplex Transfer (LBDT) module which utilizes language as an intermediary bridge to accomplish explicit and adaptive spatial-temporal interaction earlier in the encoding phase. Concretely, cross-modal attention is performed among the temporal encoder, referring words and the spatial encoder to aggregate and transfer language-relevant motion and appearance information. In addition, we also propose a Bilateral Channel Activation (BCA) module in the decoding phase for further denoising and highlighting the spatial-temporal consistent features via channel-wise activation. Extensive experiments show our method achieves new state-of-the-art performances on four popular benchmarks with 6.8% and 6.9% absolute AP gains on A2D Sentences and J-HMDB Sentences respectively, while consuming around 7x less computational overhead.
summary: Referring video object segmentation aims to predict foreground labels for objects referred by natural language expressions in videos. Previous methods either depend on 3D ConvNets or incorporate additional 2D ConvNets as encoders to extract mixed spatial-temporal features. However, these methods suffer from spatial misalignment or false distractors due to delayed and implicit spatial-temporal interaction occurring in the decoding phase. To tackle these limitations, we propose a Language-Bridged Duplex Transfer (LBDT) module which utilizes language as an intermediary bridge to accomplish explicit and adaptive spatial-temporal interaction earlier in the encoding phase. Concretely, cross-modal attention is performed among the temporal encoder, referring words and the spatial encoder to aggregate and transfer language-relevant motion and appearance information. In addition, we also propose a Bilateral Channel Activation (BCA) module in the decoding phase for further denoising and highlighting the spatial-temporal consistent features via channel-wise activation. Extensive experiments show our method achieves new state-of-the-art performances on four popular benchmarks with 6.8% and 6.9% absolute AP gains on A2D Sentences and J-HMDB Sentences respectively, while consuming around 7x less computational overhead.
abstract_zh: 引用视频对象分割旨在预测视频中自然语言表达引用的对象的前景标签。以前的方法要么依赖于 3D ConvNet，要么结合额外的 2D ConvNet 作为编码器来提取混合的时空特征。然而，由于解码阶段发生的延迟和隐式时空交互，这些方法会遭受空间错位或错误干扰。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种语言桥接双工传输（LBDT）模块，该模块利用语言作为中介桥梁，在编码阶段的早期完成显式和自适应的时空交互。具体来说，在时间编码器、参考词和空间编码器之间执行跨模态注意力，以聚合和传输与语言相关的运动和外观信息。此外，我们还在解码阶段提出了双边通道激活（BCA）模块，用于通过通道激活进一步去噪并突出时空一致的特征。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在四个流行的基准测试中实现了新的最先进的性能，在 A2D 句子和 J-HMDB 句子上的绝对 AP 增益分别为 6.8% 和 6.9%，同时消耗的计算开销减少了约 7 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语言桥梁的时空交互方法，用于解决视频中自然语言指代对象分割问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在解码阶段进行时空交互时存在空间错位和错误干扰问题，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 提出Language-Bridged Duplex Transfer模块，利用语言作为中介在编码阶段实现跨模态注意力交互，并设计Bilateral Channel Activation模块进行解码阶段特征优化。
AI.result: 在A2D Sentences和J-HMDB Sentences基准测试中分别取得6.8%和6.9%的绝对AP提升，计算开销降低7倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过语言桥梁实现更早的时空交互与双模块设计，有效提升了视频指代表达分割的准确率和效率。

authors_text: Jakob Hollenstein,Sayantan Auddy,Matteo Saveriano,Erwan Renaudo,Justus Piater
title: Action Noise in Off-Policy Deep Reinforcement Learning: Impact on Exploration and Performance
title_zh: 离策略深度强化学习中的动作噪声：对探索和性能的影响
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (11/2022) https://openreview.net/forum?id=NljBlZ6hmG
comments: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (11/2022) https://openreview.net/forum?id=NljBlZ6hmG
abstract: Many Deep Reinforcement Learning (D-RL) algorithms rely on simple forms of exploration such as the additive action noise often used in continuous control domains. Typically, the scaling factor of this action noise is chosen as a hyper-parameter and is kept constant during training. In this paper, we focus on action noise in off-policy deep reinforcement learning for continuous control. We analyze how the learned policy is impacted by the noise type, noise scale, and impact scaling factor reduction schedule. We consider the two most prominent types of action noise, Gaussian and Ornstein-Uhlenbeck noise, and perform a vast experimental campaign by systematically varying the noise type and scale parameter, and by measuring variables of interest like the expected return of the policy and the state-space coverage during exploration. For the latter, we propose a novel state-space coverage measure $\operatorname{X}_{\mathcal{U}\text{rel}}$ that is more robust to estimation artifacts caused by points close to the state-space boundary than previously-proposed measures. Larger noise scales generally increase state-space coverage. However, we found that increasing the space coverage using a larger noise scale is often not beneficial. On the contrary, reducing the noise scale over the training process reduces the variance and generally improves the learning performance. We conclude that the best noise type and scale are environment dependent, and based on our observations derive heuristic rules for guiding the choice of the action noise as a starting point for further optimization.
summary: Many Deep Reinforcement Learning (D-RL) algorithms rely on simple forms of exploration such as the additive action noise often used in continuous control domains. Typically, the scaling factor of this action noise is chosen as a hyper-parameter and is kept constant during training. In this paper, we focus on action noise in off-policy deep reinforcement learning for continuous control. We analyze how the learned policy is impacted by the noise type, noise scale, and impact scaling factor reduction schedule. We consider the two most prominent types of action noise, Gaussian and Ornstein-Uhlenbeck noise, and perform a vast experimental campaign by systematically varying the noise type and scale parameter, and by measuring variables of interest like the expected return of the policy and the state-space coverage during exploration. For the latter, we propose a novel state-space coverage measure $\operatorname{X}_{\mathcal{U}\text{rel}}$ that is more robust to estimation artifacts caused by points close to the state-space boundary than previously-proposed measures. Larger noise scales generally increase state-space coverage. However, we found that increasing the space coverage using a larger noise scale is often not beneficial. On the contrary, reducing the noise scale over the training process reduces the variance and generally improves the learning performance. We conclude that the best noise type and scale are environment dependent, and based on our observations derive heuristic rules for guiding the choice of the action noise as a starting point for further optimization.
abstract_zh: 许多深度强化学习 (D-RL) 算法依赖于简单形式的探索，例如连续控制域中经常使用的加性动作噪声。通常，选择该动作噪声的比例因子作为超参数，并在训练期间保持恒定。在本文中，我们重点研究用于连续控制的离策略深度强化学习中的动作噪声。我们分析学习的策略如何受到噪声类型、噪声规模和影响比例因子降低计划的影响。我们考虑了两种最突出的动作噪声类型，即高斯噪声和奥恩斯坦-乌伦贝克噪声，并通过系统地改变噪声类型和尺度参数，并通过测量感兴趣的变量（例如策略的预期回报和探索过程中的状态空间覆盖范围）来进行大量的实验活动。对于后者，我们提出了一种新颖的状态空间覆盖度量 $\operatorname{X}_{\mathcal{U}\text{rel}}$ ，它比之前提出的度量更能鲁棒地估计由接近状态空间边界的点引起的伪影。较大的噪声尺度通常会增加状态空间覆盖范围。然而，我们发现使用较大的噪声尺度来增加空间覆盖范围通常是没有好处的。相反，减少训练过程中的噪声规模会减少方差，通常会提高学习性能。我们得出的结论是，最佳噪声类型和规模取决于环境，并且根据我们的观察得出启发式规则，用于指导选择动作噪声作为进一步优化的起点。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了离线策略深度强化学习中动作噪声对探索和性能的影响，分析了噪声类型、噪声尺度及衰减策略对策略学习的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习算法通常使用固定尺度的动作噪声进行探索，但噪声参数的选择对性能影响显著，需系统研究其优化方法。
AI.method: 对比高斯噪声和奥恩斯坦-乌伦贝克噪声，通过系统实验调整噪声尺度和衰减策略，提出新的状态空间覆盖率指标X_Urel以评估探索效果。
AI.result: 较大噪声尺度提升状态覆盖率但未必改善性能，训练过程中逐步减小噪声尺度能降低方差并提升学习效果，最佳噪声参数依赖具体环境。
AI.conclusion: 动作噪声类型和尺度应根据环境特性选择，实验得出的启发式规则可为参数优化提供初始指导。

Larger noise scales generally increase state-space coverage. However, we found that increasing the space coverage using a larger noise scale is often not beneficial. On the contrary, reducing the noise scale over the training process reduces the variance and generally improves the learning performance. We conclude that the best noise type and scale are environment dependent, and based on our observations derive heuristic rules for guiding the choice of the action noise as a starting point for further optimization. 许多深度强化学习 (D-RL) 算法依赖于简单形式的探索，例如连续控制域中经常使用的加性动作噪声。通常，选择该动作噪声的比例因子作为超参数，并在训练期间保持恒定。在本文中，我们重点研究用于连续控制的离策略深度强化学习中的动作噪声。我们分析学习的策略如何受到噪声类型、噪声规模和影响比例因子降低计划的影响。我们考虑了两种最突出的动作噪声类型，即高斯噪声和奥恩斯坦-乌伦贝克噪声，并通过系统地改变噪声类型和尺度参数，并通过测量感兴趣的变量（例如策略的预期回报和探索过程中的状态空间覆盖范围）来进行大量的实验活动。对于后者，我们提出了一种新颖的状态空间覆盖度量 $\operatorname{X}_{\mathcal{U}\text{rel}}$ ，它比之前提出的度量更能鲁棒地估计由接近状态空间边界的点引起的伪影。较大的噪声尺度通常会增加状态空间覆盖范围。然而，我们发现使用较大的噪声尺度来增加空间覆盖范围通常是没有好处的。相反，减少训练过程中的噪声规模会减少方差，通常会提高学习性能。我们得出的结论是，最佳噪声类型和规模取决于环境，并且根据我们的观察得出启发式规则，用于指导选择动作噪声作为进一步优化的起点。 本文研究了离线策略深度强化学习中动作噪声对探索和性能的影响，分析了噪声类型、噪声尺度及衰减策略对策略学习的影响。 Jakob Hollenstein,Sayantan Auddy,Matteo Saveriano,Erwan Renaudo,Justus Piater cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Hoàng-Ân Lê,Florent Guiotte,Minh-Tan Pham,Sébastien Lefèvre,Thomas Corpetti
title: Learning Digital Terrain Models from Point Clouds: ALS2DTM Dataset and Rasterization-based GAN
title_zh: 从点云学习数字地形模型：ALS2DTM 数据集和基于光栅化的 GAN
abstract: Despite the popularity of deep neural networks in various domains, the extraction of digital terrain models (DTMs) from airborne laser scanning (ALS) point clouds is still challenging. This might be due to the lack of dedicated large-scale annotated dataset and the data-structure discrepancy between point clouds and DTMs. To promote data-driven DTM extraction, this paper collects from open sources a large-scale dataset of ALS point clouds and corresponding DTMs with various urban, forested, and mountainous scenes. A baseline method is proposed as the first attempt to train a Deep neural network to extract digital Terrain models directly from ALS point clouds via Rasterization techniques, coined DeepTerRa. Extensive studies with well-established methods are performed to benchmark the dataset and analyze the challenges in learning to extract DTM from point clouds. The experimental results show the interest of the agnostic data-driven approach, with sub-metric error level compared to methods designed for DTM extraction. The data and source code is provided at https://lhoangan.github.io/deepterra/ for reproducibility and further similar research.
summary: Despite the popularity of deep neural networks in various domains, the extraction of digital terrain models (DTMs) from airborne laser scanning (ALS) point clouds is still challenging. This might be due to the lack of dedicated large-scale annotated dataset and the data-structure discrepancy between point clouds and DTMs. To promote data-driven DTM extraction, this paper collects from open sources a large-scale dataset of ALS point clouds and corresponding DTMs with various urban, forested, and mountainous scenes. A baseline method is proposed as the first attempt to train a Deep neural network to extract digital Terrain models directly from ALS point clouds via Rasterization techniques, coined DeepTerRa. Extensive studies with well-established methods are performed to benchmark the dataset and analyze the challenges in learning to extract DTM from point clouds. The experimental results show the interest of the agnostic data-driven approach, with sub-metric error level compared to methods designed for DTM extraction. The data and source code is provided at https://lhoangan.github.io/deepterra/ for reproducibility and further similar research.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络在各个领域都很流行，但从机载激光扫描（ALS）点云中提取数字地形模型（DTM）仍然具有挑战性。这可能是由于缺乏专用的大规模注释数据集以及点云和 DTM 之间的数据结构差异所致。为了促进数据驱动的 DTM 提取，本文从开源收集了大规模的 ALS 点云数据集以及各种城市、森林和山区场景的相应 DTM。提出了基线方法，作为训练深度神经网络通过光栅化技术直接从 ALS 点云中提取数字地形模型的首次尝试，创造了 DeepTerRa。使用成熟的方法进行了广泛的研究来对数据集进行基准测试并分析学习从点云中提取 DTM 的挑战。实验结果显示了不可知数据驱动方法的兴趣，与为 DTM 提取设计的方法相比，其误差水平低于度量标准。 https://lhoangan.github.io/deepterra/ 提供了数据和源代码，以实现可重复性和进一步的类似研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于栅格化的生成对抗网络（GAN）方法DeepTerRa，直接从机载激光扫描（ALS）点云中学习数字高程模型（DTM），并构建了包含多种场景的ALS2DTM数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有DTM提取方法面临大规模标注数据不足及点云与DTM数据结构差异的挑战，需探索数据驱动的解决方案以提升自动化水平。
AI.method: 通过栅格化技术将ALS点云转换为规则网格，设计基于GAN的DeepTerRa模型直接生成DTM，并构建包含城市、森林和山地场景的大型标注数据集进行训练与验证。
AI.result: 实验表明DeepTerRa在亚米级误差范围内表现优于传统方法，数据集和代码已开源，为后续研究提供基准。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动方法有效缓解了DTM提取难题，开源数据集与模型为相关研究提供了重要基础。

authors_text: Mohammad Altillawi
title: PixSelect: Less but Reliable Pixels for Accurate and Efficient Localization
title_zh: PixSelect：更少但可靠的像素，实现准确高效的定位
comment: ef:IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), May 23-27, 2022. Philadelphia, PA, USA, p 4156-4162
comments: ef:IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), May 23-27, 2022. Philadelphia, PA, USA, p 4156-4162
abstract: Accurate camera pose estimation is a fundamental requirement for numerous applications, such as autonomous driving, mobile robotics, and augmented reality. In this work, we address the problem of estimating the global 6 DoF camera pose from a single RGB image in a given environment. Previous works consider every part of the image valuable for localization. However, many image regions such as the sky, occlusions, and repetitive non-distinguishable patterns cannot be utilized for localization. In addition to adding unnecessary computation efforts, extracting and matching features from such regions produce many wrong matches which in turn degrades the localization accuracy and efficiency. Our work addresses this particular issue and shows by exploiting an interesting concept of sparse 3D models that we can exploit discriminatory environment parts and avoid useless image regions for the sake of a single image localization. Interestingly, through avoiding selecting keypoints from non-reliable image regions such as trees, bushes, cars, pedestrians, and occlusions, our work acts naturally as an outlier filter. This makes our system highly efficient in that minimal set of correspondences is needed and highly accurate as the number of outliers is low. Our work exceeds state-ofthe-art methods on outdoor Cambridge Landmarks dataset. With only relying on single image at inference, it outweighs in terms of accuracy methods that exploit pose priors and/or reference 3D models while being much faster. By choosing as little as 100 correspondences, it surpasses similar methods that localize from thousands of correspondences, while being more efficient. In particular, it achieves, compared to these methods, an improvement of localization by 33% on OldHospital scene. Furthermore, It outstands direct pose regressors even those that learn from sequence of images
summary: Accurate camera pose estimation is a fundamental requirement for numerous applications, such as autonomous driving, mobile robotics, and augmented reality. In this work, we address the problem of estimating the global 6 DoF camera pose from a single RGB image in a given environment. Previous works consider every part of the image valuable for localization. However, many image regions such as the sky, occlusions, and repetitive non-distinguishable patterns cannot be utilized for localization. In addition to adding unnecessary computation efforts, extracting and matching features from such regions produce many wrong matches which in turn degrades the localization accuracy and efficiency. Our work addresses this particular issue and shows by exploiting an interesting concept of sparse 3D models that we can exploit discriminatory environment parts and avoid useless image regions for the sake of a single image localization. Interestingly, through avoiding selecting keypoints from non-reliable image regions such as trees, bushes, cars, pedestrians, and occlusions, our work acts naturally as an outlier filter. This makes our system highly efficient in that minimal set of correspondences is needed and highly accurate as the number of outliers is low. Our work exceeds state-ofthe-art methods on outdoor Cambridge Landmarks dataset. With only relying on single image at inference, it outweighs in terms of accuracy methods that exploit pose priors and/or reference 3D models while being much faster. By choosing as little as 100 correspondences, it surpasses similar methods that localize from thousands of correspondences, while being more efficient. In particular, it achieves, compared to these methods, an improvement of localization by 33% on OldHospital scene. Furthermore, It outstands direct pose regressors even those that learn from sequence of images
abstract_zh: 准确的相机姿态估计是自动驾驶、移动机器人和增强现实等众多应用的基本要求。在这项工作中，我们解决了在给定环境中从单个 RGB 图像估计全局 6 DoF 相机位姿的问题。以前的作品考虑了图像的每个部分对于本地化有价值。然而，许多图像区域（例如天空、遮挡和重复的不可区分的图案）无法用于定位。除了增加不必要的计算工作之外，从这些区域提取和匹配特征还会产生许多错误的匹配，从而降低定位精度和效率。我们的工作解决了这个特定问题，并通过利用稀疏 3D 模型的有趣概念表明，我们可以利用有区别的环境部分并避免无用的图像区域以实现单个图像定位。有趣的是，通过避免从不可靠的图像区域（例如树木、灌木丛、汽车、行人和遮挡物）中选择关键点，我们的工作自然地充当了异常值过滤器。这使得我们的系统非常高效，因为需要最少的对应集，并且由于异常值的数量很少而非常准确。我们的工作超越了室外剑桥地标数据集上最先进的方法。由于在推理时仅依赖于单个图像，因此它在准确性方面胜过利用姿势先验和/或参考 3D 模型的方法，同时速度更快。通过选择少至 100 个对应关系，它超越了从数千个对应关系中进行定位的类似方法，同时效率更高。特别是，与这些方法相比，它在 OldHospital 场景中实现了 33% 的本地化改进。此外，它优于直接姿态回归器，甚至是那些从图像序列中学习的回归器

AI.tldr: 本文提出PixSelect方法，通过选择少量可靠像素实现高效准确的单目相机位姿估计。
AI.motivation: 传统方法利用全图特征导致计算冗余和错误匹配，而天空、遮挡等区域实际无助于定位且会降低精度。
AI.method: 基于稀疏3D模型筛选具有判别性的环境区域，自动过滤树木、行人等不可靠区域作为异常值过滤器。
AI.result: 在Cambridge Landmarks数据集上超越现有方法，OldHospital场景定位精度提升33%，仅需100对应点即可超越需数千对应点的同类方法。
AI.conclusion: PixSelect通过选择性利用可靠像素，在保证高精度的同时显著提升计算效率，优于依赖先验信息或序列图像的方法。

By choosing as little as 100 correspondences, it surpasses similar methods that localize from thousands of correspondences, while being more efficient. In particular, it achieves, compared to these methods, an improvement of localization by 33% on OldHospital scene. Furthermore, It outstands direct pose regressors even those that learn from sequence of images 准确的相机姿态估计是自动驾驶、移动机器人和增强现实等众多应用的基本要求。在这项工作中，我们解决了在给定环境中从单个 RGB 图像估计全局 6 DoF 相机位姿的问题。以前的作品考虑了图像的每个部分对于本地化有价值。然而，许多图像区域（例如天空、遮挡和重复的不可区分的图案）无法用于定位。除了增加不必要的计算工作之外，从这些区域提取和匹配特征还会产生许多错误的匹配，从而降低定位精度和效率。我们的工作解决了这个特定问题，并通过利用稀疏 3D 模型的有趣概念表明，我们可以利用有区别的环境部分并避免无用的图像区域以实现单个图像定位。有趣的是，通过避免从不可靠的图像区域（例如树木、灌木丛、汽车、行人和遮挡物）中选择关键点，我们的工作自然地充当了异常值过滤器。这使得我们的系统非常高效，因为需要最少的对应集，并且由于异常值的数量很少而非常准确。我们的工作超越了室外剑桥地标数据集上最先进的方法。由于在推理时仅依赖于单个图像，因此它在准确性方面胜过利用姿势先验和/或参考 3D 模型的方法，同时速度更快。通过选择少至 100 个对应关系，它超越了从数千个对应关系中进行定位的类似方法，同时效率更高。特别是，与这些方法相比，它在 OldHospital 场景中实现了 33% 的本地化改进。此外，它优于直接姿态回归器，甚至是那些从图像序列中学习的回归器 本文提出PixSelect方法，通过选择少量可靠像素实现高效准确的单目相机位姿估计。 Mohammad Altillawi cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Muhammad Kashif Ali,Dongjin Kim,Tae Hyun Kim
title: Task Agnostic Restoration of Natural Video Dynamics
title_zh: 自然视频动态的任务无关恢复
abstract: In many video restoration/translation tasks, image processing operations are naïvely extended to the video domain by processing each frame independently, disregarding the temporal connection of the video frames. This disregard for the temporal connection often leads to severe temporal inconsistencies. State-Of-The-Art (SOTA) techniques that address these inconsistencies rely on the availability of unprocessed videos to implicitly siphon and utilize consistent video dynamics to restore the temporal consistency of frame-wise processed videos which often jeopardizes the translation effect. We propose a general framework for this task that learns to infer and utilize consistent motion dynamics from inconsistent videos to mitigate the temporal flicker while preserving the perceptual quality for both the temporally neighboring and relatively distant frames without requiring the raw videos at test time. The proposed framework produces SOTA results on two benchmark datasets, DAVIS and videvo.net, processed by numerous image processing applications. The code and the trained models are available at \url{https://github.com/MKashifAli/TARONVD}.
summary: In many video restoration/translation tasks, image processing operations are naïvely extended to the video domain by processing each frame independently, disregarding the temporal connection of the video frames. This disregard for the temporal connection often leads to severe temporal inconsistencies. State-Of-The-Art (SOTA) techniques that address these inconsistencies rely on the availability of unprocessed videos to implicitly siphon and utilize consistent video dynamics to restore the temporal consistency of frame-wise processed videos which often jeopardizes the translation effect. We propose a general framework for this task that learns to infer and utilize consistent motion dynamics from inconsistent videos to mitigate the temporal flicker while preserving the perceptual quality for both the temporally neighboring and relatively distant frames without requiring the raw videos at test time. The proposed framework produces SOTA results on two benchmark datasets, DAVIS and videvo.net, processed by numerous image processing applications. The code and the trained models are available at \url{https://github.com/MKashifAli/TARONVD}.
abstract_zh: 在许多视频恢复/翻译任务中，通过独立处理每个帧，将图像处理操作简单地扩展到视频域，而忽略视频帧的时间连接。这种对时间联系的忽视常常会导致严重的时间不一致。解决这些不一致问题的最先进（SOTA）技术依赖于未处理视频的可用性来隐式虹吸并利用一致的视频动态来恢复逐帧处理视频的时间一致性，这通常会危及翻译效果。我们为此任务提出了一个通用框架，该框架学习从不一致的视频中推断和利用一致的运动动态来减轻时间闪烁，同时保留时间相邻和相对较远的帧的感知质量，而无需在测试时使用原始视频。所提出的框架在两个基准数据集 DAVIS 和 videvo.net 上生成 SOTA 结果，并由众多图像处理应用程序处理。代码和训练后的模型可在 \url{https://github.com/MKashifAli/TARONVD} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需原始视频即可恢复视频时间一致性的通用框架，解决视频修复任务中帧独立处理导致的时间闪烁问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖未处理视频隐式学习动态信息，但会损害翻译效果；需在无需原始视频的前提下保持时间邻近与远距离帧的感知质量。
AI.method: 设计通用框架从不一致视频中推断一致运动动态，通过学习时间动态特征缓解闪烁，无需测试时输入原始视频。
AI.result: 在DAVIS和videvo.net数据集上取得SOTA结果，代码与模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效恢复视频时间一致性，在保持感知质量的同时实现无需原始视频的视频动态修复。

authors_text: Quan Quan
title: Reliable Flight Control: Gravity-Compensation-First Principle
title_zh: 可靠的飞行控制：重力补偿第一原理
abstract: Safety is always the priority in aviation. However, current state-of-the-art passive fault-tolerant control is too conservative to use; current state-of-the-art active fault-tolerant control requires time to perform fault detection and diagnosis, and control switching. But it may be later to recover impaired aircraft. Most designs depend on failures determined as a priori and cannot deal with fault, causing the original system's state to be uncontrollable. However, experienced human pilots can save a serve impaired aircraft as far as they can. Motivated by this, this paper develops a principle to try to explain human pilot behavior behind, coined the gravity-compensation-first principle. This further supports reliable flight control for aircraft such as quadcopters and tail-sitter unmanned aerial vehicles.
summary: Safety is always the priority in aviation. However, current state-of-the-art passive fault-tolerant control is too conservative to use; current state-of-the-art active fault-tolerant control requires time to perform fault detection and diagnosis, and control switching. But it may be later to recover impaired aircraft. Most designs depend on failures determined as a priori and cannot deal with fault, causing the original system's state to be uncontrollable. However, experienced human pilots can save a serve impaired aircraft as far as they can. Motivated by this, this paper develops a principle to try to explain human pilot behavior behind, coined the gravity-compensation-first principle. This further supports reliable flight control for aircraft such as quadcopters and tail-sitter unmanned aerial vehicles.
abstract_zh: 安全始终是航空业的首要任务。然而，当前最先进的被动容错控制过于保守而无法使用；当前最先进的主动容错控制需要时间来执行故障检测和诊断以及控制切换。但修复损坏的飞机可能要晚一些。大多数设计依赖于先验确定的故障，无法处理故障，导致原始系统的状态不可控。然而，经验丰富的人类飞行员可以尽可能地拯救受损的飞机。受此启发，本文提出了一个原理来试图解释人类飞行员背后的行为，创造了重力补偿优先原理。这进一步支持四轴飞行器和尾座无人机等飞机的可靠飞行控制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于重力补偿优先原则的可靠飞行控制方法，以提高无人机在故障情况下的控制能力。
AI.motivation: 现有被动容错控制过于保守，主动容错控制存在响应延迟，且无法应对未知故障，而经验飞行员能有效处理受损飞行器。
AI.method: 通过分析飞行员行为，提出重力补偿优先原则，作为设计飞行控制策略的核心理论依据。
AI.result: 该原则为四旋翼无人机和尾座无人机提供了更可靠的控制方案，增强了系统容错能力。
AI.conclusion: 重力补偿优先原则为飞行控制领域提供了新思路，可有效弥补传统容错控制方法的不足。

authors_text: Youngwook Kim,Jae Myung Kim,Zeynep Akata,Jungwoo Lee
title: Large Loss Matters in Weakly Supervised Multi-Label Classification
title_zh: 弱监督多标签分类中的大损失很重要
comment: CVPR 2022. First two authors contributed equally
comments: CVPR 2022. First two authors contributed equally
abstract: Weakly supervised multi-label classification (WSML) task, which is to learn a multi-label classification using partially observed labels per image, is becoming increasingly important due to its huge annotation cost. In this work, we first regard unobserved labels as negative labels, casting the WSML task into noisy multi-label classification. From this point of view, we empirically observe that memorization effect, which was first discovered in a noisy multi-class setting, also occurs in a multi-label setting. That is, the model first learns the representation of clean labels, and then starts memorizing noisy labels. Based on this finding, we propose novel methods for WSML which reject or correct the large loss samples to prevent model from memorizing the noisy label. Without heavy and complex components, our proposed methods outperform previous state-of-the-art WSML methods on several partial label settings including Pascal VOC 2012, MS COCO, NUSWIDE, CUB, and OpenImages V3 datasets. Various analysis also show that our methodology actually works well, validating that treating large loss properly matters in a weakly supervised multi-label classification. Our code is available at https://github.com/snucml/LargeLossMatters.
summary: Weakly supervised multi-label classification (WSML) task, which is to learn a multi-label classification using partially observed labels per image, is becoming increasingly important due to its huge annotation cost. In this work, we first regard unobserved labels as negative labels, casting the WSML task into noisy multi-label classification. From this point of view, we empirically observe that memorization effect, which was first discovered in a noisy multi-class setting, also occurs in a multi-label setting. That is, the model first learns the representation of clean labels, and then starts memorizing noisy labels. Based on this finding, we propose novel methods for WSML which reject or correct the large loss samples to prevent model from memorizing the noisy label. Without heavy and complex components, our proposed methods outperform previous state-of-the-art WSML methods on several partial label settings including Pascal VOC 2012, MS COCO, NUSWIDE, CUB, and OpenImages V3 datasets. Various analysis also show that our methodology actually works well, validating that treating large loss properly matters in a weakly supervised multi-label classification. Our code is available at https://github.com/snucml/LargeLossMatters.
abstract_zh: 弱监督多标签分类（WSML）任务是使用每个图像部分观察到的标签来学习多标签分类，由于其巨大的注释成本而变得越来越重要。在这项工作中，我们首先将未观察到的标签视为负标签，将 WSML 任务转化为噪声多标签分类。从这个角度来看，我们凭经验观察到，在嘈杂的多类设置中首次发现的记忆效应也发生在多标签设置中。也就是说，模型首先学习干净标签的表示，然后开始记忆噪声标签。基于这一发现，我们提出了 WSML 的新方法，拒绝或纠正大量损失样本，以防止模型记住噪声标签。由于没有繁重且复杂的组件，我们提出的方法在几个部分标签设置上优于以前最先进的 WSML 方法，包括 Pascal VOC 2012、MS COCO、NUSWIDE、CUB 和 OpenImages V3 数据集。各种分析还表明，我们的方法实际上效果很好，验证了在弱监督的多标签分类中正确处理大损失的重要性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/snucml/LargeLossMatters 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究弱监督多标签分类任务，通过处理未观察到的标签作为噪声标签，提出应对大损失样本的新方法以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 弱监督多标签分类因标注成本高而重要，但未观察标签被误认为负标签会导致噪声干扰。模型易优先学习干净标签后记忆噪声标签，需解决这一问题。
AI.method: 将未观察标签视为噪声标签，提出拒绝或修正大损失样本的方法，避免模型记忆噪声标签，方法简单且无需复杂组件。
AI.result: 在Pascal VOC 2012、MS COCO等数据集上优于现有SOTA方法，分析验证了处理大损失样本的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 正确处理大损失样本对弱监督多标签分类至关重要，所提方法通过抑制噪声记忆提升了性能。

search_text: Large Loss Matters in Weakly Supervised Multi-Label Classification 弱监督多标签分类中的大损失很重要 Weakly supervised multi-label classification (WSML) task, which is to learn a multi-label classification using partially observed labels per image, is becoming increasingly important due to its huge annotation cost. In this work, we first regard unobserved labels as negative labels, casting the WSML task into noisy multi-label classification. From this point of view, we empirically observe that memorization effect, which was first discovered in a noisy multi-class setting, also occurs in a multi-label setting. That is, the model first learns the representation of clean labels, and then starts memorizing noisy labels. Based on this finding, we propose novel methods for WSML which reject or correct the large loss samples to prevent model from memorizing the noisy label. Without heavy and complex components, our proposed methods outperform previous state-of-the-art WSML methods on several partial label settings including Pascal VOC 2012, MS COCO, NUSWIDE, CUB, and OpenImages V3 datasets. Various analysis also show that our methodology actually works well, validating that treating large loss properly matters in a weakly supervised multi-label classification. Our code is available at https://github.com/snucml/LargeLossMatters. 弱监督多标签分类（WSML）任务是使用每个图像部分观察到的标签来学习多标签分类，由于其巨大的注释成本而变得越来越重要。在这项工作中，我们首先将未观察到的标签视为负标签，将 WSML 任务转化为噪声多标签分类。从这个角度来看，我们凭经验观察到，在嘈杂的多类设置中首次发现的记忆效应也发生在多标签设置中。也就是说，模型首先学习干净标签的表示，然后开始记忆噪声标签。基于这一发现，我们提出了 WSML 的新方法，拒绝或纠正大量损失样本，以防止模型记住噪声标签。由于没有繁重且复杂的组件，我们提出的方法在几个部分标签设置上优于以前最先进的 WSML 方法，包括 Pascal VOC 2012、MS COCO、NUSWIDE、CUB 和 OpenImages V3 数据集。各种分析还表明，我们的方法实际上效果很好，验证了在弱监督的多标签分类中正确处理大损失的重要性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/snucml/LargeLossMatters 获取。 本文研究弱监督多标签分类任务，通过处理未观察到的标签作为噪声标签，提出应对大损失样本的新方法以提升模型性能。 Youngwook Kim,Jae Myung Kim,Zeynep Akata,Jungwoo Lee cs.CV

authors_text: Yuxia Geng,Jiaoyan Chen,Wen Zhang,Yajing Xu,Zhuo Chen,Jeff Z. Pan,Yufeng Huang,Feiyu Xiong,Huajun Chen
title: Disentangled Ontology Embedding for Zero-shot Learning
title_zh: 用于零样本学习的解开本体嵌入
abstract: Knowledge Graph (KG) and its variant of ontology have been widely used for knowledge representation, and have shown to be quite effective in augmenting Zero-shot Learning (ZSL). However, existing ZSL methods that utilize KGs all neglect the intrinsic complexity of inter-class relationships represented in KGs. One typical feature is that a class is often related to other classes in different semantic aspects. In this paper, we focus on ontologies for augmenting ZSL, and propose to learn disentangled ontology embeddings guided by ontology properties to capture and utilize more fine-grained class relationships in different aspects. We also contribute a new ZSL framework named DOZSL, which contains two new ZSL solutions based on generative models and graph propagation models, respectively, for effectively utilizing the disentangled ontology embeddings. Extensive evaluations have been conducted on five benchmarks across zero-shot image classification (ZS-IMGC) and zero-shot KG completion (ZS-KGC). DOZSL often achieves better performance than the state-of-the-art, and its components have been verified by ablation studies and case studies. Our codes and datasets are available at https://github.com/zjukg/DOZSL.
summary: Knowledge Graph (KG) and its variant of ontology have been widely used for knowledge representation, and have shown to be quite effective in augmenting Zero-shot Learning (ZSL). However, existing ZSL methods that utilize KGs all neglect the intrinsic complexity of inter-class relationships represented in KGs. One typical feature is that a class is often related to other classes in different semantic aspects. In this paper, we focus on ontologies for augmenting ZSL, and propose to learn disentangled ontology embeddings guided by ontology properties to capture and utilize more fine-grained class relationships in different aspects. We also contribute a new ZSL framework named DOZSL, which contains two new ZSL solutions based on generative models and graph propagation models, respectively, for effectively utilizing the disentangled ontology embeddings. Extensive evaluations have been conducted on five benchmarks across zero-shot image classification (ZS-IMGC) and zero-shot KG completion (ZS-KGC). DOZSL often achieves better performance than the state-of-the-art, and its components have been verified by ablation studies and case studies. Our codes and datasets are available at https://github.com/zjukg/DOZSL.
abstract_zh: 知识图（KG）及其本体变体已广泛用于知识表示，并且已被证明在增强零样本学习（ZSL）方面非常有效。然而，现有的利用知识图谱的ZSL方法都忽略了知识图谱所代表的类间关系的内在复杂性。一个典型的特征是，一个类常常在不同的语义方面与其他类相关。在本文中，我们专注于增强 ZSL 的本体，并提出学习由本体属性引导的解缠结本体嵌入，以捕获和利用不同方面更细粒度的类关系。我们还贡献了一个名为 DOZSL 的新 ZSL 框架，其中包含两个分别基于生成模型和图传播模型的新 ZSL 解决方案，以有效利用解开的本体嵌入。对零样本图像分类 (ZS-IMGC) 和零样本 KG 完成 (ZS-KGC) 的五个基准进行了广泛的评估。 DOZSL 通常能够实现比最先进技术更好的性能，并且其组件已通过消融研究和案例研究得到验证。我们的代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/zjukg/DOZSL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于零样本学习的解耦本体嵌入方法，并构建了一个名为DOZSL的新框架。
AI.motivation: 现有的零样本学习方法在利用知识图谱时忽略了类间关系的内在复杂性，而本体能够更精细地表示不同语义方面的类间关系，因此需要探索如何更好地利用本体增强零样本学习。
AI.method: 本文提出通过本体属性指导学习解耦的本体嵌入，以捕捉和利用不同语义方面的细粒度类间关系，并构建了基于生成模型和图传播模型的两种新零样本学习解决方案，形成名为DOZSL的新框架。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上的广泛评估表明，DOZSL在零样本图像分类和零样本知识图谱补全任务中表现优于现有最先进方法，且其组件通过消融研究和案例研究得到了验证。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过解耦本体嵌入有效利用了本体中更细粒度的类间关系，提出了DOZSL框架，显著提升了零样本学习的性能。

authors_text: Anqi Wang,Ze Gao,Lik-Hang Lee,Tristan Braud,Pan Hui
title: Decentralized, not Dehumanized in the Metaverse: Bringing Utility to NFTs through Multimodal Interaction
title_zh: 元宇宙中的去中心化而非非人化：通过多模式交互为 NFT 带来实用性
abstract: User Interaction for NFTs (Non-fungible Tokens) is gaining increasing attention. Although NFTs have been traditionally single-use and monolithic, recent applications aim to connect multimodal interaction with human behaviour. This paper reviews the related technological approaches and business practices in NFT art. We highlight that multimodal interaction is a currently under-studied issue in mainstream NFT art, and conjecture that multimodal interaction is a crucial enabler for decentralization in the NFT community. We propose a framework that combines a bottom-up approach with AI multimodal process. Through this framework, we put forward integrating human behaviour data into generative NFT units, as "multimodal interactive NFT". Our work displays the possibilities of NFTs in the art world, beyond the traditional 2D and 3D static content.
summary: User Interaction for NFTs (Non-fungible Tokens) is gaining increasing attention. Although NFTs have been traditionally single-use and monolithic, recent applications aim to connect multimodal interaction with human behaviour. This paper reviews the related technological approaches and business practices in NFT art. We highlight that multimodal interaction is a currently under-studied issue in mainstream NFT art, and conjecture that multimodal interaction is a crucial enabler for decentralization in the NFT community. We propose a framework that combines a bottom-up approach with AI multimodal process. Through this framework, we put forward integrating human behaviour data into generative NFT units, as "multimodal interactive NFT". Our work displays the possibilities of NFTs in the art world, beyond the traditional 2D and 3D static content.
abstract_zh: NFT（不可替代代币）的用户交互越来越受到关注。尽管 NFT 传统上是一次性且单一的，但最近的应用旨在将多模式交互与人类行为联系起来。本文回顾了 NFT 艺术中的相关技术手段和商业实践。我们强调，多模态交互是目前主流 NFT 艺术中一个尚未得到充分研究的问题，并推测多模态交互是 NFT 社区去中心化的关键推动者。我们提出了一个将自下而上的方法与人工智能多模式流程相结合的框架。通过这个框架，我们提出将人类行为数据集成到生成式 NFT 单元中，即“多模态交互式 NFT”。我们的作品展示了 NFT 在艺术世界中超越传统 2D 和 3D 静态内容的可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过多模态交互提升NFT的实用性和互动性，提出整合人类行为数据的生成式NFT框架。
AI.motivation: 传统NFT存在单用途、缺乏互动性问题，而多模态交互可能成为推动NFT社区去中心化的关键。
AI.method: 结合自下而上方法与AI多模态处理框架，将人类行为数据嵌入生成式NFT单元形成'多模态交互NFT'。
AI.result: 展示了NFT超越静态内容的艺术可能性，验证了多模态交互在增强NFT实用价值方面的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 多模态交互是实现NFT去中心化与实用化的关键技术，未来需进一步探索框架的具体实施路径。

NFT（不可替代代币）的用户交互越来越受到关注。尽管 NFT 传统上是一次性且单一的，但最近的应用旨在将多模式交互与人类行为联系起来。本文回顾了 NFT 艺术中的相关技术手段和商业实践。我们强调，多模态交互是目前主流 NFT 艺术中一个尚未得到充分研究的问题，并推测多模态交互是 NFT 社区去中心化的关键推动者。我们提出了一个将自下而上的方法与人工智能多模式流程相结合的框架。通过这个框架，我们提出将人类行为数据集成到生成式 NFT 单元中，即“多模态交互式 NFT”。我们的作品展示了 NFT 在艺术世界中超越传统 2D 和 3D 静态内容的可能性。 本文通过多模态交互提升NFT的实用性和互动性，提出整合人类行为数据的生成式NFT框架。 Anqi Wang,Ze Gao,Lik-Hang Lee,Tristan Braud,Pan Hui cs.MM,cs.HC

authors_text: Patrick Schäfer,Ulf Leser
title: Motiflets -- Simple and Accurate Detection of Motifs in Time Series
title_zh: Motiflets——简单而准确地检测时间序列中的基序
abstract: A time series motif intuitively is a short time series that repeats itself approximately the same within a larger time series. Such motifs often represent concealed structures, such as heart beats in an ECG recording, the riff in a pop song, or sleep spindles in EEG sleep data. Motif discovery (MD) is the task of finding such motifs in a given input series. As there are varying definitions of what exactly a motif is, a number of different algorithms exist. As central parameters they all take the length l of the motif and the maximal distance r between the motif's occurrences. In practice, however, especially suitable values for r are very hard to determine upfront, and found motifs show a high variability even for very similar r values. Accordingly, finding an interesting motif requires extensive trial-and-error. In this paper, we present a different approach to the MD problem. We define k-Motiflets as the set of exactly k occurrences of a motif of length l, whose maximum pairwise distance is minimal. This turns the MD problem upside-down: The central parameter of our approach is not the distance threshold r, but the desired number of occurrence k of the motif, which we show is considerably more intuitive and easier to set. Based on this definition, we present exact and approximate algorithms for finding k-Motiflets and analyze their complexity. To further ease the use of our method, we describe statistical tools to automatically determine meaningful values for its input parameters. By evaluation on several real-world data sets and comparison to four SotA MD algorithms, we show that our proposed algorithm is both quantitatively superior to its competitors, finding larger motif sets at higher similarity, and qualitatively better, leading to clearer and easier to interpret motifs without any need for manual tuning.

Based on this definition, we present exact and approximate algorithms for finding k-Motiflets and analyze their complexity. abstract_zh: 直观上，时间序列主题是一个短时间序列，它在较大的时间序列中大致相同地重复自身。这些主题通常代表隐藏的结构，例如心电图记录中的心跳、流行歌曲中的连复段或脑电图睡眠数据中的睡眠纺锤波。基序发现（MD）是在给定的输入序列中找到此类基序的任务。由于主题到底是什么有不同的定义，因此存在许多不同的算法。作为中心参数，它们都采用主题的长度 l 和主题出现之间的最大距离 r。然而，在实践中，特别合适的 r 值很难预先确定，并且即使对于非常相似的 r 值，发现的基序也显示出很高的可变性。因此，找到一个有趣的主题需要大量的反复试验。在本文中，我们提出了解决 MD 问题的不同方法。我们将 k-Motiflets 定义为长度为 l 的主题的恰好 k 次出现的集合，其最大成对距离最小。这将 MD 问题颠倒过来：我们方法的中心参数不是距离阈值 r，而是主题的所需出现次数 k，我们表明它更加直观且更容易设置。基于这个定义，我们提出了寻找 k-Motiflet 的精确和近似算法并分析了它们的复杂性。为了进一步简化我们的方法的使用，我们描述了统计工具来自动确定其输入参数的有意义的值。通过对几个真实世界数据集的评估以及与四种 SotA MD 算法的比较，我们表明，我们提出的算法在数量上优于其竞争对手，以更高的相似性找到更大的主题集，并且在质量上更好，导致更清晰、更容易解释主题，而不需要手动调整。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Motiflets的新方法，通过定义k-Motiflets（基于出现次数k而非传统距离阈值r）改进时间序列中motif的检测。
AI.motivation: 传统motif检测需预先设定距离阈值r，但r值难以确定且结果易波动，需大量试错调整。
AI.method: 定义k-Motiflets为恰好k次出现的motif，其最大成对距离最小；提出精确与近似算法，并结合统计工具自动确定参数。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上，该方法在motif数量与相似度上优于现有算法，且无需人工调参，结果更清晰易解释。
AI.conclusion: Motiflets通过以k为参数的直观设定，显著提升motif检测的准确性与易用性，适用于实际时间序列分析场景。

authors_text: Jun Yan,Huilin Yin,Xiaoyang Deng,Ziming Zhao,Wancheng Ge,Hao Zhang,Gerhard Rigoll
title: Wavelet Regularization Benefits Adversarial Training
title_zh: 小波正则化有利于对抗训练
abstract: Adversarial training methods are state-of-the-art (SOTA) empirical defense methods against adversarial examples. Many regularization methods have been proven to be effective with the combination of adversarial training. Nevertheless, such regularization methods are implemented in the time domain. Since adversarial vulnerability can be regarded as a high-frequency phenomenon, it is essential to regulate the adversarially-trained neural network models in the frequency domain. Faced with these challenges, we make a theoretical analysis on the regularization property of wavelets which can enhance adversarial training. We propose a wavelet regularization method based on the Haar wavelet decomposition which is named Wavelet Average Pooling. This wavelet regularization module is integrated into the wide residual neural network so that a new WideWaveletResNet model is formed. On the datasets of CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, our proposed Adversarial Wavelet Training method realizes considerable robustness under different types of attacks. It verifies the assumption that our wavelet regularization method can enhance adversarial robustness especially in the deep wide neural networks. The visualization experiments of the Frequency Principle (F-Principle) and interpretability are implemented to show the effectiveness of our method. A detailed comparison based on different wavelet base functions is presented. The code is available at the repository: \url{https://github.com/momo1986/AdversarialWaveletTraining}.
summary: Adversarial training methods are state-of-the-art (SOTA) empirical defense methods against adversarial examples. Many regularization methods have been proven to be effective with the combination of adversarial training. Nevertheless, such regularization methods are implemented in the time domain. Since adversarial vulnerability can be regarded as a high-frequency phenomenon, it is essential to regulate the adversarially-trained neural network models in the frequency domain. Faced with these challenges, we make a theoretical analysis on the regularization property of wavelets which can enhance adversarial training. We propose a wavelet regularization method based on the Haar wavelet decomposition which is named Wavelet Average Pooling. This wavelet regularization module is integrated into the wide residual neural network so that a new WideWaveletResNet model is formed. On the datasets of CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, our proposed Adversarial Wavelet Training method realizes considerable robustness under different types of attacks. It verifies the assumption that our wavelet regularization method can enhance adversarial robustness especially in the deep wide neural networks. The visualization experiments of the Frequency Principle (F-Principle) and interpretability are implemented to show the effectiveness of our method. A detailed comparison based on different wavelet base functions is presented. The code is available at the repository: \url{https://github.com/momo1986/AdversarialWaveletTraining}.
abstract_zh: 对抗性训练方法是针对对抗性示例的最先进（SOTA）经验防御方法。许多正则化方法已被证明与对抗性训练相结合是有效的。然而，这种正则化方法是在时域中实现的。由于对抗性脆弱性可以被视为一种高频现象，因此有必要在频域中调节对抗性训练的神经网络模型。面对这些挑战，我们对小波的正则化性质进行了理论分析，这可以增强对抗性训练。我们提出了一种基于Haar小波分解的小波正则化方法，称为小波平均池化。将该小波正则化模块集成到宽残差神经网络中，形成新的WideWaveletResNet模型。在 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 数据集上，我们提出的对抗小波训练方法在不同类型的攻击下实现了相当大的鲁棒性。它验证了我们的小波正则化方法可以增强对抗鲁棒性的假设，特别是在深广神经网络中。频率原理（F-原理）和可解释性的可视化实验被实现以显示我们方法的有效性。给出了基于不同小波基函数的详细比较。该代码可在存储库中找到：\url{https://github.com/momo1986/AdversarialWaveletTraining}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于小波正则化的对抗训练方法，通过频率域调节提升神经网络对对抗样本的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练的正则化方法多在时域实施，而对抗脆弱性本质是高频现象，需在频率域进行有效约束。
AI.method: 提出基于Haar小波分解的Wavelet Average Pooling模块，集成至宽残差网络形成WideWaveletResNet模型，并设计对抗小波训练方法。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100数据集上实现显著的对抗鲁棒性，可视化实验与不同小波基对比验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 小波正则化能有效增强深度宽网络的对抗鲁棒性，为频率域对抗防御提供新思路。

authors_text: Fan Yang,Kai He,Linxiao Yang,Hongxia Du,Jingbang Yang,Bo Yang,Liang Sun
title: Learning Interpretable Decision Rule Sets: A Submodular Optimization Approach
title_zh: 学习可解释的决策规则集：子模块优化方法
abstract: Rule sets are highly interpretable logical models in which the predicates for decision are expressed in disjunctive normal form (DNF, OR-of-ANDs), or, equivalently, the overall model comprises an unordered collection of if-then decision rules. In this paper, we consider a submodular optimization based approach for learning rule sets. The learning problem is framed as a subset selection task in which a subset of all possible rules needs to be selected to form an accurate and interpretable rule set. We employ an objective function that exhibits submodularity and thus is amenable to submodular optimization techniques. To overcome the difficulty arose from dealing with the exponential-sized ground set of rules, the subproblem of searching a rule is casted as another subset selection task that asks for a subset of features. We show it is possible to write the induced objective function for the subproblem as a difference of two submodular (DS) functions to make it approximately solvable by DS optimization algorithms. Overall, the proposed approach is simple, scalable, and likely to be benefited from further research on submodular optimization. Experiments on real datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
summary: Rule sets are highly interpretable logical models in which the predicates for decision are expressed in disjunctive normal form (DNF, OR-of-ANDs), or, equivalently, the overall model comprises an unordered collection of if-then decision rules. In this paper, we consider a submodular optimization based approach for learning rule sets. The learning problem is framed as a subset selection task in which a subset of all possible rules needs to be selected to form an accurate and interpretable rule set. We employ an objective function that exhibits submodularity and thus is amenable to submodular optimization techniques. To overcome the difficulty arose from dealing with the exponential-sized ground set of rules, the subproblem of searching a rule is casted as another subset selection task that asks for a subset of features. We show it is possible to write the induced objective function for the subproblem as a difference of two submodular (DS) functions to make it approximately solvable by DS optimization algorithms. Overall, the proposed approach is simple, scalable, and likely to be benefited from further research on submodular optimization. Experiments on real datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 规则集是高度可解释的逻辑模型，其中决策谓词以析取范式（DNF、OR-of-AND）表示，或者等效地，整个模型包含 if-then 决策规则的无序集合。在本文中，我们考虑一种基于子模块优化的学习规则集方法。学习问题被定义为子集选择任务，其中需要选择所有可能规则的子集以形成准确且可解释的规则集。我们采用具有子模性的目标函数，因此适合子模优化技术。为了克服处理指数大小的基本规则集所带来的困难，搜索规则的子问题被转换为另一个要求特征子集的子集选择任务。我们证明可以将子问题的导出目标函数写为两个子模 (DS) 函数的差值，从而使其可以通过 DS 优化算法近似求解。总体而言，所提出的方法简单、可扩展，并且可能受益于子模块优化的进一步研究。在真实数据集上的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.result: 在真实数据集上验证了该方法的有效性，展示了其在准确性和可解释性上的优势。

authors_text: Yu Jin Kim,Beong-woo Kwak,Youngwook Kim,Reinald Kim Amplayo,Seung-won Hwang,Jinyoung Yeo
title: Modularized Transfer Learning with Multiple Knowledge Graphs for Zero-shot Commonsense Reasoning
title_zh: 具有多个知识图的模块化迁移学习用于零样本常识推理
abstract: Commonsense reasoning systems should be able to generalize to diverse reasoning cases. However, most state-of-the-art approaches depend on expensive data annotations and overfit to a specific benchmark without learning how to perform general semantic reasoning. To overcome these drawbacks, zero-shot QA systems have shown promise as a robust learning scheme by transforming a commonsense knowledge graph (KG) into synthetic QA-form samples for model training. Considering the increasing type of different commonsense KGs, this paper aims to extend the zero-shot transfer learning scenario into multiple-source settings, where different KGs can be utilized synergetically. Towards this goal, we propose to mitigate the loss of knowledge from the interference among the different knowledge sources, by developing a modular variant of the knowledge aggregation as a new zero-shot commonsense reasoning framework. Results on five commonsense reasoning benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy of our framework, improving the performance with multiple KGs.
summary: Commonsense reasoning systems should be able to generalize to diverse reasoning cases. However, most state-of-the-art approaches depend on expensive data annotations and overfit to a specific benchmark without learning how to perform general semantic reasoning. To overcome these drawbacks, zero-shot QA systems have shown promise as a robust learning scheme by transforming a commonsense knowledge graph (KG) into synthetic QA-form samples for model training. Considering the increasing type of different commonsense KGs, this paper aims to extend the zero-shot transfer learning scenario into multiple-source settings, where different KGs can be utilized synergetically. Towards this goal, we propose to mitigate the loss of knowledge from the interference among the different knowledge sources, by developing a modular variant of the knowledge aggregation as a new zero-shot commonsense reasoning framework. Results on five commonsense reasoning benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy of our framework, improving the performance with multiple KGs.
abstract_zh: 常识推理系统应该能够推广到不同的推理案例。然而，大多数最先进的方法都依赖于昂贵的数据注释，并且在不学习如何执行一般语义推理的情况下过度拟合特定基准。为了克服这些缺点，零样本 QA 系统通过将常识知识图 (KG) 转换为用于模型训练的合成 QA 形式样本，显示出了作为鲁棒学习方案的前景。考虑到不同常识知识图谱的类型不断增加，本文旨在将零样本迁移学习场景扩展到多源设置，其中不同的知识图谱可以协同利用。为了实现这一目标，我们建议通过开发知识聚合的模块化变体作为新的零样本常识推理框架，来减轻不同知识源之间的干扰造成的知识损失。五个常识推理基准的结果证明了我们框架的有效性，提高了多个知识图谱的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多知识图谱的模块化迁移学习框架，用于提升零样本常识推理的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有常识推理系统依赖昂贵的标注数据且容易过拟合特定基准，而零样本问答系统通过知识图谱生成合成样本具有潜力。但面对多种常识知识图谱的协同利用问题尚未解决。
AI.method: 开发模块化知识聚合机制，通过分模块处理不同知识源以减少干扰，构建多源知识图谱协同的零样本推理框架。
AI.result: 在五个常识推理基准测试中验证了框架有效性，使用多个知识图谱时性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 模块化迁移学习框架能有效整合多源知识图谱，为零样本常识推理提供更通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Ziyuan Yang,Wenjun Xia,Zexin Lu,Yingyu Chen,Xiaoxiao Li,Yi Zhang
title: Hypernetwork-based Personalized Federated Learning for Multi-Institutional CT Imaging
title_zh: 基于超网络的多机构 CT 成像个性化联合学习
abstract: Computed tomography (CT) is of great importance in clinical practice due to its powerful ability to provide patients' anatomical information without any invasive inspection, but its potential radiation risk is raising people's concerns. Deep learning-based methods are considered promising in CT reconstruction, but these network models are usually trained with the measured data obtained from specific scanning protocol and need to centralizedly collect large amounts of data, which will lead to serious data domain shift, and privacy concerns. To relieve these problems, in this paper, we propose a hypernetwork-based federated learning method for personalized CT imaging, dubbed as HyperFed. The basic assumption of HyperFed is that the optimization problem for each institution can be divided into two parts: the local data adaption problem and the global CT imaging problem, which are implemented by an institution-specific hypernetwork and a global-sharing imaging network, respectively. The purpose of global-sharing imaging network is to learn stable and effective common features from different institutions. The institution-specific hypernetwork is carefully designed to obtain hyperparameters to condition the global-sharing imaging network for personalized local CT reconstruction. Experiments show that HyperFed achieves competitive performance in CT reconstruction compared with several other state-of-the-art methods. It is believed as a promising direction to improve CT imaging quality and achieve personalized demands of different institutions or scanners without privacy data sharing. The codes will be released at https://github.com/Zi-YuanYang/HyperFed.
summary: Computed tomography (CT) is of great importance in clinical practice due to its powerful ability to provide patients' anatomical information without any invasive inspection, but its potential radiation risk is raising people's concerns. Deep learning-based methods are considered promising in CT reconstruction, but these network models are usually trained with the measured data obtained from specific scanning protocol and need to centralizedly collect large amounts of data, which will lead to serious data domain shift, and privacy concerns. To relieve these problems, in this paper, we propose a hypernetwork-based federated learning method for personalized CT imaging, dubbed as HyperFed. The basic assumption of HyperFed is that the optimization problem for each institution can be divided into two parts: the local data adaption problem and the global CT imaging problem, which are implemented by an institution-specific hypernetwork and a global-sharing imaging network, respectively. The purpose of global-sharing imaging network is to learn stable and effective common features from different institutions. The institution-specific hypernetwork is carefully designed to obtain hyperparameters to condition the global-sharing imaging network for personalized local CT reconstruction. Experiments show that HyperFed achieves competitive performance in CT reconstruction compared with several other state-of-the-art methods. It is believed as a promising direction to improve CT imaging quality and achieve personalized demands of different institutions or scanners without privacy data sharing. The codes will be released at https://github.com/Zi-YuanYang/HyperFed.
abstract_zh: 计算机断层扫描（CT）因其无需任何侵入性检查即可提供患者解剖信息的强大能力，在临床实践中具有重要意义，但其潜在的辐射风险引起了人们的担忧。基于深度学习的方法在CT重建中被认为很有前景，但这些网络模型通常是用特定扫描协议获得的测量数据进行训练的，需要集中收集大量数据，这将导致严重的数据域转移和隐私问题。为了解决这些问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种基于超网络的个性化 CT 成像联邦学习方法，称为 HyperFed。 HyperFed的基本假设是每个机构的优化问题可以分为两部分：本地数据适应问题和全局CT成像问题，分别由机构特定的超网络和全局共享成像网络来实现。全球共享成像网络的目的是从不同机构学习稳定有效的共同特征。机构特定的超网络经过精心设计，可获取超参数来调节全局共享成像网络，以实现个性化局部 CT 重建。实验表明，与其他几种最先进的方法相比，HyperFed 在 CT 重建方面取得了具有竞争力的性能。它被认为是在不共享隐私数据的情况下提高CT成像质量并实现不同机构或扫描仪的个性化需求的一个有前途的方向。代码将在 https://github.com/Zi-YuanYang/HyperFed 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于超网络的联邦学习方法HyperFed，用于多机构CT影像的个性化重建，解决数据域偏移和隐私问题。
AI.motivation: 传统CT重建方法依赖集中式数据训练，存在数据域偏移和隐私泄露风险，需开发无需共享隐私数据的个性化CT影像方案。
AI.method: HyperFed将优化问题分为两部分：机构特定的超网络处理本地数据适应，全局共享的影像网络学习通用特征，通过超网络生成参数条件化全局网络实现个性化重建。
AI.result: 实验表明HyperFed在CT重建任务中性能优于多种先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: HyperFed为在无需共享隐私数据的前提下提升CT影像质量与机构个性化需求提供了可行方向。

ai_content_json.result: 实验表明HyperFed在CT重建任务中性能优于多种先进方法，验证了其有效性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: HyperFed为在无需共享隐私数据的前提下提升CT影像质量与机构个性化需求提供了可行方向。

search_text: Hypernetwork-based Personalized Federated Learning for Multi-Institutional CT Imaging 基于超网络的多机构 CT 成像个性化联合学习 Computed tomography (CT) is of great importance in clinical practice due to its powerful ability to provide patients' anatomical information without any invasive inspection, but its potential radiation risk is raising people's concerns. Deep learning-based methods are considered promising in CT reconstruction, but these network models are usually trained with the measured data obtained from specific scanning protocol and need to centralizedly collect large amounts of data, which will lead to serious data domain shift, and privacy concerns. To relieve these problems, in this paper, we propose a hypernetwork-based federated learning method for personalized CT imaging, dubbed as HyperFed. The basic assumption of HyperFed is that the optimization problem for each institution can be divided into two parts: the local data adaption problem and the global CT imaging problem, which are implemented by an institution-specific hypernetwork and a global-sharing imaging network, respectively. The purpose of global-sharing imaging network is to learn stable and effective common features from different institutions. The institution-specific hypernetwork is carefully designed to obtain hyperparameters to condition the global-sharing imaging network for personalized local CT reconstruction. Experiments show that HyperFed achieves competitive performance in CT reconstruction compared with several other state-of-the-art methods. It is believed as a promising direction to improve CT imaging quality and achieve personalized demands of different institutions or scanners without privacy data sharing. The codes will be released at https://github.com/Zi-YuanYang/HyperFed. 计算机断层扫描（CT）因其无需任何侵入性检查即可提供患者解剖信息的强大能力，在临床实践中具有重要意义，但其潜在的辐射风险引起了人们的担忧。基于深度学习的方法在CT重建中被认为很有前景，但这些网络模型通常是用特定扫描协议获得的测量数据进行训练的，需要集中收集大量数据，这将导致严重的数据域转移和隐私问题。为了解决这些问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种基于超网络的个性化 CT 成像联邦学习方法，称为 HyperFed。 HyperFed的基本假设是每个机构的优化问题可以分为两部分：本地数据适应问题和全局CT成像问题，分别由机构特定的超网络和全局共享成像网络来实现。全球共享成像网络的目的是从不同机构学习稳定有效的共同特征。机构特定的超网络经过精心设计，可获取超参数来调节全局共享成像网络，以实现个性化局部 CT 重建。实验表明，与其他几种最先进的方法相比，HyperFed 在 CT 重建方面取得了具有竞争力的性能。它被认为是在不共享隐私数据的情况下提高CT成像质量并实现不同机构或扫描仪的个性化需求的一个有前途的方向。代码将在 https://github.com/Zi-YuanYang/HyperFed 发布。 本文提出一种基于超网络的联邦学习方法HyperFed，用于多机构CT影像的个性化重建，解决数据域偏移和隐私问题。 Ziyuan Yang,Wenjun Xia,Zexin Lu,Yingyu Chen,Xiaoxiao Li,Yi Zhang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Subhodip Biswas,Fanglan Chen,Zhiqian Chen,Chang-Tien Lu,Naren Ramakrishnan
title: Sampling-based techniques for designing school boundaries
title_zh: 基于抽样的学校边界设计技术
abstract: Recently, an increasing number of researchers, especially in the realm of political redistricting, have proposed sampling-based techniques to generate a subset of plans from the vast space of districting plans. These techniques have been increasingly adopted by U.S. courts of law and independent commissions as a tool for identifying partisan gerrymanders. Motivated by these recent developments, we develop a set of similar sampling techniques for designing school boundaries based on the flip proposal. Note that the flip proposal here refers to the change in the districting plan by a single assignment. These sampling-based techniques serve a dual purpose. They can be used as a baseline for comparing redistricting algorithms based on local search. Additionally, these techniques can help to infer the problem characteristics that may be further used for developing efficient redistricting methods. We empirically touch on both these aspects in regards to the problem of school redistricting.
summary: Recently, an increasing number of researchers, especially in the realm of political redistricting, have proposed sampling-based techniques to generate a subset of plans from the vast space of districting plans. These techniques have been increasingly adopted by U.S. courts of law and independent commissions as a tool for identifying partisan gerrymanders. Motivated by these recent developments, we develop a set of similar sampling techniques for designing school boundaries based on the flip proposal. Note that the flip proposal here refers to the change in the districting plan by a single assignment. These sampling-based techniques serve a dual purpose. They can be used as a baseline for comparing redistricting algorithms based on local search. Additionally, these techniques can help to infer the problem characteristics that may be further used for developing efficient redistricting methods. We empirically touch on both these aspects in regards to the problem of school redistricting.
abstract_zh: 最近，越来越多的研究人员，特别是在政治重新划分领域，提出了基于抽样的技术，从广阔的选区规划中生成规划的子集。这些技术越来越多地被美国法院和独立委员会采用，作为识别党派不公正划分选区的工具。受这些最新发展的推动，我们开发了一套类似的抽样技术，用于根据翻转提案设计学校边界。请注意，这里的翻转提案是指通过单个分配对分区计划进行更改。这些基于采样的技术具有双重目的。它们可以用作比较基于本地搜索的重划区算法的基线。此外，这些技术可以帮助推断问题特征，这些特征可以进一步用于开发有效的重新划分方法。我们根据经验涉及学校重新划分问题的这两个方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于采样的技术用于设计学校边界，借鉴政治选区划分中的翻转提案方法。
AI.motivation: 政治选区划分领域采样技术已被法律机构采用，作者受此启发将其应用于学校边界设计以解决相关问题。
AI.method: 采用单次分配调整（翻转提案）生成边界方案，通过采样技术实现基准比较与问题特征推断。
AI.result: 实证验证了该方法在基准对比和问题特征分析中的有效性，为学校边界设计提供新思路。
AI.conclusion: 采样技术可作为学校边界设计的基准工具，并助力开发更高效的划分方法。

authors_text: Cosmin I. Bercea,Daniel Rueckert,Julia A. Schnabel
title: What do we learn? Debunking the Myth of Unsupervised Outlier Detection
title_zh: 我们学到什么？揭穿无监督异常值检测的神话
abstract: Even though auto-encoders (AEs) have the desirable property of learning compact representations without labels and have been widely applied to out-of-distribution (OoD) detection, they are generally still poorly understood and are used incorrectly in detecting outliers where the normal and abnormal distributions are strongly overlapping. In general, the learned manifold is assumed to contain key information that is only important for describing samples within the training distribution, and that the reconstruction of outliers leads to high residual errors. However, recent work suggests that AEs are likely to be even better at reconstructing some types of OoD samples. In this work, we challenge this assumption and investigate what auto-encoders actually learn when they are posed to solve two different tasks. First, we propose two metrics based on the Fréchet inception distance (FID) and confidence scores of a trained classifier to assess whether AEs can learn the training distribution and reliably recognize samples from other domains. Second, we investigate whether AEs are able to synthesize normal images from samples with abnormal regions, on a more challenging lung pathology detection task. We have found that state-of-the-art (SOTA) AEs are either unable to constrain the latent manifold and allow reconstruction of abnormal patterns, or they are failing to accurately restore the inputs from their latent distribution, resulting in blurred or misaligned reconstructions. We propose novel deformable auto-encoders (MorphAEus) to learn perceptually aware global image priors and locally adapt their morphometry based on estimated dense deformation fields. We demonstrate superior performance over unsupervised methods in detecting OoD and pathology.
summary: Even though auto-encoders (AEs) have the desirable property of learning compact representations without labels and have been widely applied to out-of-distribution (OoD) detection, they are generally still poorly understood and are used incorrectly in detecting outliers where the normal and abnormal distributions are strongly overlapping. In general, the learned manifold is assumed to contain key information that is only important for describing samples within the training distribution, and that the reconstruction of outliers leads to high residual errors. However, recent work suggests that AEs are likely to be even better at reconstructing some types of OoD samples. In this work, we challenge this assumption and investigate what auto-encoders actually learn when they are posed to solve two different tasks. First, we propose two metrics based on the Fréchet inception distance (FID) and confidence scores of a trained classifier to assess whether AEs can learn the training distribution and reliably recognize samples from other domains. Second, we investigate whether AEs are able to synthesize normal images from samples with abnormal regions, on a more challenging lung pathology detection task. We have found that state-of-the-art (SOTA) AEs are either unable to constrain the latent manifold and allow reconstruction of abnormal patterns, or they are failing to accurately restore the inputs from their latent distribution, resulting in blurred or misaligned reconstructions. We propose novel deformable auto-encoders (MorphAEus) to learn perceptually aware global image priors and locally adapt their morphometry based on estimated dense deformation fields. We demonstrate superior performance over unsupervised methods in detecting OoD and pathology.
abstract_zh: 尽管自动编码器（AE）具有学习无标签的紧凑表示的理想特性，并且已广泛应用于分布外（OoD）检测，但它们通常仍然知之甚少，并且在检测正态分布和异常分布强烈重叠的异常值时被错误地使用。一般来说，假设学习流形包含仅对描述训练分布内的样本重要的关键信息，并且异常值的重建会导致高残差。然而，最近的研究表明，AE 可能更擅长重建某些类型的 OoD 样本。在这项工作中，我们挑战这一假设，并研究自动编码器在解决两个不同任务时实际学到了什么。首先，我们基于 Fréchet 初始距离 (FID) 和经过训练的分类器的置信度得分提出两个指标，以评估 AE 是否能够学习训练分布并可靠地识别来自其​​他领域的样本。其次，我们研究 AE 是否能够在更具挑战性的肺部病理检测任务中从异常区域的样本中合成正常图像。我们发现最先进的 (SOTA) AE 要么无法约束潜在流形并允许重建异常模式，要么无法准确地从其潜在分布中恢复输入，从而导致重建模糊或失准。我们提出了新颖的可变形自动编码器（MorphAEus）来学习感知感知的全局图像先验，并根据估计的密集变形场局部调整其形态测量。我们在检测 OoD 和病理学方面展示了优于无监督方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文质疑自编码器（AE）在无监督异常检测中的有效性，提出新型可变形自编码器MorphAEus以改进病理检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究误认为AE能可靠检测分布重叠的异常样本，但实际其重建误差可能无法区分正常与异常分布，需重新评估其能力。
AI.method: 基于FID指标和分类器置信度评估AE学习能力；设计挑战性肺部病理任务验证合成能力；提出结合密集形变场的可变形自编码器MorphAEus。
AI.result: 主流AE无法约束潜在空间或准确重建，导致模糊失真；MorphAEus在病理检测任务中超越现有无监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 打破AE无监督异常检测的神话，证明其局限性并提出基于感知先验和局部形变适应的新型架构MorphAEus。

We have found that state-of-the-art (SOTA) AEs are either unable to constrain the latent manifold and allow reconstruction of abnormal patterns, or they are failing to accurately restore the inputs from their latent distribution, resulting in blurred or misaligned reconstructions. We propose novel deformable auto-encoders (MorphAEus) to learn perceptually aware global image priors and locally adapt their morphometry based on estimated dense deformation fields. We demonstrate superior performance over unsupervised methods in detecting OoD and pathology. 尽管自动编码器（AE）具有学习无标签的紧凑表示的理想特性，并且已广泛应用于分布外（OoD）检测，但它们通常仍然知之甚少，并且在检测正态分布和异常分布强烈重叠的异常值时被错误地使用。一般来说，假设学习流形包含仅对描述训练分布内的样本重要的关键信息，并且异常值的重建会导致高残差。然而，最近的研究表明，AE 可能更擅长重建某些类型的 OoD 样本。在这项工作中，我们挑战这一假设，并研究自动编码器在解决两个不同任务时实际学到了什么。首先，我们基于 Fréchet 初始距离 (FID) 和经过训练的分类器的置信度得分提出两个指标，以评估 AE 是否能够学习训练分布并可靠地识别来自其​​他领域的样本。其次，我们研究 AE 是否能够在更具挑战性的肺部病理检测任务中从异常区域的样本中合成正常图像。我们发现最先进的 (SOTA) AE 要么无法约束潜在流形并允许重建异常模式，要么无法准确地从其潜在分布中恢复输入，从而导致重建模糊或失准。我们提出了新颖的可变形自动编码器（MorphAEus）来学习感知感知的全局图像先验，并根据估计的密集变形场局部调整其形态测量。我们在检测 OoD 和病理学方面展示了优于无监督方法的性能。 本文质疑自编码器（AE）在无监督异常检测中的有效性，提出新型可变形自编码器MorphAEus以改进病理检测性能。 Cosmin I. Bercea,Daniel Rueckert,Julia A. Schnabel cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Puyang Zhang,Kaihao Zhang,Wenhan Luo,Changsheng Li,Guoren Wang
title: Blind Face Restoration: Benchmark Datasets and a Baseline Model
title_zh: 盲人脸恢复：基准数据集和基线模型
abstract: Blind Face Restoration (BFR) aims to construct a high-quality (HQ) face image from its corresponding low-quality (LQ) input. Recently, many BFR methods have been proposed and they have achieved remarkable success. However, these methods are trained or evaluated on privately synthesized datasets, which makes it infeasible for the subsequent approaches to fairly compare with them. To address this problem, we first synthesize two blind face restoration benchmark datasets called EDFace-Celeb-1M (BFR128) and EDFace-Celeb-150K (BFR512). State-of-the-art methods are benchmarked on them under five settings including blur, noise, low resolution, JPEG compression artifacts, and the combination of them (full degradation). To make the comparison more comprehensive, five widely-used quantitative metrics and two task-driven metrics including Average Face Landmark Distance (AFLD) and Average Face ID Cosine Similarity (AFICS) are applied. Furthermore, we develop an effective baseline model called Swin Transformer U-Net (STUNet). The STUNet with U-net architecture applies an attention mechanism and a shifted windowing scheme to capture long-range pixel interactions and focus more on significant features while still being trained efficiently. Experimental results show that the proposed baseline method performs favourably against the SOTA methods on various BFR tasks.
summary: Blind Face Restoration (BFR) aims to construct a high-quality (HQ) face image from its corresponding low-quality (LQ) input. Recently, many BFR methods have been proposed and they have achieved remarkable success. However, these methods are trained or evaluated on privately synthesized datasets, which makes it infeasible for the subsequent approaches to fairly compare with them. To address this problem, we first synthesize two blind face restoration benchmark datasets called EDFace-Celeb-1M (BFR128) and EDFace-Celeb-150K (BFR512). State-of-the-art methods are benchmarked on them under five settings including blur, noise, low resolution, JPEG compression artifacts, and the combination of them (full degradation). To make the comparison more comprehensive, five widely-used quantitative metrics and two task-driven metrics including Average Face Landmark Distance (AFLD) and Average Face ID Cosine Similarity (AFICS) are applied. Furthermore, we develop an effective baseline model called Swin Transformer U-Net (STUNet). The STUNet with U-net architecture applies an attention mechanism and a shifted windowing scheme to capture long-range pixel interactions and focus more on significant features while still being trained efficiently. Experimental results show that the proposed baseline method performs favourably against the SOTA methods on various BFR tasks.
abstract_zh: 盲人脸恢复（BFR）旨在从相应的低质量（LQ）输入构建高质量（HQ）人脸图像。近年来，许多BFR方法被提出并取得了显着的成功。然而，这些方法是在私人合成的数据集上进行训练或评估的，这使得后续方法无法与它们进行公平比较。为了解决这个问题，我们首先合成两个盲脸恢复基准数据集，称为 EDFace-Celeb-1M (BFR128) 和 EDFace-Celeb-150K (BFR512)。最先进的方法在五种设置下进行基准测试，包括模糊、噪声、低分辨率、JPEG 压缩伪影以及它们的组合（完全降级）。为了使比较更全面，应用了五个广泛使用的定量指标和两个任务驱动指标，包括平均人脸地标距离（AFLD）和平均人脸ID余弦相似度（AFICS）。此外，我们开发了一个有效的基线模型，称为 Swin Transformer U-Net (STUNet)。具有 U-net 架构的 STUNet 应用注意力机制和移位窗口方案来捕获长距离像素交互，并更多地关注重要特征，同时仍然有效地进行训练。实验结果表明，所提出的基线方法在各种 BFR 任务上的表现优于 SOTA 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出盲脸修复任务的基准数据集及基线模型，解决现有方法因依赖私有数据集导致的公平性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有盲脸修复方法多基于私有合成数据集训练和评估，缺乏公开基准导致方法间比较困难，需建立统一评价标准以推动领域发展。
AI.method: 合成两个大规模基准数据集（BFR128/BFR512），设计包含模糊、噪声等五种退化场景的测试框架，并提出结合注意力机制与移位窗口的STUNet基线模型。
AI.result: STUNet在多个退化场景下优于现有SOTA方法，且通过AFLD/AFICS等任务驱动指标验证了修复结果的面部特征保真度。
AI.conclusion: 构建的基准数据集和STUNet模型为盲脸修复研究提供了标准化评估体系，有助于后续方法的公平比较与优化。

Recently, many BFR methods have been proposed and they have achieved remarkable success. However, these methods are trained or evaluated on privately synthesized datasets, which makes it infeasible for the subsequent approaches to fairly compare with them. Experimental results show that the proposed baseline method performs favourably against the SOTA methods on various BFR tasks. 盲人脸恢复（BFR）旨在从相应的低质量（LQ）输入构建高质量（HQ）人脸图像。近年来，许多BFR方法被提出并取得了显着的成功。然而，这些方法是在私人合成的数据集上进行训练或评估的，这使得后续方法无法与它们进行公平比较。为了解决这个问题，我们首先合成两个盲脸恢复基准数据集，称为 EDFace-Celeb-1M (BFR128) 和 EDFace-Celeb-150K (BFR512)。最先进的方法在五种设置下进行基准测试，包括模糊、噪声、低分辨率、JPEG 压缩伪影以及它们的组合（完全降级）。为了使比较更全面，应用了五个广泛使用的定量指标和两个任务驱动指标，包括平均人脸地标距离（AFLD）和平均人脸ID余弦相似度（AFICS）。此外，我们开发了一个有效的基线模型，称为 Swin Transformer U-Net (STUNet)。具有 U-net 架构的 STUNet 应用注意力机制和移位窗口方案来捕获长距离像素交互，并更多地关注重要特征，同时仍然有效地进行训练。实验结果表明，所提出的基线方法在各种 BFR 任务上的表现优于 SOTA 方法。 本文提出盲脸修复任务的基准数据集及基线模型，解决现有方法因依赖私有数据集导致的公平性问题。 Puyang Zhang,Kaihao Zhang,Wenhan Luo,Changsheng Li,Guoren Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Donato Crisostomi,Simone Antonelli,Valentino Maiorca,Luca Moschella,Riccardo Marin,Emanuele Rodolà
title: Metric Based Few-Shot Graph Classification
title_zh: 基于度量的少样本图分类
comment: In Proceedings of the First Learning on Graphs Conference (LoG 2022)
comments: In Proceedings of the First Learning on Graphs Conference (LoG 2022)
abstract: Many modern deep-learning techniques do not work without enormous datasets. At the same time, several fields demand methods working in scarcity of data. This problem is even more complex when the samples have varying structures, as in the case of graphs. Graph representation learning techniques have recently proven successful in a variety of domains. Nevertheless, the employed architectures perform miserably when faced with data scarcity. On the other hand, few-shot learning allows employing modern deep learning models in scarce data regimes without waiving their effectiveness. In this work, we tackle the problem of few-shot graph classification, showing that equipping a simple distance metric learning baseline with a state-of-the-art graph embedder allows to obtain competitive results on the task. While the simplicity of the architecture is enough to outperform more complex ones, it also allows straightforward additions. To this end, we show that additional improvements may be obtained by encouraging a task-conditioned embedding space. Finally, we propose a MixUp-based online data augmentation technique acting in the latent space and show its effectiveness on the task.
summary: Many modern deep-learning techniques do not work without enormous datasets. At the same time, several fields demand methods working in scarcity of data. This problem is even more complex when the samples have varying structures, as in the case of graphs. Graph representation learning techniques have recently proven successful in a variety of domains. Nevertheless, the employed architectures perform miserably when faced with data scarcity. On the other hand, few-shot learning allows employing modern deep learning models in scarce data regimes without waiving their effectiveness. In this work, we tackle the problem of few-shot graph classification, showing that equipping a simple distance metric learning baseline with a state-of-the-art graph embedder allows to obtain competitive results on the task. While the simplicity of the architecture is enough to outperform more complex ones, it also allows straightforward additions. To this end, we show that additional improvements may be obtained by encouraging a task-conditioned embedding space. Finally, we propose a MixUp-based online data augmentation technique acting in the latent space and show its effectiveness on the task.
abstract_zh: 如果没有庞大的数据集，许多现代深度学习技术就无法发挥作用。与此同时，一些领域需要在数据稀缺的情况下发挥作用的方法。当样本具有不同的结构时（如图的情况），这个问题甚至更加复杂。图表示学习技术最近已在多个领域被证明是成功的。然而，当面临数据稀缺时，所采用的架构表现很糟糕。另一方面，少样本学习允许在稀缺数据环境中采用现代深度学习模型，而不会影响其有效性。在这项工作中，我们解决了少样本图分类问题，表明为简单的距离度量学习基线配备最先进的图嵌入器可以在任务中获得有竞争力的结果。虽然架构的简单性足以胜过更复杂的架构，但它也允许直接添加。为此，我们表明，通过鼓励任务条件嵌入空间可以获得额外的改进。最后，我们提出了一种在潜在空间中起作用的基于 MixUp 的在线数据增强技术，并展示了其在任务上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于度量的少样本图分类方法，结合距离度量学习与先进图嵌入技术解决数据稀缺场景下的图分类问题。
AI.motivation: 现代深度学习依赖大规模数据，但图结构数据在数据稀缺场景下难以有效处理，需开发适用于少样本的图分类方法。
AI.method: 采用简单距离度量学习框架结合前沿图嵌入器，通过任务条件嵌入空间优化和基于MixUp的潜在空间数据增强技术提升性能。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上取得具有竞争力的少样本分类结果，简单架构优于复杂模型，且增强技术进一步提升了效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了度量学习与图嵌入结合在少样本场景下的有效性，其简洁性为后续改进提供了灵活扩展基础。

authors_text: Pengju Liu,Hongzhi Zhang,Jinghui Wang,Yuzhi Wang,Dongwei Ren,Wangmeng Zuo
title: Robust Deep Ensemble Method for Real-world Image Denoising
title_zh: 用于现实世界图像去噪的鲁棒深度集成方法
abstract: Recently, deep learning-based image denoising methods have achieved promising performance on test data with the same distribution as training set, where various denoising models based on synthetic or collected real-world training data have been learned. However, when handling real-world noisy images, the denoising performance is still limited. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective Bayesian deep ensemble (BDE) method for real-world image denoising, where several representative deep denoisers pre-trained with various training data settings can be fused to improve robustness. The foundation of BDE is that real-world image noises are highly signal-dependent, and heterogeneous noises in a real-world noisy image can be separately handled by different denoisers. In particular, we take well-trained CBDNet, NBNet, HINet, Uformer and GMSNet into denoiser pool, and a U-Net is adopted to predict pixel-wise weighting maps to fuse these denoisers. Instead of solely learning pixel-wise weighting maps, Bayesian deep learning strategy is introduced to predict weighting uncertainty as well as weighting map, by which prediction variance can be modeled for improving robustness on real-world noisy images. Extensive experiments have shown that real-world noises can be better removed by fusing existing denoisers instead of training a big denoiser with expensive cost. On DND dataset, our BDE achieves +0.28~dB PSNR gain over the state-of-the-art denoising method. Moreover, we note that our BDE denoiser based on different Gaussian noise levels outperforms state-of-the-art CBDNet when applying to real-world noisy images. Furthermore, our BDE can be extended to other image restoration tasks, and achieves +0.30dB, +0.18dB and +0.12dB PSNR gains on benchmark datasets for image deblurring, image deraining and single image super-resolution, respectively.
summary: Recently, deep learning-based image denoising methods have achieved promising performance on test data with the same distribution as training set, where various denoising models based on synthetic or collected real-world training data have been learned. However, when handling real-world noisy images, the denoising performance is still limited. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective Bayesian deep ensemble (BDE) method for real-world image denoising, where several representative deep denoisers pre-trained with various training data settings can be fused to improve robustness. The foundation of BDE is that real-world image noises are highly signal-dependent, and heterogeneous noises in a real-world noisy image can be separately handled by different denoisers. In particular, we take well-trained CBDNet, NBNet, HINet, Uformer and GMSNet into denoiser pool, and a U-Net is adopted to predict pixel-wise weighting maps to fuse these denoisers. Instead of solely learning pixel-wise weighting maps, Bayesian deep learning strategy is introduced to predict weighting uncertainty as well as weighting map, by which prediction variance can be modeled for improving robustness on real-world noisy images. Extensive experiments have shown that real-world noises can be better removed by fusing existing denoisers instead of training a big denoiser with expensive cost. On DND dataset, our BDE achieves +0.28~dB PSNR gain over the state-of-the-art denoising method. Moreover, we note that our BDE denoiser based on different Gaussian noise levels outperforms state-of-the-art CBDNet when applying to real-world noisy images. Furthermore, our BDE can be extended to other image restoration tasks, and achieves +0.30dB, +0.18dB and +0.12dB PSNR gains on benchmark datasets for image deblurring, image deraining and single image super-resolution, respectively.
abstract_zh: 最近，基于深度学习的图像去噪方法在与训练集具有相同分布的测试数据上取得了良好的性能，其中基于合成或收集的真实世界训练数据的各种去噪模型已经被学习。然而，在处理现实世界的噪声图像时，去噪性能仍然有限。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的贝叶斯深度集成（BDE）方法，用于现实世界图像去噪，其中可以融合使用各种训练数据设置预训练的几个代表性深度去噪器以提高鲁棒性。 BDE 的基础是现实世界的图像噪声高度依赖于信号，并且现实世界的噪声图像中的异质噪声可以由不同的降噪器单独处理。特别是，我们将训练有素的 CBDNet、NBNet、HINet、Uformer 和 GMSNet 放入降噪器池中，并采用 U-Net 来预测像素级加权图以融合这些降噪器。引入贝叶斯深度学习策略来预测加权不确定性和加权图，而不是仅仅学习像素加权图，通过预测方差可以建模以提高现实世界噪声图像的鲁棒性。大量的实验表明，通过融合现有的降噪器可以更好地消除现实世界的噪声，而不是用昂贵的成本训练大型降噪器。在 DND 数据集上，我们的 BDE 比最先进的去噪方法实现了 +0.28~dB PSNR 增益。此外，我们注意到，当应用于现实世界的噪声图像时，基于不同高斯噪声水平的 BDE 降噪器的性能优于最先进的 CBDNet。此外，我们的 BDE 可以扩展到其他图像恢复任务，并在图像去模糊、图像去雨和单图像超分辨率的基准数据集上分别实现 +0.30dB、+0.18dB 和 +0.12dB PSNR 增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种鲁棒的深度集成方法（BDE），通过融合多种预训练图像去噪模型，提升真实世界图像去噪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习去噪方法在训练数据分布相同的情况下表现良好，但面对真实世界复杂噪声时性能受限，需提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建包含多个预训练去噪模型（如CBDNet、HINet等）的模型池，利用U-Net预测像素级权重图进行融合，并引入贝叶斯深度学习策略建模权重不确定性以增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在DND数据集上，BDE相较最先进方法PSNR提升0.28dB；在真实噪声图像中优于CBDNet，并在图像去模糊、去雨和超分辨率任务中分别提升0.30dB、0.18dB和0.12dB。
AI.conclusion: 融合现有去噪器并结合贝叶斯不确定性建模能有效提升真实场景去噪效果，且无需高昂训练成本，方法可扩展至其他图像恢复任务。
