authors_text: Zhiyuan You,Lei Cui,Yujun Shen,Kai Yang,Xin Lu,Yu Zheng,Xinyi Le
title: A Unified Model for Multi-class Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 多类异常检测的统一模型
abstract: Despite the rapid advance of unsupervised anomaly detection, existing methods require to train separate models for different objects. In this work, we present UniAD that accomplishes anomaly detection for multiple classes with a unified framework. Under such a challenging setting, popular reconstruction networks may fall into an "identical shortcut", where both normal and anomalous samples can be well recovered, and hence fail to spot outliers. To tackle this obstacle, we make three improvements. First, we revisit the formulations of fully-connected layer, convolutional layer, as well as attention layer, and confirm the important role of query embedding (i.e., within attention layer) in preventing the network from learning the shortcut. We therefore come up with a layer-wise query decoder to help model the multi-class distribution. Second, we employ a neighbor masked attention module to further avoid the information leak from the input feature to the reconstructed output feature. Third, we propose a feature jittering strategy that urges the model to recover the correct message even with noisy inputs. We evaluate our algorithm on MVTec-AD and CIFAR-10 datasets, where we surpass the state-of-the-art alternatives by a sufficiently large margin. For example, when learning a unified model for 15 categories in MVTec-AD, we surpass the second competitor on the tasks of both anomaly detection (from 88.1% to 96.5%) and anomaly localization (from 89.5% to 96.8%). Code is available at https://github.com/zhiyuanyou/UniAD.
summary: Despite the rapid advance of unsupervised anomaly detection, existing methods require to train separate models for different objects. In this work, we present UniAD that accomplishes anomaly detection for multiple classes with a unified framework. Under such a challenging setting, popular reconstruction networks may fall into an "identical shortcut", where both normal and anomalous samples can be well recovered, and hence fail to spot outliers. To tackle this obstacle, we make three improvements. First, we revisit the formulations of fully-connected layer, convolutional layer, as well as attention layer, and confirm the important role of query embedding (i.e., within attention layer) in preventing the network from learning the shortcut. We therefore come up with a layer-wise query decoder to help model the multi-class distribution. Second, we employ a neighbor masked attention module to further avoid the information leak from the input feature to the reconstructed output feature. Third, we propose a feature jittering strategy that urges the model to recover the correct message even with noisy inputs. We evaluate our algorithm on MVTec-AD and CIFAR-10 datasets, where we surpass the state-of-the-art alternatives by a sufficiently large margin. For example, when learning a unified model for 15 categories in MVTec-AD, we surpass the second competitor on the tasks of both anomaly detection (from 88.1% to 96.5%) and anomaly localization (from 89.5% to 96.8%). Code is available at https://github.com/zhiyuanyou/UniAD.
abstract_zh: 尽管无监督异常检测取得了快速进展，但现有方法需要针对不同对象训练单独的模型。在这项工作中，我们提出了 UniAD，它通过统一的框架完成多个类的异常检测。在这种具有挑战性的环境下，流行的重建网络可能会陷入“相同的捷径”，正常样本和异常样本都可以很好地恢复，从而无法发现异常值。为了解决这个障碍，我们做出了三项改进。首先，我们重新审视全连接层、卷积层和注意力层的公式，并确认查询嵌入（即在注意力层内）在防止网络学习捷径方面的重要作用。因此，我们提出了分层查询解码器来帮助对多类分布进行建模。其次，我们采用邻居屏蔽注意模块来进一步避免从输入特征到重建输出特征的信息泄漏。第三，我们提出了一种特征抖动策略，即使输入有噪声，该策略也能促使模型恢复正确的消息。我们在 MVTec-AD 和 CIFAR-10 数据集上评估我们的算法，我们以足够大的幅度超越了最先进的替代方案。例如，当在MVTec-AD中学习15个类别的统一模型时，我们在异常检测（从88.1％到96.5％）和异常定位（从89.5％到96.8％）的任务上都超过了第二个竞争对手。代码可在 https://github.com/zhiyuanyou/UniAD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于多类别异常检测的统一模型UniAD，旨在通过单一框架处理多种类别的异常检测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督异常检测方法需为不同对象单独训练模型，难以适应多类别场景，且易陷入‘相同捷径’问题，导致无法有效区分正常与异常样本。
AI.method: 提出三层改进：1）重新设计全连接层、卷积层及注意力层，引入查询嵌入防止网络学习捷径；2）采用邻域掩码注意力模块阻断输入与重建特征的信息泄露；3）设计特征抖动策略增强模型对噪声输入的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在MVTec-AD和CIFAR-10数据集上显著优于现有方法，例如在MVTec-AD的15类统一模型中，异常检测准确率从88.1%提升至96.5%，定位准确率从89.5%提升至96.8%。
AI.conclusion: UniAD通过三层关键技术有效解决了多类别异常检测中的挑战，验证了统一框架在提升检测性能与泛化能力上的有效性。

We evaluate our algorithm on MVTec-AD and CIFAR-10 datasets, where we surpass the state-of-the-art alternatives by a sufficiently large margin. For example, when learning a unified model for 15 categories in MVTec-AD, we surpass the second competitor on the tasks of both anomaly detection (from 88.1% to 96.5%) and anomaly localization (from 89.5% to 96.8%). Code is available at https://github.com/zhiyuanyou/UniAD. 尽管无监督异常检测取得了快速进展，但现有方法需要针对不同对象训练单独的模型。在这项工作中，我们提出了 UniAD，它通过统一的框架完成多个类的异常检测。在这种具有挑战性的环境下，流行的重建网络可能会陷入“相同的捷径”，正常样本和异常样本都可以很好地恢复，从而无法发现异常值。为了解决这个障碍，我们做出了三项改进。首先，我们重新审视全连接层、卷积层和注意力层的公式，并确认查询嵌入（即在注意力层内）在防止网络学习捷径方面的重要作用。因此，我们提出了分层查询解码器来帮助对多类分布进行建模。其次，我们采用邻居屏蔽注意模块来进一步避免从输入特征到重建输出特征的信息泄漏。第三，我们提出了一种特征抖动策略，即使输入有噪声，该策略也能促使模型恢复正确的消息。我们在 MVTec-AD 和 CIFAR-10 数据集上评估我们的算法，我们以足够大的幅度超越了最先进的替代方案。例如，当在MVTec-AD中学习15个类别的统一模型时，我们在异常检测（从88.1％到96.5％）和异常定位（从89.5％到96.8％）的任务上都超过了第二个竞争对手。代码可在 https://github.com/zhiyuanyou/UniAD 获取。 本文提出了一种用于多类别异常检测的统一模型UniAD，旨在通过单一框架处理多种类别的异常检测问题。 Zhiyuan You,Lei Cui,Yujun Shen,Kai Yang,Xin Lu,Yu Zheng,Xinyi Le cs.CV

authors_text: Jungsoo Lee,Juyoung Lee,Sanghun Jung,Jaegul Choo
title: Improving Evaluation of Debiasing in Image Classification
title_zh: 改进图像分类中去偏的评估
abstract: Image classifiers often rely overly on peripheral attributes that have a strong correlation with the target class (i.e., dataset bias) when making predictions. Due to the dataset bias, the model correctly classifies data samples including bias attributes (i.e., bias-aligned samples) while failing to correctly predict those without bias attributes (i.e., bias-conflicting samples). Recently, a myriad of studies focus on mitigating such dataset bias, the task of which is referred to as debiasing. However, our comprehensive study indicates several issues need to be improved when conducting evaluation of debiasing in image classification. First, most of the previous studies do not specify how they select their hyper-parameters and model checkpoints (i.e., tuning criterion). Second, the debiasing studies until now evaluated their proposed methods on datasets with excessively high bias-severities, showing degraded performance on datasets with low bias severity. Third, the debiasing studies do not share consistent experimental settings (e.g., datasets and neural networks) which need to be standardized for fair comparisons. Based on such issues, this paper 1) proposes an evaluation metric `Align-Conflict (AC) score' for the tuning criterion, 2) includes experimental settings with low bias severity and shows that they are yet to be explored, and 3) unifies the standardized experimental settings to promote fair comparisons between debiasing methods. We believe that our findings and lessons inspire future researchers in debiasing to further push state-of-the-art performances with fair comparisons.
summary: Image classifiers often rely overly on peripheral attributes that have a strong correlation with the target class (i.e., dataset bias) when making predictions. Due to the dataset bias, the model correctly classifies data samples including bias attributes (i.e., bias-aligned samples) while failing to correctly predict those without bias attributes (i.e., bias-conflicting samples). Recently, a myriad of studies focus on mitigating such dataset bias, the task of which is referred to as debiasing. However, our comprehensive study indicates several issues need to be improved when conducting evaluation of debiasing in image classification. First, most of the previous studies do not specify how they select their hyper-parameters and model checkpoints (i.e., tuning criterion). Second, the debiasing studies until now evaluated their proposed methods on datasets with excessively high bias-severities, showing degraded performance on datasets with low bias severity. Third, the debiasing studies do not share consistent experimental settings (e.g., datasets and neural networks) which need to be standardized for fair comparisons. Based on such issues, this paper 1) proposes an evaluation metric `Align-Conflict (AC) score' for the tuning criterion, 2) includes experimental settings with low bias severity and shows that they are yet to be explored, and 3) unifies the standardized experimental settings to promote fair comparisons between debiasing methods. We believe that our findings and lessons inspire future researchers in debiasing to further push state-of-the-art performances with fair comparisons.
abstract_zh: 图像分类器在进行预测时通常过度依赖与目标类有很强相关性的外围属性（即数据集偏差）。由于数据集偏差，模型可以正确分类包含偏差属性的数据样本（即偏差对齐样本），而无法正确预测那些没有偏差属性的数据样本（即偏差冲突样本）。最近，大量研究集中在减轻此类数据集偏差上，其任务称为去偏差。然而，我们的综合研究表明，在图像分类中进行去偏评估时，有几个问题需要改进。首先，之前的大多数研究都没有具体说明如何选择超参数和模型检查点（即调整标准）。其次，迄今为止的去偏差研究在偏差严重性过高的数据集上评估了他们提出的方法，结果显示在偏差严重性较低的数据集上性能下降。第三，去偏研究不共享一致的实验设置（例如数据集和神经网络），需要对其进行标准化以进行公平比较。基于这些问题，本文1）提出了调整标准的评估指标“对齐冲突（AC）分数”，2）包括低偏差严重性的实验设置，并表明它们还有待探索，3）统一标准化实验设置以促进去偏差方法之间的公平比较。我们相信，我们的发现和经验教训会激励未来的研究人员消除偏见，通过公平的比较进一步推动最先进的表现。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在改进图像分类中去偏（debiasing）效果的评估方法，通过提出新指标、引入低偏差数据集和统一实验设置来解决现有评估问题。
AI.motivation: 现有去偏方法在评估时存在超参数选择不透明、依赖高偏差数据集导致泛化性差、实验设置不统一等问题，阻碍了公平比较与性能提升。
AI.method: 提出Align-Conflict（AC）评分作为调参标准，引入低偏差数据集进行验证，并统一实验数据集和网络结构等设置以标准化评估流程。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有去偏方法在低偏差场景下表现不佳，标准化设置后不同方法的对比更公平，AC指标能更准确反映模型去偏能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的评估改进方案为未来去偏研究提供了更可靠的基准，有助于推动该领域技术的公平比较与性能突破。

authors_text: Xingchi Chen,Xiuyi Jia,Zhuoran Zheng
title: Ultra-High-Definition Image Deblurring via Multi-scale Cubic-Mixer
title_zh: 通过多尺度立方混合器进行超高清图像去模糊
abstract: Currently, transformer-based algorithms are making a splash in the domain of image deblurring. Their achievement depends on the self-attention mechanism with CNN stem to model long range dependencies between tokens. Unfortunately, this ear-pleasing pipeline introduces high computational complexity and makes it difficult to run an ultra-high-definition image on a single GPU in real time. To trade-off accuracy and efficiency, the input degraded image is computed cyclically over three dimensional ($C$, $W$, and $H$) signals without a self-attention mechanism. We term this deep network as Multi-scale Cubic-Mixer, which is acted on both the real and imaginary components after fast Fourier transform to estimate the Fourier coefficients and thus obtain a deblurred image. Furthermore, we combine the multi-scale cubic-mixer with a slicing strategy to generate high-quality results at a much lower computational cost. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed algorithm performs favorably against the state-of-the-art deblurring approaches on the several benchmarks and a new ultra-high-definition dataset in terms of accuracy and speed.
summary: Currently, transformer-based algorithms are making a splash in the domain of image deblurring. Their achievement depends on the self-attention mechanism with CNN stem to model long range dependencies between tokens. Unfortunately, this ear-pleasing pipeline introduces high computational complexity and makes it difficult to run an ultra-high-definition image on a single GPU in real time. To trade-off accuracy and efficiency, the input degraded image is computed cyclically over three dimensional ($C$, $W$, and $H$) signals without a self-attention mechanism. We term this deep network as Multi-scale Cubic-Mixer, which is acted on both the real and imaginary components after fast Fourier transform to estimate the Fourier coefficients and thus obtain a deblurred image. Furthermore, we combine the multi-scale cubic-mixer with a slicing strategy to generate high-quality results at a much lower computational cost. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed algorithm performs favorably against the state-of-the-art deblurring approaches on the several benchmarks and a new ultra-high-definition dataset in terms of accuracy and speed.
abstract_zh: 目前，基于 Transformer 的算法正在图像去模糊领域引起轰动。他们的成就依赖于 CNN 干的自注意力机制来模拟 token 之间的长程依赖关系。不幸的是，这种令人愉悦的管道引入了很高的计算复杂度，并且使得在单个 GPU 上实时运行超高清图像变得困难。为了权衡准确性和效率，输入的降级图像是在三维（$C$、$W$ 和 $H$）信号上循环计算的，没有自注意力机制。我们将这种深度网络称为多尺度立方混合器，它在快速傅里叶变换后作用于实部和虚部，以估计傅里叶系数，从而获得去模糊图像。此外，我们将多尺度立方混合器与切片策略相结合，以低得多的计算成本生成高质量的结果。实验结果表明，所提出的算法在几个基准测试和新的超高清数据集上的准确性和速度方面优于最先进的去模糊方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多尺度立方混合器的超高清图像去模糊方法，通过降低计算复杂度实现高效处理。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer-based去模糊算法因自注意力机制导致计算复杂度高，难以实时处理超高清图像。
AI.method: 设计无需自注意力机制的三维信号循环计算网络（多尺度立方混合器），结合傅里叶变换实虚部处理与切片策略降低计算成本。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试及超高清数据集上，算法在精度和速度均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度立方混合器有效平衡了去模糊精度与计算效率，适用于超高清图像实时处理场景。

authors_text: Linfeng Zhao,Xupeng Zhu,Lingzhi Kong,Robin Walters,Lawson L. S. Wong
title: Integrating Symmetry into Differentiable Planning with Steerable Convolutions
title_zh: 将对称性集成到具有可导卷积的可微规划中
comment: ICLR 2023 camera-ready version. Original name = "Integrating Symmetry into Differentiable Planning". Website: http://lfzhao.com/SymPlan
comments: ICLR 2023 camera-ready version. Original name = "Integrating Symmetry into Differentiable Planning". Website: http://lfzhao.com/SymPlan
abstract: We study how group symmetry helps improve data efficiency and generalization for end-to-end differentiable planning algorithms when symmetry appears in decision-making tasks. Motivated by equivariant convolution networks, we treat the path planning problem as \textit{signals} over grids. We show that value iteration in this case is a linear equivariant operator, which is a (steerable) convolution. This extends Value Iteration Networks (VINs) on using convolutional networks for path planning with additional rotation and reflection symmetry. Our implementation is based on VINs and uses steerable convolution networks to incorporate symmetry. The experiments are performed on four tasks: 2D navigation, visual navigation, and 2 degrees of freedom (2DOFs) configuration space and workspace manipulation. Our symmetric planning algorithms improve training efficiency and generalization by large margins compared to non-equivariant counterparts, VIN and GPPN.
summary: We study how group symmetry helps improve data efficiency and generalization for end-to-end differentiable planning algorithms when symmetry appears in decision-making tasks. Motivated by equivariant convolution networks, we treat the path planning problem as \textit{signals} over grids. We show that value iteration in this case is a linear equivariant operator, which is a (steerable) convolution. This extends Value Iteration Networks (VINs) on using convolutional networks for path planning with additional rotation and reflection symmetry. Our implementation is based on VINs and uses steerable convolution networks to incorporate symmetry. The experiments are performed on four tasks: 2D navigation, visual navigation, and 2 degrees of freedom (2DOFs) configuration space and workspace manipulation. Our symmetric planning algorithms improve training efficiency and generalization by large margins compared to non-equivariant counterparts, VIN and GPPN.
abstract_zh: 我们研究当对称性出现在决策任务中时，群对称性如何帮助提高端到端可微规划算法的数据效率和泛化能力。在等变卷积网络的推动下，我们将路径规划问题视为网格上的 \textit{signals} 。我们证明，这种情况下的值迭代是一个线性等变算子，它是一个（可操纵的）卷积。这扩展了价值迭代网络 (VIN) 使用卷积网络进行路径规划的能力，并具有额外的旋转和反射对称性。我们的实现基于 VIN，并使用可操纵的卷积网络来合并对称性。实验针对四项任务进行：2D 导航、视觉导航以及 2 自由度 (2DOF) 配置空间和工作空间操作。与非等变算法、VIN 和 GPPN 相比，我们的对称规划算法大幅提高了训练效率和泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过群对称性提升端到端微分规划算法的数据效率和泛化能力，并将路径规划问题视为网格上的信号，利用可转向卷积网络实现对称性整合。
AI.motivation: 受等变卷积网络启发，针对决策任务中存在对称性的问题，传统方法未能有效利用对称性特性，导致效率与泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 将价值迭代转化为线性等变算子（可转向卷积），扩展价值迭代网络（VIN），通过可转向卷积网络引入旋转与反射对称性。
AI.result: 在二维导航、视觉导航及二维自由度配置空间等任务中，对称规划算法较非等变方法（VIN/GPPN）在训练效率和泛化能力上提升显著。
AI.conclusion: 利用可转向卷积整合对称性可有效提升微分规划算法性能，为复杂任务提供更高效且具泛化性的解决方案。

search_text: Integrating Symmetry into Differentiable Planning with Steerable Convolutions 将对称性集成到具有可导卷积的可微规划中 We study how group symmetry helps improve data efficiency and generalization for end-to-end differentiable planning algorithms when symmetry appears in decision-making tasks. Motivated by equivariant convolution networks, we treat the path planning problem as \textit{signals} over grids. We show that value iteration in this case is a linear equivariant operator, which is a (steerable) convolution. This extends Value Iteration Networks (VINs) on using convolutional networks for path planning with additional rotation and reflection symmetry. Our implementation is based on VINs and uses steerable convolution networks to incorporate symmetry. The experiments are performed on four tasks: 2D navigation, visual navigation, and 2 degrees of freedom (2DOFs) configuration space and workspace manipulation. Our symmetric planning algorithms improve training efficiency and generalization by large margins compared to non-equivariant counterparts, VIN and GPPN. 我们研究当对称性出现在决策任务中时，群对称性如何帮助提高端到端可微规划算法的数据效率和泛化能力。在等变卷积网络的推动下，我们将路径规划问题视为网格上的 \textit{signals} 。我们证明，这种情况下的值迭代是一个线性等变算子，它是一个（可操纵的）卷积。这扩展了价值迭代网络 (VIN) 使用卷积网络进行路径规划的能力，并具有额外的旋转和反射对称性。我们的实现基于 VIN，并使用可操纵的卷积网络来合并对称性。实验针对四项任务进行：2D 导航、视觉导航以及 2 自由度 (2DOF) 配置空间和工作空间操作。与非等变算法、VIN 和 GPPN 相比，我们的对称规划算法大幅提高了训练效率和泛化能力。 本文研究如何通过群对称性提升端到端微分规划算法的数据效率和泛化能力，并将路径规划问题视为网格上的信号，利用可转向卷积网络实现对称性整合。 Linfeng Zhao,Xupeng Zhu,Lingzhi Kong,Robin Walters,Lawson L. authors_text: Guangming Wang,Xiaoyu Tian,Ruiqi Ding,Hesheng Wang
title: Unsupervised Learning of 3D Scene Flow from Monocular Camera
title_zh: 单目相机 3D 场景流的无监督学习
abstract: Scene flow represents the motion of points in the 3D space, which is the counterpart of the optical flow that represents the motion of pixels in the 2D image. However, it is difficult to obtain the ground truth of scene flow in the real scenes, and recent studies are based on synthetic data for training. Therefore, how to train a scene flow network with unsupervised methods based on real-world data shows crucial significance. A novel unsupervised learning method for scene flow is proposed in this paper, which utilizes the images of two consecutive frames taken by monocular camera without the ground truth of scene flow for training. Our method realizes the goal that training scene flow network with real-world data, which bridges the gap between training data and test data and broadens the scope of available data for training. Unsupervised learning of scene flow in this paper mainly consists of two parts: (i) depth estimation and camera pose estimation, and (ii) scene flow estimation based on four different loss functions. Depth estimation and camera pose estimation obtain the depth maps and camera pose between two consecutive frames, which provide further information for the next scene flow estimation. After that, we used depth consistency loss, dynamic-static consistency loss, Chamfer loss, and Laplacian regularization loss to carry out unsupervised training of the scene flow network. To our knowledge, this is the first paper that realizes the unsupervised learning of 3D scene flow from monocular camera. The experiment results on KITTI show that our method for unsupervised learning of scene flow meets great performance compared to traditional methods Iterative Closest Point (ICP) and Fast Global Registration (FGR). The source code is available at: https://github.com/IRMVLab/3DUnMonoFlow.

However, it is difficult to obtain the ground truth of scene flow in the real scenes, and recent studies are based on synthetic data for training. Unsupervised learning of scene flow in this paper mainly consists of two parts: (i) depth estimation and camera pose estimation, and (ii) scene flow estimation based on four different loss functions. After that, we used depth consistency loss, dynamic-static consistency loss, Chamfer loss, and Laplacian regularization loss to carry out unsupervised training of the scene flow network. The experiment results on KITTI show that our method for unsupervised learning of scene flow meets great performance compared to traditional methods Iterative Closest Point (ICP) and Fast Global Registration (FGR). abstract_zh: 场景流表示 3D 空间中点的运动，它与表示 2D 图像中像素运动的光流相对应。然而，很难获得真实场景中的场景流的真实情况，最近的研究都是基于合成数据进行训练。因此，如何基于真实数据用无监督方法训练场景流网络显得至关重要。本文提出了一种新颖的场景流无监督学习方法，该方法利用单目相机拍摄的连续两帧图像进行训练，而无需场景流的基本事实。我们的方法实现了用真实数据训练场景流网络的目标，弥合了训练数据和测试数据之间的差距，拓宽了训练可用数据的范围。本文中的场景流无监督学习主要由两部分组成：（i）深度估计和相机位姿估计，以及（ii）基于四种不同损失函数的场景流估计。深度估计和相机姿态估计获得两个连续帧之间的深度图和相机姿态，为下一步场景流估计提供进一步的信息。之后，我们利用深度一致性损失、动静态一致性损失、Chamfer损失和拉普拉斯正则化损失对场景流网络进行无监督训练。据我们所知，这是第一篇实现单目相机 3D 场景流无监督学习的论文。 KITTI 上的实验结果表明，与传统方法迭代最近点（ICP）和快速全局配准（FGR）相比，我们的场景流无监督学习方法具有出色的性能。源代码位于：https://github.com/IRMVLab/3DUnMonoFlow。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单目摄像头的无监督学习方法，用于从真实世界数据中训练3D场景流网络。
AI.motivation: 真实场景中难以获取场景流的地面真实数据，现有研究依赖合成数据，导致训练数据与测试数据存在差距，需探索基于真实数据的无监督学习方法。
AI.method: 方法分为两部分：(i) 通过深度估计和相机位姿估计获取深度图与相机姿态；(ii) 使用深度一致性损失、动静一致性损失、Chamfer损失和拉普拉斯正则化损失进行场景流估计。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上的实验表明，该方法性能优于传统方法ICP和FGR。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次实现了基于单目摄像头的3D场景流无监督学习，缩小了训练数据与测试数据的差距，拓宽了训练数据的可用范围。

authors_text: Maya Pavlova,Tia Tuinstra,Hossein Aboutalebi,Andy Zhao,Hayden Gunraj,Alexander Wong
title: COVIDx CXR-3: A Large-Scale, Open-Source Benchmark Dataset of Chest X-ray Images for Computer-Aided COVID-19 Diagnostics
title_zh: COVIDx CXR-3：用于计算机辅助 COVID-19 诊断的大规模开源胸部 X 射线图像基准数据集
abstract: After more than two years since the beginning of the COVID-19 pandemic, the pressure of this crisis continues to devastate globally. The use of chest X-ray (CXR) imaging as a complementary screening strategy to RT-PCR testing is not only prevailing but has greatly increased due to its routine clinical use for respiratory complaints. Thus far, many visual perception models have been proposed for COVID-19 screening based on CXR imaging. Nevertheless, the accuracy and the generalization capacity of these models are very much dependent on the diversity and the size of the dataset they were trained on. Motivated by this, we introduce COVIDx CXR-3, a large-scale benchmark dataset of CXR images for supporting COVID-19 computer vision research. COVIDx CXR-3 is composed of 30,386 CXR images from a multinational cohort of 17,026 patients from at least 51 countries, making it, to the best of our knowledge, the most extensive, most diverse COVID-19 CXR dataset in open access form. Here, we provide comprehensive details on the various aspects of the proposed dataset including patient demographics, imaging views, and infection types. The hope is that COVIDx CXR-3 can assist scientists in advancing machine learning research against both the COVID-19 pandemic and related diseases.
summary: After more than two years since the beginning of the COVID-19 pandemic, the pressure of this crisis continues to devastate globally. The use of chest X-ray (CXR) imaging as a complementary screening strategy to RT-PCR testing is not only prevailing but has greatly increased due to its routine clinical use for respiratory complaints. Thus far, many visual perception models have been proposed for COVID-19 screening based on CXR imaging. Nevertheless, the accuracy and the generalization capacity of these models are very much dependent on the diversity and the size of the dataset they were trained on. Motivated by this, we introduce COVIDx CXR-3, a large-scale benchmark dataset of CXR images for supporting COVID-19 computer vision research. COVIDx CXR-3 is composed of 30,386 CXR images from a multinational cohort of 17,026 patients from at least 51 countries, making it, to the best of our knowledge, the most extensive, most diverse COVID-19 CXR dataset in open access form. Here, we provide comprehensive details on the various aspects of the proposed dataset including patient demographics, imaging views, and infection types. The hope is that COVIDx CXR-3 can assist scientists in advancing machine learning research against both the COVID-19 pandemic and related diseases.
abstract_zh: 自 COVID-19 大流行爆发两年多以来，这场危机的压力继续在全球范围内造成破坏。使用胸部 X 射线 (CXR) 成像作为 RT-PCR 检测的补充筛查策略不仅很普遍，而且由于其在呼吸系统疾病的常规临床应用，其使用量也大大增加。迄今为止，已经提出了许多基于 CXR 成像的视觉感知模型用于 COVID-19 筛查。然而，这些模型的准确性和泛化能力在很大程度上取决于它们所训练的数据集的多样性和大小。受此启发，我们推出了 COVIDx CXR-3，这是一个用于支持 COVID-19 计算机视觉研究的大规模 CXR 图像基准数据集。 COVIDx CXR-3 由来自至少 51 个国家/地区 17,026 名患者的跨国队列的 30,386 张 CXR 图像组成，据我们所知，它是开放获取形式的最广泛、最多样化的 COVID-19 CXR 数据集。在这里，我们提供了拟议数据集各个方面的全面详细信息，包括患者人口统计、成像视图和感染类型。希望 COVIDx CXR-3 能够帮助科学家推进针对 COVID-19 大流行和相关疾病的机器学习研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为COVIDx CXR-3的大规模开放源代码胸部X光图像基准数据集，用于支持计算机辅助的COVID-19诊断研究。
AI.motivation: 现有基于胸部X光（CXR）的COVID-19筛查模型的准确性和泛化能力高度依赖训练数据集的多样性和规模，而目前缺乏一个多样化且大规模的公开数据集。
AI.method: 从至少51个国家的17,026名患者中收集30,386张CXR图像，涵盖不同人口统计学特征、影像视图和感染类型，并提供详细数据集描述。
AI.result: 构建了目前公开的最全面、最多样化的COVID-19 CXR数据集，包含多国患者数据及详细元信息。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集可助力科学家推进针对COVID-19及其相关疾病的机器学习研究，提升模型的泛化能力和诊断性能。

search_text: COVIDx CXR-3: A Large-Scale, Open-Source Benchmark Dataset of Chest X-ray Images for Computer-Aided COVID-19 Diagnostics COVIDx CXR-3：用于计算机辅助 COVID-19 诊断的大规模开源胸部 X 射线图像基准数据集 After more than two years since the beginning of the COVID-19 pandemic, the pressure of this crisis continues to devastate globally. The use of chest X-ray (CXR) imaging as a complementary screening strategy to RT-PCR testing is not only prevailing but has greatly increased due to its routine clinical use for respiratory complaints. Thus far, many visual perception models have been proposed for COVID-19 screening based on CXR imaging. Nevertheless, the accuracy and the generalization capacity of these models are very much dependent on the diversity and the size of the dataset they were trained on. Motivated by this, we introduce COVIDx CXR-3, a large-scale benchmark dataset of CXR images for supporting COVID-19 computer vision research. COVIDx CXR-3 is composed of 30,386 CXR images from a multinational cohort of 17,026 patients from at least 51 countries, making it, to the best of our knowledge, the most extensive, most diverse COVID-19 CXR dataset in open access form. Here, we provide comprehensive details on the various aspects of the proposed dataset including patient demographics, imaging views, and infection types. The hope is that COVIDx CXR-3 can assist scientists in advancing machine learning research against both the COVID-19 pandemic and related diseases. 自 COVID-19 大流行爆发两年多以来，这场危机的压力继续在全球范围内造成破坏。使用胸部 X 射线 (CXR) 成像作为 RT-PCR 检测的补充筛查策略不仅很普遍，而且由于其在呼吸系统疾病的常规临床应用，其使用量也大大增加。迄今为止，已经提出了许多基于 CXR 成像的视觉感知模型用于 COVID-19 筛查。然而，这些模型的准确性和泛化能力在很大程度上取决于它们所训练的数据集的多样性和大小。受此启发，我们推出了 COVIDx CXR-3，这是一个用于支持 COVID-19 计算机视觉研究的大规模 CXR 图像基准数据集。 COVIDx CXR-3 由来自至少 51 个国家/地区 17,026 名患者的跨国队列的 30,386 张 CXR 图像组成，据我们所知，它是开放获取形式的最广泛、最多样化的 COVID-19 CXR 数据集。在这里，我们提供了拟议数据集各个方面的全面详细信息，包括患者人口统计、成像视图和感染类型。希望 COVIDx CXR-3 能够帮助科学家推进针对 COVID-19 大流行和相关疾病的机器学习研究。 本文提出一个名为COVIDx CXR-3的大规模开放源代码胸部X光图像基准数据集，用于支持计算机辅助的COVID-19诊断研究。 Maya Pavlova,Tia Tuinstra,Hossein Aboutalebi,Andy Zhao,Hayden Gunraj,Alexander Wong eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Haoze Wu,Teruhiro Tagomori,Alexander Robey,Fengjun Yang,Nikolai Matni,George Pappas,Hamed Hassani,Corina Pasareanu,Clark Barrett
title: Toward Certified Robustness Against Real-World Distribution Shifts
title_zh: 针对现实世界的分布变化实现经过认证的稳健性
comment: SatML'23. Keywords: certified robustness, distribution shift, generative models, S-shaped activations, CEGAR
comments: SatML'23. Keywords: certified robustness, distribution shift, generative models, S-shaped activations, CEGAR
abstract: We consider the problem of certifying the robustness of deep neural networks against real-world distribution shifts. To do so, we bridge the gap between hand-crafted specifications and realistic deployment settings by proposing a novel neural-symbolic verification framework, in which we train a generative model to learn perturbations from data and define specifications with respect to the output of the learned model. A unique challenge arising from this setting is that existing verifiers cannot tightly approximate sigmoid activations, which are fundamental to many state-of-the-art generative models. To address this challenge, we propose a general meta-algorithm for handling sigmoid activations which leverages classical notions of counter-example-guided abstraction refinement. The key idea is to "lazily" refine the abstraction of sigmoid functions to exclude spurious counter-examples found in the previous abstraction, thus guaranteeing progress in the verification process while keeping the state-space small. Experiments on the MNIST and CIFAR-10 datasets show that our framework significantly outperforms existing methods on a range of challenging distribution shifts.
summary: We consider the problem of certifying the robustness of deep neural networks against real-world distribution shifts. To do so, we bridge the gap between hand-crafted specifications and realistic deployment settings by proposing a novel neural-symbolic verification framework, in which we train a generative model to learn perturbations from data and define specifications with respect to the output of the learned model. A unique challenge arising from this setting is that existing verifiers cannot tightly approximate sigmoid activations, which are fundamental to many state-of-the-art generative models. To address this challenge, we propose a general meta-algorithm for handling sigmoid activations which leverages classical notions of counter-example-guided abstraction refinement. The key idea is to "lazily" refine the abstraction of sigmoid functions to exclude spurious counter-examples found in the previous abstraction, thus guaranteeing progress in the verification process while keeping the state-space small. Experiments on the MNIST and CIFAR-10 datasets show that our framework significantly outperforms existing methods on a range of challenging distribution shifts.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑验证深度神经网络针对现实世界分布变化的鲁棒性的问题。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的神经符号验证框架，弥合了手工制作的规范和实际部署设置之间的差距，在该框架中，我们训练生成模型以从数据中学习扰动，并根据学习模型的输出定义规范。这种设置带来的一个独特的挑战是，现有的验证者无法严格逼近 sigmoid 激活，而这对于许多最先进的生成模型来说是基础。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种处理 sigmoid 激活的通用元算法，该算法利用了反例引导的抽象细化的经典概念。关键思想是“惰性地”细化 sigmoid 函数的抽象，以排除先前抽象中发现的虚假反例，从而保证验证过程的进展，同时保持状态空间较小。在 MNIST 和 CIFAR-10 数据集上进行的实验表明，我们的框架在一系列具有挑战性的分布变化方面明显优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种神经符号验证框架，用于认证深度神经网络在真实世界分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有验证方法无法准确处理生成模型中的sigmoid激活函数，导致对实际分布偏移的鲁棒性认证不足。
AI.method: 设计神经符号验证框架，结合生成模型学习扰动并定义规范，提出基于反例引导的抽象细化元算法处理sigmoid激活函数。
AI.result: 在MNIST和CIFAR-10数据集上，该框架在多种分布偏移场景下显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了sigmoid激活函数的验证难题，为实际部署中的鲁棒性认证提供了新思路。
